programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppsummerer Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood kostnadene ved å ha barn i 'Dyre barn', snubler over sirkusartister som lager 'Plutselig sirkus' og opplever slitsomme feiringer med 'Dårlige bursdager'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' denger Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood hodet i veggen som første trekk i 'Kraftskaller', ødelegger golfutstyret sitt i 'På tide med nye køller' og møter farene ved å benytte 'Samkjøring om natten'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' utforsker Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood ildidrettens verden i 'Flammesport', finner ut hvor farlige dører kan være i 'Helt av hengslene' og blir overrasket over noen svært 'Uventede raketter'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' krasjer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood inn i ubevegelige gjenstander i 'Parkert smerte', oppdager at trafikkflyten kan påvirkes av bisarre årsaker i 'Motorveiforsinkelser' og opplever farene ved 'Olme okser'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' støter Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood på farlige voltere uten 'Saltobevissthet', opplever smerten ved knuste tohjulinger i Billigsykler' og oppdager at heis og fyll ikke går så godt sammen i 'Heisa-heistur'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXXI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' prøver Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood å muntre opp folk som er 'Vinterdeppa', finner ut hva som skjer når du faller og opplever 'Fjes mot gjerde' og ødelegger perfekte øyeblikk med 'Triste forlovelsesopptak'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' lider Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood av 'Konsertforvirring', får smaken på 'Søvnsnacks' og flykter fra noen 'Hissige sammenstøt'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og medvert Lolo Wood det tøft når de flytter ut og blir 'Såre flyttefolk', møter noen nye medarbeidere som er 'Dumme på jobben' og finner ut at det er greit å gi opp i 'Vi kutter ut'

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood på trynet i gresset idet de 'Eter plen', blir veltrent og hårete med muskelforbundne 'Gymhunder' og går langt under null i 'Dypfryst moro'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' er Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood en fare for seg selv i 'Selvfelling', drar på gymet for å få seg en 'Boksesekktrøkk' og går langt i å utfordre høydeskrekken med 'Elleville høyder'.

programme.title: Andromeda: Engelenes forfall
programme.desc: Det viser seg at Doyle er en android bygget av Harper for å inneholde Rommies kjerneprogrammering.

programme.title: Andromeda: Eschatologi av vår nåtid
programme.desc: Beka vinner en pris fra en radio-DJ, lærer sannheten om Seefra og finner Meethus-diagrammet.

programme.title: Andromeda: Når går rundt ...
programme.desc: En forsker fra det opprinnelige Commonwealth dukker opp, fanget i en tidssløyfe.

programme.title: Andromeda: Forsøk på avrettingsmasse
programme.desc: Flavin kommer tilbake og utløser en gjengkrig og hjelper Dylan til å utvikle seg som et paradin.

programme.title: Andromeda: Så brenn de utemmede landene
programme.desc: En krystall som kan gjenopprette Andromedas kraft blir oppdaget, men for å få den, må Dylan jobbe for gruveeieren.

programme.title: Andromeda: Det som ikke var
programme.desc: Tunneler oppdages på Seefra som kan brukes til å nå åtte andre Seefra-planeter.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
programme.desc: In 1991, a high school girl vanished after attending a party. The prime suspect had two alibi witnesses for the night she disappeared. A solid alibi can often overcome circumstantial evidence, but forensic evidence is another matter.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purr-fect Match
programme.desc: When police discovered the body of Douglas Beamish's estranged wife, authorities linked 20 cat hairs found on her jacket to a cat owned by Beamish's parents. It was the first time animal DNA was used to solve a criminal case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bio-Attack
programme.desc: When more than 700 Oregonians contracted food poisoning from a unique strain of salmonella in 1984, investigators uncovered a secret plot to influence local elections.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: Two sets of scientists probe a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Prayer
programme.desc: In 1995, the founder of American Atheists disappeared with one of her sons, her granddaughter and $500,000 in gold coins. The police investigated several suspects, including David R. Waters, who worked for American Atheists.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clutch of Witnesses
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses may hold the key to the death of a motorcycle gang member.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: In 1984, a passerby finds the torso of a woman in a cardboard box. A forensic entomologist analyzes nearby insect activity to determine when the victim was killed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Touching Recollection
programme.desc: The investigation into the kidnapping and rape of an 18-year-old Ohio woman is aided when the victim returns hours after the incident occurred. With her help, the police are able to track the assailant to his front door.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg to Stand On
programme.desc: The police investigate when a severed leg is discovered among garbage. Conventional means of identifying the victim are impossible, leading investigators to rely on DNA, forensic anthropology and toxicology.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: In a 1992 murder case, the autopsy of a cremated body turns up telltale clues of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within a Hair
programme.desc: In 1996, Indiana police identified Richard Alexander as the “River Park Rapist” who assaulted four women that year. Later, DNA analysis casts doubt on his conviction.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 5
programme.desc: This episode includes: Burbank Robbers, BC Sea Monster, Vision Quest, Florida Film Flam and Thumper.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 6
programme.desc: This episode includes: Journey to Murder, Taunting Bank Robber, Madman Across the Water, Marcos' Buddha (Pts. 1 & 2) and Steve's Flag.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 7
programme.desc: This episode includes: Magic, the Gathering, Lightning Family, Dennis Keith Smith, Thelma and Louise, Dede's Gone and Sweetheart Escape.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 8
programme.desc: This episode includes: Mia Zapata, Billy the Kid, Wanted Nanny, Dreams Come True and Calculating Coroners.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 9
programme.desc: This episode includes: Home Invasion Spree, Lost Adams Digging, Sweetheart Escape Update, Men In Black, Salsa Swindlers and Molester Cop.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 10
programme.desc: This episode includes: Emery's Last Stand, Hansen Twin Murder (Pts. 1 & 2), Pix Of The Dead, Fatal Obsession and Baseball Amnesia.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Search For Lisa Rene
programme.desc: When a young woman was grabbed from her Texas home, the police raced to find her abductors. On the face of it, the kidnapping seemed like the random act of desperate men.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Obsession
programme.desc: Power is a responsibility as well as a privilege. But in the wrong hands, power can corrupt. For former Deputy Attorney General for the State of Delaware, losing sight of his sworn oath to uphold justice could prove lethal.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cat and Mouse
programme.desc: He was a predator, abducting girls and young women from their own front yards in broad daylight. He was a sadist: phoning one victim's family, taunting them, boosting then dashing their hope, and he wouldn't stop until we stopped him.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Terror In Disguise
programme.desc: Banks use a variety of devices to discourage would-be robbers: security cameras, silent alarms, and exploding dye packs. But when an elusive bank robber targeted Seattle's banks, none of these precautions were effective.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hired Gun
programme.desc: When three people were found murdered in their home, it appeared like a burglary gone awry. But a crime this horrific deserved a closer look.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly intentions
programme.desc: When abduction turns to murder, forensic science is the only key to finding justice for the victims of a kidnapper's deadly intentions.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Written In Bone
programme.desc: At the scene of a murder, sometimes the victim provides the only clues to their killer. Forensic anthropologists use skeletal remains to decipher the clues written in the bones.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Dead Men Do Talk
programme.desc: Profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts and the procedures they use to solve murders and other mysteries in minutes or centuries after they happen.

programme.title: The New Detectives: In The Line of Fire
programme.desc: Bombers, snipers, spree killers: some people don't care who they kill, they just want to hurt innocent people.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Marked For Death
programme.desc: Sometimes killers are careful to leave no fingerprints behind. But methods of the murder itself can leave a lasting impression on police, especially when the tools (or weapons) of a killer's trade leave an innocent victim marked for death.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Forgotten Souls of Errwood Hall
programme.desc: Sean heads to the Errwood Hall ruins in the Goyt Valley. It is said to be haunted by 3 spirits, and that it has its very own time slip. The investigation does not disappoint and although the hall is gone, the spirits remain.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Ghost in the Shower
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate Waterloo Rugby Club and come into contact with a very mischievous spirit in the male showers! A ghost that scares away any female that dares to enter.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Drakelow Tunnels
programme.desc: The Drakelow Tunnels are a former underground military complexused mainly for storage. However, during the construction and running of this facility, 6 people are thought to have died.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: The Mischievous Ghost of The Kings Arms Hotel
programme.desc: Sean investigates claims that a mischievous ghost going by the name of Alice is causing havoc at The Kings Arms Hotel. This is one night at a hotel that the team will not rest.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Lady in Grey
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate ruins of The Orangery in Merseyside and claims that the ghost of a grey lady is haunting the location. They capture some of the most compelling paranormal evidence they have ever encountered.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Murder My Daughter?
programme.desc: Teenager Megan lives with her older controlling boyfriend Rick. Megan cannot attend school, find a job, or even eat without his OK! Can her aunt and Steve get through to her?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Fake Your Pregnancies?
programme.desc: Dennis claims his ex-girlfriend Kendal keeps tied down with pregnancy lies! He wants to know if their daughter is even his! Will Steve’s DNA test results finally let them move on?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Results Revealed: Did She Cheat?
programme.desc: Justin is convinced that girlfriend Lainie has been cheating on him, and more importantly that he’s not the father of their child. But his own insecurities have led him to turn violent. Also, Steven doubts whether Ashley’s child is his.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Tragic Accident
programme.desc: Rebecca left her baby with fiancé James and his mother Adeline, only to discover that her baby was hospitalized. Rebecca suspects that James is responsible. Adeline blames her for the baby’s death!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I’m Starving Myself to Death
programme.desc: Pamela aims to weigh 40 pounds. Samantha, who suffers from bulimia and alcoholism, steals to accomplish her binging. Can both women confront their eating disorders with support and treatment?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Crawl to Your Wife
programme.desc: After surviving a wild car chase, losing her leg, and being comatose due to her husband, Portia will finally confront him. He won't admit fault, but today Steve’s helping Portia find her voice.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: My Teen Daughter Wants a Baby
programme.desc: 17-year-old Naomi has undergone a sudden attitude change and is on a mission to have a baby. Parents Leeanders and April need Steve to intervene!

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Follow the Money
programme.desc: The body of a 72-year-old man is found in a junkyard, stabbed 13 times and wearing nothing but his underwear and dentures.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Drive Thru Murder
programme.desc: Missy Berry is found dead in an idling car at a deserted intersection. A surprise twist in the investigation leads him into uncharted territory.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Hail of Bullets
programme.desc: The murder of a young father stuns his close-knit community, but the investigation reveals a neighborly dispute turned deadly.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Girl Next Door
programme.desc: When a young army vet is found stabbed to death on his living room floor, suspicions quickly fall to a neighbor who was arrested during a nearby altercation.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: No Good Deed
programme.desc: After a man is brutally gunned down in the middle of the street, Kenda must piece together a complicated puzzle of conflicting stories and dead ends.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hunter's Game
programme.desc: In the 1970s and 80s, people went to Alaska looking for a fresh start, to reinvent themselves, or to disappear for a while. Some of those disappearances weren't by choice.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dixie Mafia
programme.desc: On Mississippi's Gulf Coast, a Judge and his politician wife are murdered in their home. The killer left few clues. It looked like a professional hit, and the investigation led nowhere. But the FBI refused to give up.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Shattered Shield
programme.desc: In a city awash in narcotics the drug lords have all the power even over the police. Corruption in New Orleans grew like cancer, eating away at public safety and threatening to destroy the city. Crooked cops break the laws they were sworn to uphold.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: When the small community of Noel, Missouri discovered their bank was robbed, they're shocked. When the bank president turned up missing, they're outraged. And when clues began to surface the facts were more terrible than anyone could have guessed.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Crime Spree
programme.desc: They swept through six states like a plague, thrill killers acting without rhyme or reason. They targeted adults and young girls, kidnapping, and murdering. And in their rampage, they left plenty of clues, but moving targets are the hardest to hit.

programme.title: My Haunted House: Don't Go Upstairs and Swerve
programme.desc: Two brothers discover a horrifying secret when they inherit a relative's home. A school teacher struggles to learn the identity of the child-like spirit that's stalking her.

programme.title: My Haunted House: Paralyzed and The Baby Thief
programme.desc: A man suffering from sleep paralysis captures evidence that something is entering his room. A pregnant woman fears something is trying to harm her unborn child.

programme.title: My Haunted House: The Innkeeper and Quarantine
programme.desc: A boy tells his babysitter that a man called "The Keeper" visits his room in the night. A recovering addict realizes the visions he's seeing at a remote cabin are not hallucinations.

programme.title: My Ghost Story: A Haunted House
programme.desc: A man and his girlfriend dream of owning their own "haunted attraction," but end up owning an actual haunted house; and the ghostly voice of a passenger who died in a plane crash is heard in a chilling recording.

programme.title: My Ghost Story: The Demon in the Mist
programme.desc: A phantom breaches security at a South Carolina government building. A pipe-smoking ghost haunts a lighthouse. A son killed in a car accident makes his presence known to his grieving mother. A demon attacks guests at a Texas house.

programme.title: My Ghost Story: The Hand of Death
programme.desc: A cemetery that's home to 80,000 dead souls becomes a "ghost magnet"; a family discovers that their new home is filled with the sounds of strange footsteps and whispered conversations; and more.

programme.title: Mutant X: The Assault
programme.desc: Mange av mysteriene rundt Mutant X blir avslørt når Lexa og Jesse blir fanget av Dominion, og teamet, sammen med Adam, går inn for å redde dem.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Fountain of Youth
programme.desc: Mens Nigel øver sin hovedtale på et hotellrom i Sevilla, knekker en jente nesten nesen og krever noe - det viser seg at hun var ute etter vannet fra Fountain of Youth.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Arthur's Cross
programme.desc: Scotland Yard kaller Sidney og Nigel for å identifisere et drapsvåpen fra 500-tallet. Det viser seg å være gravkorset til King Arthur, men i tillegg til offeret leter flere andre etter det.

programme.title: Andromeda: Under natten
programme.desc: Etter å ha blitt igjen strandet i nærheten av et svart hull, blir kaptein Dylan Hunt oppdaget av et leiesoldat bergingsskip og finner at han har vært frossen i tide i 300 år.

programme.title: Andromeda: En bekreftende flamme
programme.desc: Dylan beskytter Andromeda mot leiesoldater mens Beka begynner å lure på om de kjemper for feil side.

programme.title: CBS News 24/7 Mornings
programme.desc: Få med deg de seneste nyhetene fra CBS direkte her med omfattende nyhetsreportasjer døgnet rundt fra hele verden.

programme.title: CBS News 24/7
programme.desc: Coverage, reporting and storytelling from CBS News and Stations; a look at how news coverage comes together.

programme.title: CBS News 24/7
programme.desc: Coverage, reporting and storytelling from CBS News and Stations; a look at how news coverage comes together.

programme.title: CBS News 24/7
programme.desc: Coverage, reporting and storytelling from CBS News and Stations; a look at how news coverage comes together.

programme.title: On the Case: The East Area Rapist
programme.desc: A sexual sadist known as the East Area Rapist terrorizes California and its law enforcement officers for decades.

programme.title: On the Case: A Hidden Clue
programme.desc: A hidden clue may hold the key to solving the vicious murder of a young woman.

programme.title: On the Case: Eyes of a Killer
programme.desc: Eyewitnesses helplessly watch as a 19-year-old clerk is abducted from a Del Ray Beach convenience store.

programme.title: On the Case: Taken
programme.desc: In the span of 8 months, 3 young girls are kidnapped from their homes and murdered. When their killer strikes again a young girl's heroic actions solves the case.

programme.title: On the Case: A Deadly Omen
programme.desc: Paula takes a look at the disturbing disappearance case of a teenager who vanished without a trace from a cinema car park.

programme.title: On the Case: Path of Destruction
programme.desc: When a 14 year old girl is murdered detectives must solve several terrifying crimes before they can bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Suspension
programme.desc: A furious Joe fights against a federal suspension that will prevent him from carrying passengers for the first time in 20 years. It's also a setback for Jeremy and the other rampies, which takes a turn for the worse with an unexpected injury.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Cause for Celebration
programme.desc: AJ and Candace get married in the Ice Castle. A frustrated Chuck tries to get the Electra to pay her way. A flummoxed Mikey tries to bake a cake for Joe's birthday.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Transatlantic Crossing
programme.desc: The Turkey crew makes the critical jump over the North Atlantic. But en route to Portugal, one crew is forced to turn back.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Thin Ice
programme.desc: C-46 and DC-4 crews race against the spring melt to fly mining equipment to an airstrip on a frozen lake. Jeremy tries to catch up to fellow rampies Audrey and Wilf.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: The Crash
programme.desc: After thousands of hours of painstaking preparation and dangerous flying, a terrible accident devastates the waterbomber crew in Turkey - and everyone at Buffalo.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Change of Seasons
programme.desc: When her husband quits after a blowout with Joe, Kelly is put in a terrible position. Will she stay at Buffalo - or will she go? Scott gets the news he must stand down from flying so another co-pilot can fast-track to captain.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: "Ted Lasso" actor Jason Sudeikis joins Drew. Plus, comedians Sherri Shepherd and Kym Whitley on their podcast "Two Funny Mamas". Then, Drew sends viewers into the weekend with a curated list of her favorite picks in "The Weekender."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Gloria Estefan, Emily Estefan, Lili Estefan, Luvvie Ajayi Jones in #ShareTheMicwithLuvvie.
programme.desc: Drew interviews Gloria Estefan, her daughter Emily and niece Lili Estefan. Drew also joins Luvvie Ajayi Jones to shine the spotlight on one of the special women in #ShareTheMicwithLuvvie.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Sharon Stone, Chef Carla Hall, Beauty Routines with Allure Magazine’s Editor In Chief
programme.desc: "Ratched" star Sharon Stone joins Drew. Plus, "Halloween Baking Championship" Host and Judge Carla Hall shares one of her favorite foods with Drew. Drew discusses her morning and evening routine with Allure Magazine’s Editor in Chief Michelle Lee.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Henry Winkler on his latest children’s book, "Lights, Camera, Danger!" "Superstore" star Nico Santos joins Drew. Drew shines a spotlight on 18-year-old hero Justin Galvin." Plus, Drew celebrates Hispanic Heritage Month cooking with Aaron Sanchez.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Hoda Kotb, America’s Most Haunted House, The Weekender
programme.desc: "Today" Co-Anchor Hoda Kotb joins Drew to discuss her new book. Drew goes inside one of America’s most Haunted Houses with the help of a medium. Then, Drew gives a curated list of her favorites in "The Weekender."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: “Drew’s D-Cluttering” Show, Marie Kondo, Rachael Ray
programme.desc: It’s “Drew’s D-Cluttering” show! Drew is joined by tidying expert Marie Kondo who shares her tips for sparking joy. Then, Rachael Ray shares kitchen staples for a clutter-less kitchen. Plus, Drew surprises one single mom with a home office makeover.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Devil's Island
programme.desc: A report on the disappearance and death of Yvonne Baldelli, a California woman who moved to Panama with her boyfriend Brian Brimager, an ex-Marine , who turned out not to be as perfect to her as he seemed.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Cal Harris: The Final Verdict
programme.desc: A wealthy businessman gets a final verdict after facing multiple trials for the murder of his wife.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Country Club Murders
programme.desc: A report on professional poker player Ernie Scherer III, the chief suspect in the 2008 murders of his parents, Charlene and Ernest, in their Castlewood Country Club home in Pleasanton, California.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Don't Scream
programme.desc: An investigation on Tiffany Mead of Davis County, Utah, a young mother who called 911 claiming she had sliced her own throat while her ex-husband and child watched.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Fight for Melissa
programme.desc: Melissa Calusinski, is a young woman who claims she did not murder 16-month-old Ben Kingan in 2009, while working at a day care center in Lake County, Illinois, despite having confessed to the crime.

programme.title: Cops: Wardrobe Clash
programme.desc: A homeless man hides from deputies in the closet of an empty house. Deputies arrive to a domestic disturbance to find two brothers fighting over a pair of sandals.

programme.title: Cops: Two Too Many
programme.desc: A man fights with his wife over a haircut, then leads police on a car chase. A woman gets violent with her boyfriend and then calls the police on him.

programme.title: Cops: Finding Fido
programme.desc: A drunk man threatens both firefighters and the police. Police are called over a dispute regarding an alleged missing dog. A man is found pinned under his drunk friend's car.

programme.title: Cops: Poolwatch
programme.desc: Deputies taser a man who almost ran over a deputy with his truck. A man gives police false information after saving a boy who fell into a pool. A woman tries to buy drugs from an undercover officer.

programme.title: Cops: Gimme a Break
programme.desc: Officers pursue two brothers after an attempted bank robbery. A confused man with a shotgun calls police after hearing voices. Deputies find illegal items in the back of a man's truck.

programme.title: Cops: Table for Two
programme.desc: Police respond to an emergency call and find a man in dire trouble. Deputies respond to an abusive husband at a local eatery. Two women try to buy narcotics from an undercover deputy during a sting.

programme.title: Cops: Candlelight Burglar
programme.desc: Deputies respond to a fight between a daughter's boyfriend and her mother. A woman lights candles after an attempted break-in. Police respond when an evicted tenant tries to reenter his old apartment.

programme.title: Cops: The Car is Mine!
programme.desc: A man locks himself in a trunk after deputies respond to a restraining order call. Deputies respond to two women arguing over the ownership of a car.

programme.title: Cops: Bike for Sale
programme.desc: A deputy pursues a man who fled from a traffic stop. A deputy chases a suspicious man leaving an apartment complex. Two men claim they are trying sell a bike during a traffic stop.

programme.title: Cops: She Needed a Nap
programme.desc: Deputies pursue a man involved in a carjacking. Deputies are called to an altercation between a father and son. Officers respond to an unresponsive woman lying in a roadway.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Jean-Raymond Blatti Case
programme.desc: Arriving at her work, the secretary of a small firm in the suburbs of Geneva finds the body of Jean-Raymond Blatti, the company's new accountant. The man is lying in a pool of blood and, on his belly, the murderer has written \"DIRTY RAPIST\".

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: A Very Strange Suicide (Muller case)
programme.desc: Police in Strasbourg receive a startling emergency call from Doctor Jean-Louis Muller, a forensic pathologist well known in the region.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Christophe Lejard Case
programme.desc: The lifeless body of Christophe Lejard is found by his son just metres from their home. The man was shot in the head as he was getting into his car to go to work. An execution, which at first glance doesn't square with the profile of a quiet family man.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Deathly Fatal Passion At the Hotel (Villermet case)
programme.desc: The body of Nathalie Villermet, 46, manager of a small hotel and -restaurant, is found by a walker in the woods outside Paris, hidden under branches.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 503
programme.desc: I 2007 kommer en mann og hans mor inn på politistasjonen i Bergen for å underrette om at hans kone, Dung Tran Larsen, har vært savnet i en uke. Hva skjedde egentlig med Dung?

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 303
programme.desc: Tidlig på 90-tallet rystes den norske befolkningen av flere kirkebranner. I 1993 blir Øystein Aarseth funnet død i en trappeoppgang i Oslo. Politiet retter søkelyset mot enkelte personer i black-metal-miljøet. En av disse er Varg Vikernes.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 401
programme.desc: I mai 1995 blir 17 år gamle Birgitte Tengs funnet drept bare noen få hundre meter unna sitt hjem i Kopervik på Karmøy. Saken fører til omfattende etterforskning, og Birgittes fetter havner raskt i søkelyset.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 703
programme.desc: 18 år gamle Ndella Jack har nettopp kommet hjem fra bryllupsreise med mannen sin. Det som skulle være starten på deres liv sammen, får i stedet en brå slutt, da de blir ofre for et brutalt angrep.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 606
programme.desc: Den siste gangen Fatima Berggren ble sett i live var på hennes 57-årsdag i mai 2017. Saken blir først betraktet som en kidnapping, men uten livstegn fra Fatima, anser politiet det snart som en drapssak.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 602
programme.desc: En regnfull morgen den 19. oktober 2004 dreper en ukjent mann en åtte år gammel gutt og en 56 år gammel kvinne i Linköping. Gjerningsmannen forsvinner sporløst og politiet må nå finne ut hvem han er.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Dead Woman's Shoes
programme.desc: Shy Maddie finds a pair of shoes and after trying them on is possessed by the vengeful spirit of a rich murdered woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Shadow Man/The Uncle Devil Show/Opening Day
programme.desc: Boy finds solace in deal with Shadow Man/Video tricks bewilder parents/Lovers plot in Twilight Zone, facing ironic twist.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Mirror Image
programme.desc: Millicent Barnes sees her double at a bus terminal.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Monsters are Due on Maple Street
programme.desc: Paranoia strikes the residents of Maple Street when they believe human-looking aliens have invaded the neighborhood.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A World of Difference
programme.desc: Businessman Arthur Curtis discovers that life as he knows it doesn't really exist.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Long Live Walter Jameson
programme.desc: Walter Jameson is an excellent history teacher who talks about the past as if he had lived it.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Beacon/One Life, Furnished in Early Poverty
programme.desc: Physician stranded in wary village/Gus Rosenthal revisits past, meets younger self. Guiding him, Gus realizes mistakes.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Joseph Gordon-Levitt Gets Cocky While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Joseph Gordon-Levitt is answering questions about the power of YouTube while facing the wings of death.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Elijah Wood Tastes the Lava of Mount Doom While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Elijah Wood is the star of one of the highest-grossing franchises of all time, "The Lord of the Rings."

programme.title: Hot Ones: Terry Crews Hallucinates While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Terry Crews enters the "Hot Ones" terror dome and goes beast mode on the wings of death.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Daniel Radcliffe Catches a Head Rush While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Daniel Radcliffe is known the world over for his role as Harry Potter in the eight-film franchise.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Steve-O Takes It Too Far While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Steve-O is a comedian, author, daredevil and YouTuber.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Nick Kroll Delivers a PSA While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Kroll goes wing for wing with Sean, tackling everything from "The League" stories to Aziz Ansari dining tips.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Weird Al Yankovic Goes Beyond Insanity While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: "Weird Al" Yankovic is the king of parody songs, with a career that includes four Grammys.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Wiz Khalifa Gets Smoked Out By Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Wiz Khalifa is a platinum-selling rapper with a new album, "Rolling Papers II," out now.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Big Sean Goes On a Spiritual Journey While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Big Sean is a five-time Grammy-nominated rapper and prolific hit-maker.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Brad Paisley and his crew of truckers on the road between Little Rock and Tulsa; the Ford F-150 tackles a devilish test course; the world's most nimble tow truck extracts a car from the tightest parking spot imaginable; Mack truck fanatic.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: In 1941, penicillin was first used to save human life; now, bacteria has emerged resistant to every known antibiotic and scientists have begun to fear that the era of the wonder drugs is near to its end.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The 1969 flight of Apollo 11, which landed two American astronauts on the Moon, as seen through the eyes of the astronauts, mission controllers, engineers, and designers who made it happen.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Blade implements have been a part of civilized man's arsenal since the Paleolithic Age, when sharp tools were chipped off of flint or obsidian; but with the discovery of metallurgy, people were able to forge stronger, more versatile blade implements.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Color TV; satellite broadcasting; transistor radios; the Ford Mustang.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The 1980s transitioned from Industrial to Information Age with brick cell phones, Pac-Man, Rubik's Cube, Sony Walkman, and CDs; microchips revolutionized work, play, and communication through Silicon Valley innovations including Apple computers.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: Japan attacks the USA on 7 Dec 1941. For the next 6 months, they continue to have successful attacks.

programme.title: WWII's The Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails: Italy: The Sulmona Trail
programme.desc: Monty follows the route taken by prisoner of war Len Harley, who spent months on the run before braving snow, ice, and Nazi patrols to escape over the mountains of the Majella in Italy.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Turning the Tide
programme.desc: Allies turn the tide in the Atlantic, where initially German U-Boats harass freely convoys to supply Britain. The route to bring American soldiers who will land on D-Day is clear.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: Hitler's Inside Man
programme.desc: Chaim Rumkowski, leader of the Lodz ghetto during WWII, believed cooperation with the Nazis could save lives, providing labor in exchange for food. This approach kept some semblance of community and culture alive amidst unimaginable horror.

programme.title: Secret War: The Special Interrogation Group
programme.desc: The SIG consisted of German speaking Jewish volunteers from Palestine. They had a highly dangerous job: which was to pose as Germans behind enemy lines and extract intelligence and do acts of sabotage. Few had a long-life expectancy.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: iCarly: Pie
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Spencer tar med Freddie til deres yndlingskonditori, finner de ut at eieren er død. Men enda verre er det at oppskriftene hans kanskje er gått tapt for alltid.

programme.title: iCarly: Jul
programme.desc: I et forsøk på å pifte opp julen med et utradisjonelt tre, kommer Spencer til å sette fyr på alle Carlys gaver. Fortvilet ønsker hun seg at hun hadde en normal bror.

programme.title: iCarly: Kysset
programme.desc: Sam overhører Freddie fortelle Carly at han aldri har kysset en jente, og avslører hemmeligheten hans på netshowet. Gibby og Carly trener Spencer til utttaket for det lokale, profesjonelle fotballaget.

programme.title: iCarly: Bilbråk
programme.desc: Gjengen holder en konkurranse på iCarly, og premien er en ny bil fra en lokal forhandler. Etter at Nevel vinner, oppdager barna at forhandleren ikke visste noe om konkurransen eller bilen de skulle ha donert bort som premie.

programme.title: iCarly: Fred
programme.desc: Freddie sier offentlig at han ikke er fan av internettsensasjonen Fred, noe som får Fred til å meddele at han skal slutte å legge ut filmer for alltid. Fansen blir rasende fordi Freddie har forårsaket slutten på de populære filmene.

programme.title: iCarly: Dobbelt opp
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Freddie sniker seg ut for å dra til en MMA-kamp, får de sine dobbeltgjengere til å lure Spencer til å tro at de fortsatt er hjemme. Imens bygger Spencer en kjempeversjon av Newton Balls.

programme.title: iCarly: Om hva for noe?
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Freddie oppfordrer iCarly-fans til å stemme på David Archuleta i "Amerika Sings", syns de synd på nummer to og hjelper ham med å lage en musikkvideo.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg skal gjøre Sam jentete
programme.desc: Da Sam innrømmer at hun liker en gutt på skolen, lærer Carly henne hvordan hun kan lokke ham til seg ved å oppføre seg mere feminint. Spencer er overbevist om at en jente liker ham pga. smokingen hans, så han går med den hele tiden.

programme.title: iCarly: A date en pøbel del 1
programme.desc: Når Carly dater er en tøffing, prøver hun å holde forholdet skjult for Spencer. Og Sam betaler Freddie for å lage en hjemmeside der hun kan legge ut alle sine ekle videofavoritter.

programme.title: iCarly: Gjenforening med Missy
programme.desc: Da Carlys gamle venninne Missy flytter tilbake til Seattle, tror Sam at Missy prøver å skifte henne ut som Carlys bestevenninne.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg må ha skap 239
programme.desc: Når Sam og Freddie begge to vinner konkurransen for skolens beste skap, slir de nødt til å dele skap. Carly ber Spencer gi henne timer i billedkunst.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Second Time Around
programme.desc: Sam reagerer når Frasier vil gifte seg med den første jenta han dater etter Lilith.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Peterson Principle
programme.desc: Norm får et tips på jobben som kan garantere forfremmelse overfor konkurrentene.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Dark Imaginings
programme.desc: Sam kan ikke godta det faktum at han blir eldre.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Save The Last Dance For Me
programme.desc: Carla deltar i en dansekonkurranse med sin eksmann, Nick.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Fear Is My Co-Pilot
programme.desc: Sam og Diane avslører sine sanne følelser for hverandre mens de er døden nær.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Diane Chambers Day
programme.desc: Frasier planlegger en fest for Diane, men hun tror det var Sams idé.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Relief Bartender
programme.desc: Woody får mindreverdighetskompleks når en underholdende bartender overskygger ham.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Strange Bedfellows: Part 1
programme.desc: Sam uttrykker interesse for politikk når han faller for en kvinne som stiller til valg i bystyret.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Strange Bedfellows: Part 2
programme.desc: Diane slutter når hun finner ut at kjæresten til Sam vil ha henne sparket.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Strange Bedfellows: Part 3
programme.desc: Diane prøver å gjøre Sams liv problematisk etter at han sendte henne på dør.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Manners Suck / Pipe Of Doom
programme.desc: Mr. Van Driessen gives his class a lesson in manners that no one will ever forget. He punches out the etiquette teacher. / Butt-head gets stuck in a construction site pipe, a la Baby Jessica.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Nyren / Den gode handling
programme.desc: Middelaldrende Beavis ødelegger nyren og en donor fra hans fortid redder dagen./ Beavis og Butt-Head utfører sin første gode gjerning ved å ha DDT i bowlen på skoledansen.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Shortcuts / Late Night with Butt-Head / Butt, Butt Hike!
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head miss the schoolbus home / The duo makes a Late Night Show / Beavis and Butt-Head are invited to play football

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Tak / Elv
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head blir sittende fast på taket av Tom Andersons hus./ Beavis og Butt-Head seiler på dekk i en elv og ender opp på sjøen.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: The Crush / Young, Gifted & Crude
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head want to hang with a "really cool' bunch of delinquents. / Beavis & Butt-head spend some time with the school's gifted class. Not much time.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Choke / Career day
programme.desc: Eating chicken can be hazardous / Later they go out on work experience as security guards

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Work is Death (aka Burger World) / Werewolves of Highland / Tech Support
programme.desc: After the Manager explains that Workers Compensation pays you for getting injured on the job, Butt-head sets out to injure Beavis / A Vampire craze hits the high school / Beavis and Butt-Head misinterpret what it means to ask a man for his daughter's hand

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Killing Time / Dude, a Reward
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head's worst fears are realized when they have to kill two hours, until something good comes on TV. / Images of Beavis and Butt-head grace the walls of a photo gallery after they find a lost camera and put it to creative use.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Teen Talk / vs.the Vending Machine
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head join Captain Dick Jackman on his Sunday morning program, "rapping" about their problems. / The vending machine wins.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Fluktrommet/Den viktige
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head prøver å løse Fluktromgåten, bare for å bli fanget på badet. / Beavis møter sin største helt - Ild.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Tick-Tock Hilda’s Clock
programme.desc: When Sabrina throws Hilda a surprise party for her 650th birthday, Hilda becomes depressed that she doesn’t have a husband or family yet. Things go from bad to worse when Sabrina loses the out-of-whack biological clock.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina’s New Roommate
programme.desc: When Sabrina reluctantly takes in Zelda for a few days while Hilda’s on a home remodeling binge, Sabrina and her roommates try to loosen up her uptight Aunt Zelda.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Making the Grade
programme.desc: Sabrina tries to right a wrong when she writes an article for the school paper exposing the preferential treatment given to school athletes, but she inadvertently puts Roxie's scholarship in jeopardy.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Love is a Many Complicated Thing
programme.desc: Sabrina agrees to a double date on Valentine's Day with Josh and Morgan, but by the end of the date she finds herself in the middle of her friends' break up.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina the Muse
programme.desc: Sabrina is flattered when her new boyfriend writes music about his feelings for her, but the pressure to inspire him as his muse becomes a one-sided relationship.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Beach Blanket Bizarro
programme.desc: Sabrina’s wild visions of her first college spring break turn squeaky-clean when her aunts ask 60’s teen idol Frankie Avalon to put a spell on the trip. This sends Sabrina and her friends into a world straight out of a 60’s beach movie.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Witchright Hall
programme.desc: When Sabrina’s trouble-making teenage cousin Amanda is sent to live with Hilda and Zelda, they count on Sabrina to convince the headmaster and school director of Witchright Hall to accept Amanda.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina the Activist
programme.desc: Sabrina, who is now in low spirits over her heavy course load and recent break up, decides to put her energy into something positive: leading a protest to save an historical building from demolition.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Do You See What I See?
programme.desc: Sabrina feels responsible when Miles considers giving up his paranormal research to settle in his father’s accounting business after no one believes the otherworldly phenomena he sees at the Spellman home.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina’s Got Spirit
programme.desc: Sabrina tries to throw off Miles and the specialist he has hired to uncover paranormal activity in the house, but Sabrina herself discovers a ghost in the ceiling.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Oh Donna
programme.desc: Alex befriends Donna, a young, unwed expectant mother from Elyse's natural-childbirth class.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Philadelphia Story
programme.desc: Alex falls asleep while working on a college term paper on Thomas Jefferson and dreams that his family and friends are living 200 years ago.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Birth Of A Keaton, Part One
programme.desc: To help Steven during pledge week at the television station, the Keatons reluctantly agree to be part of the entertainment. The audience gets an unexpected show when Elyse goes into labor right on camera while in the middle of a song.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Birth of a Keaton, Part 2
programme.desc: A snowstorm prevents Elyse from getting to the hospital in time to deliver her baby.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Cry Baby
programme.desc: Jennifer is jealous of the attention paid to Andrew.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Don't Know Much About History...
programme.desc: Alex and his good friend James go into business together as tutors for their fellow students at Leland.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Cold Storage
programme.desc: With the rest of the Keaton family away for the weekend, Mallory is excited about having the house to herself until she is accidentally locked in the basement with the person she'd least like to be with--her adoring neighbor, Skippy.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Bringing Up Baby
programme.desc: With Elyse back at work, Steven is frustrated when her schedule and the baby's schedule aren't allowing them any free time together.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Remembrance of Things Past: Part 1
programme.desc: Steven takes a nostalgic trip to his hometown following the death of his father. With the support of Elyse and the children, he tries to prepare his mother for her new life (Part 1 of 2)

programme.title: Key & Peele: A Cappella Club
programme.desc: En PSA jobber med barnesoldater i Afrika, en college-a-cappella-gruppe får et nytt medlem, Meegan og André går på sin første date, en terrorgruppe har en matbil og to gamle menn diskuterer popmusikk.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Cunnilingus Class
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer at Mr. T lærer oss livsleksjoner, Wendell har bruk for en ny seng og en fornærmelse som går over streken.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Slap-Ass
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer at kara har en dårlig Skype-forbindelse, en Django Unchained-slavekamp og en baseballspiller som klasker for mange rumper.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Das Negroes
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan prøver å gjemme seg for en negerjaktende nazist. Andre sketsjer inkluderer to slaver som sliter med å bli solgt, et par kriminelle som kommer i knipe før et stort kupp.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Meagan's Fight
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer at Meagan vender tilbake, Jordan prøver å se kul ut på en strippeklubb og opptrer med et funk-show.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Aerobics Meltdown
programme.desc: Stan Lee har noen nye superhelter, og en gatesmart fyr mister sin street cred når han opplever en hjernefrysning. Og sist, men ikke minst, utvikler en mann en komplisert minnesanordning for å huske hvor han har parkert.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Obama College Years
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan befinner seg plutselig i en gjenoppføring av Borgerkrigen, Jesus møter en farlig hallik, og vi får en god titt på president Barack Obama de første årene på college.

programme.title: Key & Peele: MMMMMM
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan opptrer foran et oppstemt publikum, en trafikkreporter blir utsatt for turbulens i et helikopter og halvdelen av en R&B duo avslører sine sanne følelser for sin partner under en opptreden.

programme.title: Key & Peele: The Power of Wings
programme.desc: Inkluderer sketsjer der Keegan og Jordan avlytter hvite kvinner som elsker svarte menn, Wendell lager en musikkvideo og Kareem og Jahar går på treningssenteret.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Soul Food
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan diskuterer hvem som er mest svart, og å være den eneste svarte på en fest. Sketsjer inkluderer Tea Party som oppdager et nytt håp, hærens ververe som tenker annerledes, og Bobby McFerrin som duellerer mot Michael Winslow.

programme.title: Key & Peele: The 420 Special
programme.desc: Neil deGrasse Tyson slapper av hjemme, Keegan må bevare fatningen under et jobbintervju, en skredder får en klient med luft i magen, parkeringsvaktene diskuterer 'Game of Thrones' og en telefonselger prøver en ny strategi.

programme.title: Broad City: Friendiversary
programme.desc: Jentenes 'Friendiversary' utvikler seg i en farlig retning når de blir vitne til noe forferdelig.

programme.title: Broad City: Stories
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana farer fra toppen av Manhattan til bunnen for å feire Abbis 30-årsdag, og treffer på både gamle og nye venner på veien.

programme.title: Broad City: Shework and S**t Bucket
programme.desc: Ilana gir seg i kast med sin seneste mulighet til å tjene penger da hun en åpner et utendørs kontorlandskap for New Yorks røykere; Abbi konfronterer husverten sin da han nekter å modernisere sanitæranlegget hennes.

programme.title: Broad City: Bitcoin & the Missing Girl
programme.desc: Ilana besøker en gammel flamme for å få sin del av en Bitcoin-formue; Abbi glemmer klesvasken sin for første gang, og mister favorittgenseren sin.

programme.title: Broad City: Make the Space
programme.desc: Ilana oppdager en skremmende hemmelighet om Jaimé; Abbi prøver å avansere fra genserbretter til vinduskunstner på Anthropologie.

programme.title: Broad City: Artsy Fartsy
programme.desc: Abbi inviteres til et fancy kunstarrangement på MoMA; Ilana og Lincoln analyserer det første året de har vært sammen.

programme.title: Broad City: Lost and Found
programme.desc: Jentene møter Ilanas femtenmenning, som overlevde Holocaust, og tar ham med på en kjedelig brunch; Abbi prøver en ny look.

programme.title: Broad City: Shenanigans
programme.desc: Ilana rekrutteres som hårmodell; Abbis nye flamme forteller henne at hun ikke er moden nok.

programme.title: Broad City: Sleep No More
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana besøker 'Sleep No More', og Abbi prøver å finne rett tidspunkt for å fortelle Ilana noe som vil forandre livet hennes radikalt.

programme.title: Broad City: Along Came Molly
programme.desc: Abbi, Ilana og Bevers selger Abbis eiendeler i New York; Abbi får billetter til en Lil Wayne-konsert, og jentene tar en 'tripp'.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Dangle's Murder Mystery, Pt. 2
programme.desc: Who murdered Debbie Dangle, and how does her death tie into the deputies' sordid past?

programme.title: RENO 911!: We Don't Want the Pope
programme.desc: The deputies provide the pope's advance scouting team with an extensive tour of Reno's seedy side.

programme.title: RENO 911!: VHS Transfer Memory Lane
programme.desc: Rizzo and Wiegel pervert-proof the Washoe County Library computers.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Helping Mayor Hernandez
programme.desc: When Mayor Hernandez calls for help, the Sheriff's Department leaps into action, even if he just needs to get rid of a violent prostitute in his hotel room.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Getaway Trailer
programme.desc: Wiegel and Rizzo get to know each other better while trapped in a fleeing criminal's mobile home.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Stoner Jesus
programme.desc: A drug-addled touring company of "Jesus Christ Superstar" causes trouble in Reno.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Deputy Dance
programme.desc: Levon French, the king of Reno commercials, helps the deputies make a new recruiting ad.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Viacom Grinch
programme.desc: Declan and Junior crack down on knockoff Nickelodeon toys, ruining kids' parties across Reno.

programme.title: RENO 911!: The Midnight Swingers
programme.desc: Jones and Williams penetrate the inner circle of Reno's swingers club.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Secret Santa
programme.desc: What were those strange lights in the desert? Who are these new Reno Sheriff's Department deputies?

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Real Movies & Wu-Tang Financial
programme.desc: Dave takes a realistic look at "Pretty Woman" and "The Matrix" and introduces the Wu-Tang Clan's new financial consulting firm.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Tyrone Biggums's Intervention & Racist Hollywood Animals
programme.desc: Tyrone mistakes an intervention for a crack sale, and "Frontline" covers racist animals.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Blackzilla & Playa Haters' Ball
programme.desc: Dave takes Japan by storm in the sci-fi adventure "Blackzilla," and America Undercover presents The Playa Haters' Ball.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Piss on You & The World's Greatest Wars
programme.desc: Dave presents the History Channel coverage of great inner-city gang wars from the 1980s.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Make-A-Wish & Fisticuff
programme.desc: Dave sees people's inner thoughts and freaks out when a little kid beats him at video games.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: O'Dweeds & Trading Spouses
programme.desc: Dave shows what happens when couples try "Trading Spouses" and introduces a family-friendly brand of pot; musical guest Black Star.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Samuel Jackson Beer & Racial Draft
programme.desc: Dave debuts Samuel Jackson beer and reveals major upsets in "The Racial Draft."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Negrodamus & The Niggar Family
programme.desc: Paul Mooney introduces Negrodamus, and Dave imagines a black Gallagher.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: White People Can't Dance & The Three Daves
programme.desc: Dave challenges the myth that white people can't dance.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: The Love Contract & True Hollywood Stories: Rick James
programme.desc: Rick James is one of the baddest mothaf**kers of all time.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: True Hollywood Stories: Prince & Red Balls Energy Drink
programme.desc: Negrodamus answers questions, and Charlie Murphy plays basketball with Prince.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 624
programme.desc: Daniel undersøker hvordan det har gått med tidligere nettgjenoppreisninger, utforsker menneskekroppens mange hull og forteller om en ny måte å ødelegge sin økonomi på.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 625
programme.desc: Daniel gir en rødtopp som har fått bank av Moder Jord nettgjenoppreisning, redder USAs ungdom fra fordømmelse og får skremmende tweets fra sine fans, akkurat i tide til Halloween.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 626
programme.desc: Daniel forteller "kysseteorien" til et par intim-coacher, gir oss råd før neste gang vi skal knulle skitne ludder og prøver å stoppe respektløse kommentarer til kvinner.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 627
programme.desc: Et homsepar som blir nektet adgang til en homofobisk restaurant får gjenoppreisning, en Tosh.0-kopi blir avslørt, og Daniel lærer den ekte betydningen av ironi.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 628
programme.desc: Daniel finner fram sin indre programleder, finner på en musikal og avslører en regjeringshemmelighet som kan få globale følger.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 629
programme.desc: I denne juleepisoden finner Daniel ut av hvem som skjøt den svarte julenissen, viser sin verste "jeg er bedre enn deg, bæsj i trynet ditt" og avslører en gammel familieoppskrift.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 630
programme.desc: Daniel ser tilbake på alle de øyeblikkene som gjorde 2014 så forferdelig, ser inn i fremtiden med Doug Stanhope og kommer uanmeldt på en luguber forlovelsesfest.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Puke Drummer
programme.desc: I sesongpremieren av "Tosh.0" setter Daniel noen av årets mest hyllede film på plass, og han erklærer krig mot Super Bowl-vinnerne.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Buckcherry Wedding
programme.desc: En kvinne blir en giftig brud, Daniel introduserer S/M på arbeidsplassen og Arizona State University viser distraherende oppførsel.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Monster Energy
programme.desc: En gudfryktig kvinne fører en kampanje mot energidrikker, og Daniel avslører hvordan seerne kan bli rike ved bruk av pcen.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline and Richard bicker over their shared work space, Caroline finds the perfect solution when she purchases an antique partner's desk from the desk's original owners, writing and life partners Vic Stansky and Stella Dawson.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Annie re-introduces Caroline to the wonderful world of dating, by taking her on a man-hunt, but when Caroline thinks she has met the perfect man, she later finds that he's no love connection.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Del surprises Caroline (Lea Thompson) with a marriage proposal, Richard (Malcolm Gets) feels he no longer fits into Caroline's life and decides it's time to look for another job.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Del (Eric Lutes) takes Caroline (Lea Thompson) on a spontaneous weekend trip, they unexpectedly run into Del’s bitter ex-wife Jill (guest star Joely Fisher) and her boyfriend Blair (guest star Kenny Johnson).

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline and Annie discover that a John Landis movie is shooting in their neighborhood, they jump at the chance to become extras, but Annie’s excitement turns to sheer bliss when she learns that her dream man is starring in the film.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) helps Richard (Malcolm Gets) confront unresolved issues with his jet-setting mother, Natalie (Elizabeth Ashley, “Evening Shade”), when she makes a surprise visit to New York.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline (Lea Thompson) entrusts Annie(Amy Pietz) with various maid-of-honor duties, she learns that Annie’s strong suits aren’t dependability and punctuality and their frien2dship strains under the stress of preparing for Caroline’s wedding.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline is confused by nervous pangs and Del experiences panic attacks. Meanwhile, Richard decides to confess his love to Caroline as a last-ditch effort to stop her from marrying Del.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline decides that if she and Del resume dating they should abstain from lovemaking for a fortnight and instead focus on what’s at the core of their relationship.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline is thrilled when romantic sparks fly between her and the emergency room veterinarian who treats Salty for a minor injury.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Lecherous Louie, the dispatcher, becomes a lovesick pup after his girlfriend finds another guy. He will stop at nothing to get her back, including recruiting Alex for his hilarious scheme—and the riotous shenanigans at the Sunshine Cab Co. never stop.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a riotous family reunion when Jim returns home to face his millionaire dad for the first time since he dropped out of society in the ‘60s, and Alex has his hands full with Jim’s voluptuous, overly amorous sister,

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The Taxi gang falls prey to hilarious fear for homeless Elaine’s romantic well-being when chivalrous Bobby allows her to live in his apartment while he is gone. Unexpectedly, he returns before she has found other quarters

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Hilarious sparks fly when Tony tries to fix up his divorced sister with Alex. Instead, she ends up falling for Reverend Jim and Tony goes outrageously overboard trying to break up the affair.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Lecherous Louie the dispatcher has the dubious honor of being selected by his employer’s revenge-seeking wife to be her clandestine lover, and comedic panic grips the love lair when the boss shows up unexpectedly.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Wild and crazy theatrics erupt when Tony decides to become an actor and Bobby, as his skeptical agent, is aghast when Tony lands a role because he is the right type.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby’s vicious letter to a hated critic is salvaged from the wastebasket and sent to the newspaper by a gleeful Louie, setting the stage for a wild and comical night when the critic, and the cabbies, decide to take in Bobby’s one-man play.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Latka Gravas is rejected by a young beauty, he sets out on an uproarious crash course to learn to be a swinging American Bachelor, a turnabout that works fantastically with the girls but turns off all of his friends at the garage.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Jim turns into a soothsayer when he warns of a bizarre catastrophe to befall Alex that also involves an affair with a beautiful blonde.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John sits on his fire escape, smoking a cigar, the smoke from which is wafting into Chris's open window directly above.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: As John and Jake chat about Chris at the diner, Bob rushes in and announces that he just saw Chris naked when he went to fix her faucet.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker has a videotape of a French film that he plans to use to lure Chris into coming over to his place.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker tries to discourage a friend from expressing interest in Chris by telling him that she is gay.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the diner, Chris is in the kitchen when a robber enters.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the office, Margaret reveals to Linda that it's her ten-year anniversary of working for Dr. Becker.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the diner, John expresses his repulsion for all the Christmas decorations.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker is upset when a patient substitutes his Christian Science faith for medical treatment.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: One of John's patients, a high school student named Brad, comes in for a physical and John learns that the guy's sexually active, but isn't practicing safe sex. John performs an HIV test on Brad and tries to convince him to begin practicing safe sex.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John's at the end of his rope with his hectic practice and makes a call, which Linda overhears, telling the person on the other end that he can't take another day.

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: Skolen er ikke for alle og eksamensstresset fører til eksplosiv stemning på festen. Pass på hva du sier bak andres rygg, for du vet aldri hvem som sitter på makten på Paradise Hotel.

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: To gjester får et oppdrag som får store konsekvenser for kveldens dramatiske parseremoni. Et mørke legger seg over hotellet. Hvem tør å sove på sitt eget rom?

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: Hotellet er åpnet og elleve gjester sjekker inn til sesongens første fest. Foran seg har de uker med hardt spill, sterke følelser, ville fester, kjærlighet, allianser og vanskelige valg.

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: Spillet er i gang! Gjesten på solo er gjenstand for spekulasjon og parene skal gjennom en tillitseremoni. Stoler de på hverandre, eller er det noen som blir fristet til å bytte partner?

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: Parenes troskap settes på prøve idet en ny deltager sjekker inn. På Solo kommer det inn et brev med et hemmelig oppdrag som snur opp-ned på hele hotellet.

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: Det er klart for sesongens første parseremoni. Spillet er i gang for fullt og slue planer legges. En mystisk gjest sjekker inn på Perla.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 903
programme.desc: Hanne kjøpte drømmeboligen som viste seg å være infisert av både rotter og skjeggkre. Etter sitt forrige bomkjøp håper hun at Hans Christian kan hjelpe. Og Christian skal kjøpe sin første leilighet.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 904
programme.desc: Positivitetsblogger Petter ønsker å bo nærmere sentrum, men klarer Karianne å finne den perfekte guttebula? Camilla og Jon Erik trenger mer plass og får hjelp av Hans Christian.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 905
programme.desc: Iselinn og Ron er helt uenige om hvor de vil bo. Klarer Karianne å løse en tilnærmet umulig oppgave? Gårdsguttene Kim og Ole Johnny er på jakt etter et idyllisk gårdsbruk med skog og egen strandlinje.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 906
programme.desc: Karianne får et viktig oppdrag med å hjelpe alenemamma Samia i hus før mammapermisjonen er over – men holder budsjettet? Hans Christian møter Johanna og Joakim som er på jakt etter drømmehagen.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 1001
programme.desc: Ingrid bor på leilighetshotell med sine to barn, og er desperat etter å få en ny start, og skape et hjem sammen med familien. Småbarnsforeldrene Toril og Eivind vil ut av leiligheten sin i Oslo-gryta.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 1002
programme.desc: Lise og Damien blir snart tobarnsforeldre og vil ut av bykjernen og ned på bakkeplan. Cecilia starter i ny jobb i Trondheim om to uker, men har ikke hatt tid til å gå på visninger.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 523
programme.desc: Det er serveringsdag på Camp Kulinaris. Restaurantsjefen tar en radikal beslutning som kan få store konsekvenser.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 726
programme.desc: Kjartan legger listen høyt under årets siste menysmaking. Leverer deltakerne godt nok, eller må de i tillegg lage “årets snack” under morgendagens servering?

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 506
programme.desc: Utfordringene står i kø når Kjartan kommer for å smake på ukas italienske meny. Restaurantsjef Sebastian sprer frykt og uro hos storfavoritten Henrik.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 206
programme.desc: Det er kun få timer til Kjartan kommer for å smake på alle rettene på ukens meny - men restaurantsjef Erlend lar Terje styre skuta.

programme.title: Jul med Camp Kulinaris: Episode 102
programme.desc: Mia Gundersen, Jenny Jenssen, Michael Andressen og Omer Bhatti gjester kjøkkenet til Kjartan. Vegansk julemat står på konkurranse-menyen.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 716
programme.desc: Nok en deltaker må forlate Camp kulinaris. Dagens kokkekamp står mellom to gode venner som begge ønsker å bli.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 1111
programme.desc: Iselin og Jørgen prøver seg på hinderløype til vanns. Onkel Erling og Stein Are har endelig kommet fram etter lastebilturen, men det tar ikke lang tid før et nytt problem dukker opp.

programme.title: Charterfeber
programme.desc: Per Sandberg ankommer og ender i karaoke-duett med Svein. Roger fortsetter jakten på CD-er, mens landkrabbene fra Harstad søker spenning i det våte element. Fred Åge havner i dartduell mot en brite.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 1123
programme.desc: Bibbi og Svein fortsetter daten sin, og får selskap av noen innpåslitne kameler. Jane og gjengen er på marked. Stein Are og onkel Erling imponerer på kjøkkenet med klassikeren Toro-ertesuppe.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 913
programme.desc: Hilde er fremdeles optimist på at hun skal tjene inn penger til basseng hjemme i Norge, og prøver seg denne gangen som massør på stranden.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 1101
programme.desc: I første episode treffer vi Aurora, som har med seg mamma Bibbi på tur. Stein Are fra Harstad-familien har tatt med seg onkel Erling på guttetur og vi blir kjent med Cathrin, og hennes lillebror Odin.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 1305
programme.desc: Haider tar gladelig på seg rollen som Baywatch-stjerne da familien trenger opplæring i livredning. Rockeren Geir vil gjengjelde Fred Åges godhet og har planlagt en dag full av gaver og overraskelser.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing
programme.desc: Midt på Ørskogfjellet I Sjøholt ligger en hytte som tidligere var eid av Røde Kors. Nå eies den av Runa som savner en gjennomgående stil på hytta. Stil skal hun få, og gutta har industrielle planer!

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 1107
programme.desc: Omkranset av skog og elv finner vi årets syvende hytte. Familien som eier hytta syns den er direkte upersonlig og ukoselig, og en slik utfordring tar Halvor på strak arm.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing
programme.desc: Sesongs siste episode byr på påskestemning i Setesdal. Her gjør gutta om på planløsningen for å få utnyttet plassen bedre, og det blir også tid til litt isfiske.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 101
programme.desc: Interiørdesigner Halvor Bakke drar på tur til Todalen, med de nevedyktige kameratene Mikkel, Gustav og Thomas, for å pusse opp en klassisk seter i idylliske Trollheimen.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 102
programme.desc: Interiørdesigner Halvor drar på tur til Finnskogen, med de nevedyktige kameratene Mikkel, Gustav og Thomas, for å pusse opp en hytte på Jævelodden.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 103
programme.desc: Interiørdesigner Halvor drar på tur til Helgelandskysten, med de nevedyktige kameratene Mikkel, Gustav og Thomas, for å pusse opp en brygge i fantastiske omgivelser på Langnes.

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2306
programme.desc: Pengene til 27-åringen Ole André, som bor på Haslum, går unna til dyr elektronikk og gaming. Han kjøpte også like godt en Tesla på impuls. Kan Lene og Hallgeir hjelpe han med å få styr på økonomien?

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2307
programme.desc: Småbarnsforeldrene Martin og Line fra Tromøya sliter hele tiden med at pengene ikke strekker til. Drømmen om å kunne kjøpe sitt eget hjem virker fjern, men kanskje Hallgeir og Magne kan hjelpe dem ut av den økonomiske krisen?

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2308
programme.desc: For en del år siden kastet Raymond bort store beløp på byturer, fest, poker og reiser. Nå har han begynt med en ny og bedre livsstil med løpe- og fjellturer, men befinner seg fortsatt på bunnen økonomisk.

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2401
programme.desc: Cecilie er kjent fra dokumentaren «The Tinder Swindler». I 2018 matchet hun med Simon Leviev på Tinder og ble svindlet for flere millioner kroner. Nå sitter Cecilie igjen med en gjeld som hun aldri har brukt en krone av selv.

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2402
programme.desc: Julie og Joacim fra Tønsberg sliter med impulskjøp på kreditt, og har mistet fullstendig oversikt over egen økonomi. De drukner i skyhøye forbrukslån, betalingsanmerkninger og inkassokrav – som setter en stopper for en livsviktig drøm for paret.

programme.title: South Park: Credigree Weed St. Patrick's Day Special

programme.desc: Jompen ger sig ut på jakt efter vildsvin tillsammans med Johan från Hunteq. Helt klart en vildsvinsjakt som bjuder på det mesta.

programme.desc: De asiatiske jentene på skolen tegner henførte drømmebilder av Tweek og Craig.

programme.title: Fangene på Fortet NO: Episode 1108

programme.desc: Cartman og Kyle krangler om et magisk triangel som kan forvandle Barbra Streisand til et fryktelig monster.

programme.desc: En fryktelig dopingskandale ryster alle i troen på et elsket ikon. Alle som en gang støttet den falne helten, klipper av seg sine gule armbånd.

programme.desc: Lexis far viser sin forakt for Peter. Og Craig truer Jennifer etter at hun får vite om noen ikke-helt-lovlige kostnadskutt.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Mama Mia
programme.desc: Michael og Jennifers mor kommer på besøk og skremmer dem når Jennifer forteller moren at hun var forlovet med Craig.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Siste tog til Bagdad
programme.desc: Kyle og Amanda reiser til Santa Fe for å besøke ekskjæreten hans. Men komplikasjoner truer bryllupsdagen deres når Christine kommer til Los Angeles.

programme.title: Wildfire: Moving On
programme.desc: Kris has a falling-out with Jean over Wildfire's readiness to race again.

programme.title: Wildfire: Close To Home
programme.desc: The destruction of Kris's trailer by fire forces her to move into the Ritters' house, which brings her closer to an old flame.

programme.title: Wildfire: Love Vs. Work
programme.desc: Kris is distracted by the return of her rival, Tina Sharp (Amy Jo Johnson), who is tapped to ride a Raintree boarder's horse that used to belong to the Davis ranch.

programme.title: Wildfire: Kiss Kiss
programme.desc: Kris is overcome by emotion when she helps Matt and Junior try to save Flame from being sold by Junior's dad.

programme.title: Wildfire: Push Me/Pull You
programme.desc: Kris worries about her status at Raintree after Gillian moves into the bunkhouse with Matt and begins offering unsolicited advice about Wildfire's training.

programme.title: Wildfire: The Good-Bye
programme.desc: With Raintree in dire financial straits, Jean and Matt's willingness to consider a buyer's offer draws criticism from Pablo and Kris.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Ice Ca-Cabes
programme.desc: Når et oppdrag i ørkenen resulterer i eksploderende splinter som skader Cabe alvorlig, må Team Scorpion fryse kroppen for å redde livet hans.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: The Hole Truth
programme.desc: Når Team Scorpion blir lurt til å produsere falske penger for en utenlandsk enhet som ønsker å ødelegge den amerikanske økonomien, må Paige stole på moren Veronicas ferdigheter som svindler for å redde dem.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: The Hole Truth
programme.desc: Teamet må redde en mann på kanten av et enormt synkehull som truer med å ødelegge Los Angeles vannforsyning for alltid.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Sharknerdo
programme.desc: Team Scorpions jobb med å finne sunkne skatter går galt når Walter og Paiges båt eksploderer, og etterlater dem fortapt midt i Stillehavet omgitt av haier.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Keep It in Check, Mate
programme.desc: Walter og Sylvester deltar undercover i en internasjonal sjakkkturnering på fremmed jord for Team Scorpion for å ta ut en amerikansk spion før identiteten hennes avsløres.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Dirty Seeds, Done Dirt Cheap
programme.desc: Når et enkelt oppdrag for å beskytte en viktig frøbank går galt, må Team Scorpion redde Happy, Sylvester og Cabe, som begynner å lide av livstruende, fryktbaserte hallusinasjoner.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the team investigate the secret world of alternate reality games after a man plunges to his death while participating in one such game. Amita's life is in danger when her hidden gaming ability becomes the key to tracking down the killer.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When a mega-heiress is abducted by an extremist group looking to punish her industrialist father, Don and the team rush to find her captors, but their attempt to save her takes a startling turn when they to uncover the group's true motivation.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Charlie works to find an extremely rare comic that was stolen during a deadly robbery at a comic book convention. Wil Wheaton guest stars as Miles Sklar.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the team come under pressure when a former FBI subcontractor shoots an agent inside the FBI headquarters and takes one of their own as a hostage, leaving them with a severely restricted plan of action.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Charlie becomes the target of physical intimidation aimed at disrupting his work on the case of a missing investigative journalist.

programme.title: Star Trek 3 - Jakten På Spock
programme.desc: Admiral Kirks seier over Khan og dannelsen av Genesis-planeten er tomme seiere. Spock er død og McCoy drives uforklarlig mot galskap. Så gir et overraskelsesbesøk fra Sarek, Spocks far, en forbløffende avsløring.

programme.title: Star Trek V: The Final Frontier
programme.desc: Mannskapet på Federation-skipet Enterprise tilkalles til Nimbus III, Planeten for intergalaktisk fred. De skal forhandle over en bortføring, men får vite at kidnapperen er en slektning av Spock.

programme.title: Star Trek VI: The Undiscovered Country
programme.desc: Etter årevis med krig, nærmer Federation og Klingon-imperiet seg en fredssamling når et Klingon-skip nesten blir ødelagt i et tilsynelatende angrep fra Enterprise. Begge verdener forbereder seg på det som kan bli deres dødeligste møte så langt.
