programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Jonathan shows three men what will happen in the future if the Earth continues to be ravaged by pollution. One of the men is an energy official another is a farmer and the third one is the President.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: In the series opener, we meet Jonathan Smith, a probationary angel who has been sent to help people on Earth. He befriends residents at a retirement home. The administrator at the home has a brother named Mark who is suspicious of Jonathan.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan helps the residents of Havencrest, when they learn that the retirement home is going to be sold. Jonathan must reveal his real identity to Mark in order to complete the assignment.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan helps a terminally ill boy and his mother. Meanwhile, Mark deals with a thief abandoned by his folks.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark help aging movie heroes to stand up to a street gang known as Satan's Helpers. They persuade a young boxer not to throw a big fight when the gang tries to bully him.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Tre jenter blir funnet drept. Allisons syner kobler etterforsker Scanlon til saken.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison drømmer gjentatte ganger om en kvinne som blir overvåket av en fremmed mann på soverommet hennes.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison er opptatt med å etterforske dødsfallet til en lokal lege når en mann som hevder å være "Døden" begynner å dukke opp i synene hennes, noe som får henne til å frykte at hun snart skal dø.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison drømmer om livet hun kunne hatt hvis hun hadde blitt advokat, som hun opprinnelig ønsket å bli.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison har tilbakevendende drømmer om fortiden hennes, noe som forårsaker merkelige og sjokkerende endringer i hennes nåværende liv.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Devalos etterforsker dødsfallet til en av hans nære venner og får hjelp av Allison, som har hatt urovekkende drømmer om en ung kvinne som ser ut til å være besatt.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: When the town's water supply is tainted with mercury by a wealthy mining baron, many people become sick and Dr. Mike threatens the miner to clean it up or have his land taken away.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: When Doc Eli, a medicine-show man, arrives in town professing to have created the perfect bottled elixir, Mike sets out to call his bluff, especially when her children's health becomes jeopardized.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: A wandering cowboy abandons his baby boy and leaves him in Dr. Mike's care.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Progress comes to Colorado Springs, and Sully pays the price.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: When Cheyenne medicine man Cloud Dancing is wounded by General Custer, who intends to hang him, Sully and Dr. Mike join forces to help him escape.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 2906
programme.desc: Mark drømte om et hus med kjæresten sin, men er nå tvunget til å dele et rom med broren hjemme hos foreldrene sine. Inntil nylig hadde han planer om å kjøpe et hus med sitt livs kjærlighet.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 2907
programme.desc: Peter og Mathilda har vært sammen i over tjue år og har to barn sammen, men nå eksisterer deres forhold bare gjennom det de sammen skylder bankene.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 2908
programme.desc: Mikael har alltid forvaltet økonomien sin dårlig. Utad har han levd som om han ikke har noen problemer, og det var bildet han formidlet da han møtte kjæresten Emelie.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 2909
programme.desc: Christian er kokken som har levd det gode livet på restauranten i over tjue år og sakte men sikkert har pådratt seg stor gjeld.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 3001
programme.desc: Alenemoren Malin er i så store problemer at hennes eks forrige måned måtte overføre penger slik at hun hadde råd til mat og bleier. Nå er hun uten jobb og aner ikke hvordan hun skal kunne betale husleien neste måned.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 3002
programme.desc: 33 år gamle Viktoria i Norrköping har aldri hatt en heltidsjobb, men det hindrer henne ikke i å kjøpe ting på avbetaling, som hun så ignorerer å betale.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 228
programme.desc: Milan og Julia B drar til sykehuset i Kristianstad hvor Milan skal ta røntgen. Vil legene komme med en forklaring på hvorfor Milan fremdeles ikke kan gå?

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 229
programme.desc: I Örebro har det gått tre dager, og Linn, Marcus og Tindra har fortsatt ikke fått lov til å dra hjem. De får hjelp av jordmoren med amming, men får ikke reise hjem før Tindras blodsukker er stabilt.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 230
programme.desc: Vi hører om Joys fremtidsplaner, vi følger Julia B og Natalie på den røde løperen, Linn og Marcus har endelig fått lov til å dra hjem, og det er på tide at Nanja blir døpt.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 301
programme.desc: Ny sesong, ny mamma: Fayme Elmén er 21 år gammel, og bor i Segersäng sammen med mannen Moltas og de tre barna Colin, Leo og Mila.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 302
programme.desc: Milan og bestefar tar toget til flyplassen for å ta imot Julia etter reisen til Russland. Fayme og barna feirer at faren til Moltas fyller 24 år, men feiringen blir avbrutt av en tur til sykehuset.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 303
programme.desc: Hjemme hos Fayme er det kaos som vanlig når familien må gjøre seg klar for familiefotografering. Julia og Milan drar hjem til Julias mor for å vaske. Linn og Tindra våkner av en forferdelig lyd.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 304
programme.desc: Julia får hjelp av Milans gudfar Victor for å starte opp en vlog, men Milan er mer interessert i å kaste småstein.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 305
programme.desc: Julia og Milan drar til Julias bestemor, som også fikk barn tidlig i livet. Hvorfor føles det som om det er vanskeligere å være ung mor i dag, sammenlignet med den gang?

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 306
programme.desc: Lesertallet på bloggen til Linn har økt kraftig siden Tindra ble født, men kommentarer om hvordan hun skal være som mor er ikke alltid like morsomme.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 307
programme.desc: Linn får lyst til å spraye morsmelk på alle som kommenterer negativt om amming på offentlig sted og for første gang drar hun inn til byen med Tindra. Julia og Milan besøker Julias søster Maja.

programme.title: The Bookshop
programme.desc: Vi møter den unge enken Florence Green (Emily Mortimer) som vil åpne en bokhandel i en liten by i Øst-England på slutten av 50-tallet. Hun møter overraskende nok høflig men hensynsløs lokal opposisjon mot bokhandelen.

programme.title: Whisky Galore
programme.desc: Under Andre verdenskrig hadde en liten by i Skottland en svært alvorlig mangel på ressurser siden nazistenes krigsinnsats hadde tatt tollen. Dette betydde ofte at det ganske enkelt ikke var nok mat til alle, og enda verre, det var ingen whisky.

programme.title: The Two Jakes
programme.desc: I etterfølgeren til Chinatown (1974) etterforsker Jake Gitters utroskap og mord... og oljepenger.

programme.title: Wild Target
programme.desc: En iskald leiemorder får sitt liv snudd på hodet når han blir forelsket i sitt mål, en sjarmerende svindler med uventede planer.

programme.title: Monsters
programme.desc: I 2009 oppdaget NASA muligheten for fremmed liv innenfor vårt solsystem. En sonde ble skutt opp for å samle inn prøver fra en av Jupiters måner, Europa, men krasjet på tilbaketuren over Mellom-Amerika.

programme.title: Defiance
programme.desc: Året er 1941 og de tyske styrkene har inntatt Øst-Europa. De tre brødrene Bielski (Daniel Craig, Live Schreiber og Jamie Bell) unngår fangenskap og finner beskyttelse i den tette skogen de har kjent siden de var barn.

programme.title: Også engler spiser bønner
programme.desc: Fribryteren Charlie (Bud Spencer) og drømmeren Sonny (Giuliano Gemma) er to fattige tøffinger i 30-årenes Chicago som håper på bedre tider. De får sjansen til å tjene store penger når de begynner å jobbe for en mafiaboss.

programme.title: Date Movie
programme.desc: Julia Jones jakter intenst på kjærligheten - alltid på feil sted- helt til hun slår kloa idrømmemannen. Men en slu eks, en fjertende katt og eksentriske svigers truer...

programme.title: Banana Joe
programme.desc: Bud Spencer er Banana Joe, en vennlig kjempe av en banandyrker som bor i en liten Søramerikansk by. Det går livet sin vante gang helt til et stort selskap vil ta over bananplantasjen og sette Joe i fengsel.

programme.title: A Christmas Feast
programme.desc: Det er jul og familien Oliverio gjør seg klare til De Syv Fiskers Middag, en italiensk kulinarisk tradisjon som har sine røtter fra gamlelandet. Midt i forberedelsene undrer Tony, en ung mann med store drømmer, om han vil finne kjærligheten i julen.

programme.title: Till Death
programme.desc: Etter en romantisk kveld i deres avsidesliggende hus, våkner Emma opp lenket til sin døde ektemann. Hun er fanget og isolert og må kjempe mot leiemordere for å unnslippe ektemannens avsindige plan.

programme.title: Official Secrets
programme.desc: Den sanne historien om en britisk varsler som lekket informasjon til media om en ulovlig NSA-operasjon, hvis formål var å presse FNs sikkerhetsråd til å godkjenne invasjonen av Irak i 2003.

programme.title: Red Dawn
programme.desc: Når en amerikansk by blir invadert av nordkoreanske soldater, kommer en gruppe unge mennesker sammen for å beskytte hverandre, frigjøre byen og gjenvinne sin frihet.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Bowling Pin Payday
programme.desc: Allen & Ton visit Ton's old stompin' ground and go head-to-head with a trash-talking auction buyer. They uncover a 19th century rifle with a matching cutlass bayonet and a mechanical bowling pinsetter from the early 1960's!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fake Punt Payoff
programme.desc: Ton and Allen contend with a large crowd of inexperienced auction-buyers at a huge storage container auction in Pasadena. They find a small fleet of Segway personal transporters and an enormous custom-made shotgun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Got Balls
programme.desc: After returning to LA, Ton & Allen head deep into hostile auction hunter territory and butt heads with a familiar old foe! They discover a driving range golf ball picker vehicle and one of the most accurate rifles ever made!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Ruff Day
programme.desc: Ton and Allen head to an auction in Ton's hometown and end up battling with a big-mouthed buyer. They discover a pair of tranquilizer dart guns and also end up fighting with a K9!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Got a Gun
programme.desc: In the affluent area of Mission Hills, CA, Allen and Ton pick up an estate unit that contains a minibike, a Depression-era slot machine and an 1871 Colt revolver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sidecar Surprise
programme.desc: An unassuming mom in an oversized sweater tries to pull the wool over Ton & Allen's eyes at a storage auction in Arlington, VA. The guys uncover a black powder cannon designed in the 15th century & a Russian military motorcycle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Choo-Choo, Cha-Ching!
programme.desc: Ton and Allen get a surprise second chance after nearly getting shut out in the small town of Palmer. They uncover a motorized railroad maintenance car from the 1960's and a pre-WWI Japanese semi-automatic pistol.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Little-Ton Jones
programme.desc: Allen & Ton try to get the inside scoop on their competition by chatting up local auction buyers. The guys find some heavy gold-mining machinery from the 1950s & an amateur rocket that can travel faster than the speed of sound!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Easy Money
programme.desc: Allen & Ton head to New Orleans in search of easy money, but instead encounter some bayou bidders with big-time bucks! They discover a pair of early 19th-century dueling pistols & a vintage airboat fitted with a turbine engine!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Half Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: 1970s Z-Flex Jimmy Plumer Poolrider skateboard with artwork by Doug Smith; Kevlar bulletproof vest, ballistic facemask and a helmet used by S.W.A.T. teams; a pair of 1990s racing pocket bikes capable of going 80 mph.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: 1905 Hand-crank Thomas Edison gramophone with cylindrical records; a discontinued Addictor 190 Mini Boat; a rare 1897 Regina music box.

programme.title: Christmas Unfiltered
programme.desc: På julaften ønsker Becky at familien hennes virkelig skal høre henne. Alle tankene og frustrasjonene hennes renner ut når hun uforvarende begynner å fortelle alle hva hun egentlig tenker.

programme.title: Merry Kissmas
programme.desc: Kayla og Carlton er på grensen til å slå opp, mest fordi Carlton behandler henne som sin assistent. Så har Kayla et spontant kyss med Dustin, og tror at hun endelig har møtt sin sanne kjærlighet.

programme.title: The Christmas Spirit
programme.desc: En ulykke fører til at Charlotte havner i koma, men ånden hennes er våken. I forkant av en avstemning om et eiendomsprosjekt må hun få byen og utbyggeren til å ombestemme seg uten at noen kan se eller høre henne.

programme.title: A Chestnut Family Christmas
programme.desc: En privat kokk må finne på noe for å imponere den ambisiøse familien hennes før de kommer for å tilbringe jul med henne.

programme.title: Can You Keep a Secret?
programme.desc: Emma tror de skal krasje og forteller alle sine hemmeligheter til en fremmed på flyet. Hun trodde iallfall at han var en fremmed. Basert på bestselgende roman med samme navn av forfatteren av 'Confessions of a shopaholic' Sophie Kinsella.

programme.title: A Time to Dance
programme.desc: John og Abby er i ferd med å gå fra hverandre, men bestemmer seg for å utsette det når de finner ut at datteren deres skal gifte seg. Mens de planlegger bryllupet, oppdager de motvillig at forholdet kanskje ikke er helt over likevel.

programme.title: Bel Ami
programme.desc: Georges Duroy (Robert Pattinson) er en attraktiv og hensynsløs sjarmør som manipulerer seg til toppen av 1890-tallets Paris.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Rip Van Winkle Caper
programme.desc: After successfully stealing a gold shipment, a group of criminals and their scientist accomplice put themselves in suspended animation in a remote desert cave. When they awaken decades later, complications ensue when their truck is destroyed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Hunt
programme.desc: On a hunting trip, Hyder Simpson and his dog Rip dive into a lake after a raccoon. When he gets home he finds that no one can see or hear him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Static
programme.desc: An old radio is taking bitter bachelor Ed Lindsay back to a happier time before what he considers worthless tripe on television when he starts picking up radio programs from the 1930's and 1940's.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Still Life
programme.desc: Johnny (Anthony Michael Hall) becomes embroiled in a murder mystery as he searches for the missing daughter of a famous artist.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Heroes & Demons
programme.desc: An autistic boy seeks Johnny's help to save his father (David Neale), a tough cop awaiting execution for the murder of a federal DEA agent.

programme.title: 30 Dager I Mørke
programme.desc: Under det årlige månedslange polarmørket blir en liten by i Alaska angrepet av en gjeng vampyrer som herjer og ødelegger. Mens kaos senker seg over byen, kjemper sheriffen og kona hans for å redde familien sin.

programme.title: The Curse of the Jade Scorpion
programme.desc: C.W. Biggs er forsikringsetterforsker i 1940-tallets New York. I hans egne øyne er han byens beste, ikke minst fordi han påstår å kunne knekke enhver forsikringssvindel ved å gå inn i tankene til svindleren.

programme.title: Coneheads
programme.desc: Ett blikk, og du vet at de er fra et veldig rart sted. De er fra New Jersey, via "Frankrike", via Remulak langt ute på viddene. De er Coneheads.

programme.title: Ghost In The Shell
programme.desc: I år 2029 er en kvinnelig kyberagent på sporet av "Dukkemesteren" – et datavirus som kan invadere kybernetiske hjerner og endre offerets minner.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 606
programme.desc: Claudia går ned 100 kilo og får deretter fjernet overflødig hud. For å avslutte reisen mot en kropp som Claudia kan føle seg stolt av, bestemte hun seg for å gjøre en brystforstørrelsesoperasjon.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 301
programme.desc: I dag møter vi bl.a. Jane, som ikke lenger har lyst på sex på grunn av de stygge brystene sine, og Julie, som misliker seg selv på grunn av de store arrene hun fikk etter en brystreduksjon.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 904
programme.desc: Jeannes bryster hindrer henne i å leve et normalt liv. Gitte skammer seg over beina og bruker enormt mye tid og energi på å skjule dem.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 308
programme.desc: Lizette sitter igjen med et knallhardt bryst etter en forstørrende operasjon, mens Diana går med voldsomme smerter etter en brystreduksjon. Begge håper de å få hjelp av de erfarne kirurgene.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 503
programme.desc: Under sin siste fødsel gjennomgikk Sonja et akutt keisersnitt som, noe utradisjonelt, ble kuttet vertikalt på Sonjas mage. Sonjas navle ble kuttet opp, og resultatet er til en stor ulempe for henne.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 309
programme.desc: Ditte har brukt 120 000 kroner på å få større bryster - som er asymmetriske. Eva har fått utført en brystreduksjon, men føler seg nå mer maskulin enn feminin.

programme.title: World of Love Island
programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.

programme.title: World of Love Island
programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.

programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 505
programme.desc: Elin sparker dagen i gang i Stockholm med komplisert lossing og tidspress. Tim kjører etsende last – og han må derfor være ekstra forsiktig på veiene. Peo sliter med containerne sine i Åre.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 506
programme.desc: Vi følger yrkessjåførene som jobber døgnet rundt for å levere forskjellige typer av varer over hele landet - og for å utføre viktige samfunnstiltak som holder Sverige i gang, fra nord til sør.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 507
programme.desc: Vi følger yrkessjåførene som jobber døgnet rundt for å levere forskjellige typer av varer over hele landet - og for å utføre viktige samfunnstiltak som holder Sverige i gang, fra nord til sør.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 508
programme.desc: Johannes skal levere brakker – men kaster ved et uhell nøklene på taket. Spesialtransportørene og ekteparet Anton og Angelica har en kjøretur sammen - til Norge. Emina kjører kjøtt i Skåne.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 701
programme.desc: I det nordlige vinterlandskapet må Anton stoppe transporten av et tungt toglokomotiv når tilhengeren går i stykker. Elin, en melkebilsjåfør, starter dagen rolig, helt til en melkeslange ryker og kaos oppstår.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: During their stay in Jamaica, the girls meet Bob Marley's daughter, Cedella Marley, who has designed a fashionable new line of bikinis.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls are challenged to shoot a trial television commercial for the Jamaica Tourist Board, including writing their own script and starring in their own television spot while horse-back-riding in the ocean.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The previously eliminated contestants return to join the finalists and their families for an unprecedented runway show that embraces all the beauty, culture, history and music of the island as the winner of America's Next Top Model: Cycle 19 is revealed.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Freakout Behind-the-scenes confessions and catfights among the co-eds are revealed in the never-before-seen footage.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The competition heats up as "America's Next Top Model" returns, featuring male and female aspiring models competing for a career-launching prize package. The contestants participate in their first runway show.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Game Day
programme.desc: Jentene har en siste sjanse før deres skjebne avgjøres. Drømmer begynner å bli til virkelighet når jentene poserer for lagbildet. Det bys på fantastisk dans når show-gruppen og resten av troppen opptrer for første gang.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: The Journey Begins
programme.desc: Følg med og se hvem som kommer til å klare de vanskeligste danseuttakene i sportsverdenen. 500 kvinner satser alt for drømmen om å bli en av de berømte Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders for 2014-2015-sesongen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Dancing For Your Life
programme.desc: 55 jenter i toppklasse har kommet seg til finalen, noe som bekymrer de 30 veteranene som nå må kjempe for en plass i troppen. Kitty Carter holder ikke tilbake når hun forbereder jentene på å danse sine soloer.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Welcome to Valley Ranch
programme.desc: Når treningsleiren åpner med 43 kvinner, blir presset stort! Kellis entusiasme er smittsom, men det første møtet er også opprørende. Forventningene er skyhøye. Syv jenter må eliminieres for at troppen skal bestå av 36.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: A Week Of Firsts
programme.desc: Frykt griper treningsleirkandidatene når de innser at de må klare DCCs benspark og hoppspagat for første gang. Å lande så unaturlig krever stor tro på seg selv.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Getting The DCC Look
programme.desc: For å være en DCC må man se ut som en DCC. Denne uken skal Kelli sørge for at alle jentene har den rette looken. De begynner med en makeover og jentene drar til snobbete Halcyon Salon for å få nye frisyrer.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 12
programme.desc: Paramedics rush in 94-year-old Doris, who has a gaping wound on her leg after an incident with a stair-lift. Leading her care is Consultant Doctor John Raynor who says, ‘in the grand scheme of these wounds, this is probably the worst one I’ve ever seen.’

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 1
programme.desc: . Sister Harriet Lindley is running today’s shift, the hospital is already busy and there’s been a sharp rise in the number of ambulances being called.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 2
programme.desc: At Barnsley Hospital the department is facing a big change, eight new junior doctors have joined the close-knit team. Sister Jane Hawksworth explains ‘twice a year, new doctors come into the department all fresh and unexpecting…'

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 3
programme.desc: Paramedics bring in 59-year-old Wendy with a critical heart condition and there’s a complication, she has kidney failure and needs dialysis three times a week.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 4
programme.desc: Advanced Nurse Practitioner Cheryl Barnes answers the red phone and heads to resus. ‘When that red phone rings it gives you a bit of an adrenaline rush, but I don’t think that’s a bad thing.’

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 5
programme.desc: Battling to keep the flow of patients moving is Sister Jane Hawksworth but she’s got a problem. They’re two porters down and it’s causing a backlog, but the emergencies keep arriving.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 6
programme.desc: In South Wales, 49-year-old Alison has always been a hoarder. What started as a passion for teddy bears has transformed into an obsession for. She currently has 11 and they rule the house, at least the bits they can get to in between the hoard…

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 8
programme.desc: 79-year-old Joyce moved into her dream home in Liverpool nearly 40 years ago with her partner, Norman. But when he passed away, she lost her battle to keep on top of the hoarding behavior she inherited from her mum.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 9
programme.desc: What happens when a hoarder can no longer live safely in their home and the family are left to pick up the pieces? House clearance experts Ange and Yvonne have been called in by the daughters of a lifelong hoarder to clear their dad’s house.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 1
programme.desc: In this episode we meet 63-year-old Jane, a retired nurse from Southeast London. Jane’s inability to start a family brought on her hoarding tendencies and 27 years later, her 2 bedroomed terrace home is full to the rafters with furniture and books.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 1
programme.desc: In this brand-new series of Dirty Home Rescue, Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Toni from Telford whose house is so dirty her partner of 10 years, Rich, won’t move in with her.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 9
programme.desc: When a horsebox breaks down on the busy M25 Michael is in for a rocky ride. Lantern op Merrie is faced with an electrifying recovery and Crouch op Buzz is dicing with danger on the A42.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 10
programme.desc: Crouch recovery op Buzz is forced to abandon his wrecker as he attempts to rescue a stranded skip lorry. Merrie is faced with a 26-tonne water tanker stuck on a narrow lane and on the A4 a fully loaded truck has rolled over on a busy roundabout.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 11
programme.desc: A 44-tonne lorry in a catastrophic crash on the M25 calls for a multi-crew rescue, company patriarch Dave Crouch shows apprentice Olly the ropes and Merrie tackles a water tanker stuck on a dangerous blind bend.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 12
programme.desc: Stig comes to the rescue when a 40-tonne trailer jackknifes. Sean finds himself in a battle of wills wrestling not one, but two tractors stuck deep in the mud and Buzz has to beat the school bell to rescue a skip next to a playground.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 1
programme.desc: Disaster strikes on the M1 when a 44-tonne truck carrying all the ingredients for a full-English Breakfast catches fire. Firefighters are battling to put out the blaze, but its cargo has a dangerous habit of reigniting

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 2
programme.desc: A trailer laden with 29-tonnes of gym weights has rolled over on a busy roundabout. Lantern boss Lee and his team rush to the scene to get the trailer upright using two heavy recovery vehicles.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Percy & Justice
programme.desc: Percy, a West Highland White Terrier, is a handful, biting anyone who tries to touch his hindquarters. Justice, a Pit Bull, is slowly escalating toward dangerous aggression.

programme.desc: Brody og Kaitlynn håndterer det ødeleggende etterspillet av Malibu-brannene. Audrina fatter et vanskelig valg om Justin. Samtidig har Mischa en prøvespilling med høy innsats for en filmrolle. Heidi begynner å gjenopplive popstjerne karrieren.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: You're Enemy #1
programme.desc: Sladderen tar fyr og ryktene går etter en skandaløs hendelse med Brody og Stephanie. Audrina blir sjokkert da Justin tar med en hakesleppende date til middagen.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Are We Exclusive?
programme.desc: Kaitlynn & Brody's 'A-liste'-galla splitter gruppen når hun ekskluderer deler av gjengen. Audrina overrasker alle med en nytenning av en lidenskapelig romanse med en gammel flamme. Spencer forbløffer Heidi med en overdådig overraskelse.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: This Hangover Better Be Expensive
programme.desc: Forholdet til Brody og Kaitlynn er stadig anstrengende og de går til en fertilitetsspesialist. Heidi og Spencer forbereder seg for sin kommende wow-fornyelse med duellerende utdrikningslag. Brandon har vanskelig for å definere det nye forholdet.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Love at First Sight
programme.desc: Åtte singelkjendiser møtes i en luksusvilla. Gnistene fyker for Joey, Calum blir overrasket og Lateysha blir straks begeistret for en slemming. Den første kjendiseksen ankommer, men kommer alt til å slutte i tårer?

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Breaking Point
programme.desc: Det blir for mye for Ellie når Joey og Lorena bare er opptatt av hverandre. Lateysha blir ignorert av Michael, men en sexy ny kjendis fører henne til den syvende himmel. Calum og Marisa fortsetter å flørte.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Will You Be My Girlfriend?
programme.desc: Calum splittes mellom to ekser, Marissa og nykommeren Victoria. Marissa er ikke glad. Joey har et stort spørsmål til Lorena og Ashley blir vennesonet.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: May The Best Man Win
programme.desc: Joey og Lorena er blitt offisielle, men noen truer lykken. David får kalde føtter med Laytesha, Ashley har flaks og Michael og Victoria kommer nærmere hverandre.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: A New Celeb's In Toon!
programme.desc: En spesiall kjendis kommer til festen på båten. Georgia innser at hun har tatt feil og Itay og Victorias tid er over.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: The Queen Has Arrived
programme.desc: Lateysha og David når bunnen da reality-dronningen Tiffany Pollard skaper dramatikk ved å avsløre Davids ekte følelser for Lateysha. Og to ekser forlater villaen for godt.

programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Louis' Subaru Impreza.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Dumped
programme.desc: Dario og Layton kjemper hardere om Ashley. Ellie retter oppmerksomheten mot Nathan, men han er overbevist om at Christina er hans perfekte match. Presset ved å være den 11. jenta blir for stort for Christina.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Old Flames
programme.desc: Selv om de ikke er en match, eksploderer Nathan når Christina går tilbake til Brandon. Med bare to parseremonier igjen, kan Ashleys vankelvorenhet mellom Layton og Dario forhindre huset i å vinne storeslem.

programme.title: Are You The One?: One Switch, One Glitch
programme.desc: Huset står foran den siste parseremonien og et bytte må gjøres. Sannhetsbåsen gir dem noen sårt trengte svar, men spørsmålet rundt den 11. jenta setter milliongevinsten i fare.

programme.title: Are You The One?: The Season Aftermatch
programme.desc: Hele sesongens hemmeligheter, dramatikk og uoverensstemmelser kommer frem under gjenforeningsepisoden når ulike deltakere tar plass i setet.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Perfect Match at First Sight
programme.desc: 20 enslige ankommer Hawaii for å finne kjærligheten og vinne $1 million. Deres kjærlighet-ved-første-blikk-instinkter blir satt på prøve, med en ekstra $250 000 på spill. En kjærlighetstrekant fører til en pinlig Matchup Ceremony.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Punch Drunk Love
programme.desc: John eksploderer når forholdet med Julia endres. Asaf og Francesca vet ikke hvor de står når en tur til Boom Boom Room'et mislykkes. Kaylen slipper en bombe om sitt forhold til Gio som sjokkerer huset.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Twenty aspiring restaurateurs hope to impress Ramsay by present their signature dishes to him. After the opening night dinner service, the least successful contestants face elimination.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Teamwork plays an important role during a relay race in which duos must accomplish basic culinary tasks; while challenge winners go to San Francisco, the losing team picks carrots at a farm; both teams disappoint during dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The contestants learn about teamwork during a challenge involving pigs and potatoes; while the winning team enjoys a day on a yacht, the losers bathe their new livestock friends; a disorganized dinner service leaves chef Ramsay disappointed.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The contestants take part in a team competition involving 10 dishes of lobster ravioli that must be prepared perfectly. The winners earn a swim at a Beverly Hills residence.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams must pair side dishes with four different types of protein; while the losing team makes honey taffy from scratch, the winners spend a day at Laguna Beach; the teams prepare a breakfast reception for a wedding.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams must pick a team leader for the next dinner service; a chef serves an undercooked dish; a contestant is eliminated.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Avledningsgaten
programme.desc: To rivaliserende gjenger samles ved å konkurrere på basketballbanen istedenfor på gata.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Lørdagskveld
programme.desc: Walker trår til når mafiaen tvinger en lokal middagsklubb til å hvitvaske penger.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Rettferdighet for alle
programme.desc: Politiavdelingen skal til å bli saksøkt for vold av en advokat når advokaten blir drept, og Walker etterforsker drapet.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: 6 timer
programme.desc: En skurk planlegger å henrette noen live på nettet, og rangerne må finne ham før han gjennomfører det.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Middelalderforbrytelser
programme.desc: Sofistikerte innbruddstyver som utgir seg for å være riddere fra middelalderen, ankommer Texas.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant
programme.desc: Før hun oppdaget at hun var gravid, var Maci en toppelev fra Chattanooga i Tennessee. Forloveden Ryan viser ingen interesse for å hjelpe henne, og Maci må finne ut om forholdet vil overleve eller om hun må takle utfordringene alene.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant
programme.desc: Farrah er en populær cheerleader fra Iowa, men da vennene begynner å sladre om at hun skal bli alenemor, gir hun opp skolen og begynner å bruke altfor mye tid med sin dominerende mor.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant
programme.desc: Partyjenta Amber hadde aldri forestilt seg at hun skulle flytte sammen med sin velmenende, umodne kjæreste Gary så tidlig. Men nå venter de barn, og må takle et voksent ansvar på et tenåringsbudsjett.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: A New Family
programme.desc: Sommeren på Jersey Shore starter når åtte personer flytter inn i sommerhuset. Romantikken blomstrer mellom Sammy og Mike, men kan bli spolert når gutta inviterer tre tilfeldige jenter i boblebadet med dem.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Tanned Triangle
programme.desc: Snooki føler seg fortsatt utstøtt og vurderer å reise sin vei. Første kveld på klubben blir flørtete, så kjærestene hjemme har kanskje grunn til bekymring. Et trekantdrama truer med å splitte huset.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Good Riddance
programme.desc: Trekanten blir mer intens når Ronnie tar Sammy i å gi nummeret sitt til en annen gutt. En deltaker velger å forlate The Shore for godt.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Train
programme.desc: Prime Minister Larya of Svardia is working to establish democracy, but is unaware that his personal protege, Deputy Premier Pavel, plans to set up a dictatorship.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Shock
programme.desc: Enemy operative Kiri has kidnapped U.S. envoy Carl Wilson and has an imposter, Gort, who is impersonating him to discredit a U.S. trade agreement.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: A Cube Of Sugar
programme.desc: The IMF team must rescue a U.S. intelligence operative who has top-secret military plans on a microcircuit chip.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Traitor
programme.desc: An American intelligence officer, Hughes, has defected to the enemy with the only copy of an encoded top-secret message.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Psychic
programme.desc: The team must trick a crooked investment promoter into endorsing $80 million in stolen stocks and then getting them back from him.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 406
programme.desc: Anne Sofie og Paw har ikke nok plass i den lille Frederiksberg-leiligheten etter en familieøkning. Men kravene til drømmehuset er store, så selv med 7 millioner finner de ikke det de er ute etter.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 501
programme.desc: Louise og Jonas fra Viborg drømmer stort, men drømmen faller i bakken med et brak. Ekspertene må jobbe hardt før den lille familien - forhåpentligvis - kan flytte inn i drømmehuset.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 502
programme.desc: Anita og Martins to barn har tatt over hjemmet, og det er leker overalt. Løsningen er et større hjem, men paret har ikke klart å finne det rette huset enda. Nå får de hjelp av ekspertene, men det blir ikke lett.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 503
programme.desc: Tina og Danni solgte rekkehuset sitt i den tro at de snart skulle finne det rette huset. Men sånn gikk det ikke. Paret er utrolig kresne, og har høye krav. Kan ekspertene skape hjemmet som Tina og Danni drømmer om?

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Nynäshamn
programme.desc: Sunny Nynäshamn is a resort town close to Stockholm, but there is more here than the sea. Tareq meets a prize-winning chocolate maker using ingredients from her garden, visits a thriving local food market, and gets a lesson in how to smoke fish.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Røros
programme.desc: Born as a mining town in the 17th century, Røros is now a center for local and organic food producers. Tareq tries dairy products which Michelin-starred chefs swear by, goes skiing and sledding around Røros many hilly streets

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Vimmerby
programme.desc: Vimmerby is known as the birthplace of beloved author Astrid Lindgren. Tareq finds that the area is also well-regarded for its cuisine. From the children’s theme park to the friendly moose that roam the hills, Vimmerby has a lot to offer visitors.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Trysil
programme.desc: The mountains and snowfall in Trysil mean that the town has to be creative with food; Tareq learns how to make cheese in the traditional way, and goes skiing of course, and takes to the slopes to cook something as skiers pass by.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Värmland
programme.desc: Värmland is home to many of Sweden’s most famous authors and inventors. However, it is also a place with a rich food culture. Tareq gets his hands on a very rare bird to cook and also takes time out to float down a tranquil river on a wooden raft.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Fyn
programme.desc: Tareq visits Fyn, the fairy tale capital of the world. Famous as the birthplace of Hans Christian Andersen, Fyn is also known as the garden of Denmark. Here we explore stunning nature and world class cuisine.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Höga Kusten
programme.desc: Created thousands of years ago, the High Coast in the northern part of Sweden is the highest coast in the world. Tareq sets out to sample one of the most extreme types of Swedish food, fermented herring.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: North Denmark
programme.desc: North Jutland has a rich culinary history. The unique conditions have created equally unique products. Tareq meets local food entrepreneurs who have learned to adapt to this ever changing environment and putting this region on the culinary map.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Boys Get Their International Wings
programme.desc: Charlotte kommer tilbake akkurat i tide for en tur til Barcelona. Dan fører gutta ut på en fuktig kveld på byen, og med Ricci ute av bildet viser single Vicky vei på en sightsingtour. Og yndlingsgjengen vår bader i sol, sjø, sex og sangria.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: House Party Disaster
programme.desc: Gjengen er tilbake fra Barcelona med Charlottes kjærlighetserklæring til Gary i luften, og Viccy vil ha et oppgjør med Ricci. Diverse militært program og amerikanske festligheter fører til den største krangelen i Geordie Shores historie noen sinne.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Apres-Ski
programme.desc: Kommer gjengen til å roe seg ned etter den største krangelen i Geordie Shores historie? Charlotte er i bråk med sjefen Anna, og det er en tydelig isfront mellom gutta og jentene.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Best Of Geordie Tours
programme.desc: Gjengen avslører hvordan det var å bo i Geordie Shore-huset og hva de syns om all fyll, knulling og ironi som akkompagnerte den turbulente Europa-turnéen deres.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Family Means Family
programme.desc: Feststemning råder når Jay overraskende kommer på party-besøk. Charlottes følelser for Gaz går opp og ned, Vicky sjekker og konkurransene om tittelen superpuler går så det suser når alle jeneter i Sydney er på radaren til Scotty og Gaz - supergutta!

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 504
programme.desc: Vi møter Mike, Vinny og Deena som snakker om da Vinny kom tilbake til strandhuset, om Mikes forhold til Paula og Paulys forhold til...vel, alle andre. Og vi får en snikkikk på neste episode!

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 507
programme.desc: Det er damenes aften og Jenni, Sammi, Snooki og Deena skravler om Jennis kjærlighetstrøbbel med Roger, om kjøttbollegreier og Guidette-problemer. Og vi får en snikkikk på hva vi har i vente.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Gym, Tan, Look Back
programme.desc: Jerseygjengen tar et tilbakeblikk på sin reise sammen de siste tre årene. Amerikas yndlingssamboere forteller i intervjuer sine unike historier om uforglemmelige øyeblikk. Og en sniktitt på sesong 6 er med.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Once More Unto the Beach
programme.desc: Alle kommer til strandhuset en siste gang. The Situation forteller ærlig om rehabiliteringen og Snooki må møte den utfordringen det er å være gravid i et hus skapt for festing og moro.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: No Shame, Good Integrity
programme.desc: Romkameratene installerer seg i strandhuset og Deena må takle å være adskilt fra kjæresten sin. Nicole kommer med en kunngjøring som sjokkerer hele huset.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Toxic Shots Syndrome
programme.desc: Snooki flytter ut av strandhuset for seg selv og Dina sliter uten kjøttbollen sin. Mike må takle baksiden av rehabiliteringen etter å ha fått behandling av en lege.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Blues, Balls, & Brawls
programme.desc: Jenny planlegger en overraskelsesfest på Rogers bursdag som faller litt i fisk. Deena prøver ut Danny som kjøttbolle. Vennegjengen befinner seg plutselig midt i et digert basketak på klubben og en av dem meies ned i håndgemengen.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Chimes at Midnight
programme.desc: After Vincent entrusts Snow's ring to Diana, she quickly discovers Gabriel's henchman have targeted her and soon kidnap her and take her to Gabriel.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Invictus
programme.desc: With Vincent caged, Gabriel allows him to see his infant son who suddenly begins to make a miraculous recovery.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: In the Forests of the Night
programme.desc: Rolley is shot while trying to rob a liquor store and takes refuge in the tunnels.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Reckoning"
programme.desc: A woman whom Father knows returns to the city. She asks him to join her and he considers it. At the same time Diana is working on a murder. And it turns that the victim is someone Father knows.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Legacies
programme.desc: Upon returning to "The World Below" upon the knowledge of some of ex-tunnel inhabitants being murdered, Father encounters Gregory Coyle who seeks revenge for the death of his father by cave-in 20 years ago.

programme.title: JAG: In Country
programme.desc: Central Command coordinates an airstrike on a confirmed target traveling through Afghanistan. After the strike is launched, marine troops assess the damage and they are disturbed to learn that they targeted the wrong vehicle and hit civilians instead.

programme.title: JAG: Enemy Below
programme.desc: Kabir is preparing an attack against the U.S. and was last seen crossing the border from Afghanistan to Iran. He is believed to have recruited Capt. Yerastov, a Russian submarine captain. Turner, Harm and Mac help in the hunt for the terrorists.

programme.title: JAG: Critical Condition
programme.desc: Bud has lost his right lower leg due to a mine in Afghanistan; during emergency surgery he faces bad trouble. Sturgis returns to Washington, and Harm and Mac disobey an order from the admiral. Bud encounters an astounding change of course.

programme.title: JAG: Dangerous Game
programme.desc: A deputy sheriff dies while chasing a car carrying two SEALs in a Navy exercise. The driver stands trial for negligent homicide.

programme.title: JAG: In Thin Air
programme.desc: Lt. Albrecht and Lt. Cmdr. Zuzello make Zuzello’s farewell flight before he retires. All is fine until Albrecht notices that his partner is passed out from hypoxia. Albrecht makes an emergency landing on the ship.Harm is sent to the ship to investigate.

programme.title: JAG: Need to Know
programme.desc: As a favor from Congresswoman Lillian Dorning, SECNAV Sheffield asks the JAG staff to get the story of a submarine, USS Angel Shark (SSGN-559), which was lost on a CIA mission in 1968.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Copenhagen/Amsterdam Cruise/ Vicki and the Fugitive - Part 2
programme.desc: Mystery abounds when a woman becomes friendly with a man she knew in a past life but he doesn't remember her. At the same time, Captain Stubing pursues a beautiful passenger who seems intent on avoiding him.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Only The Good Die Young/ Honey Beats The Odds/ The Light Of Another Day
programme.desc: Isaac tries to help a recently widowed woman and her son cope with their grief and a sightless woman believes she has found her former love.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Soap Gets In Your Eyes/ A Match Made In Heaven/ Tugs Of The Heart
programme.desc: A dying woman meets a man who claims he is in a debate with an angel and a woman from Gopher's past hopes that he will propose to her.

programme.title: The Love Boat: And One To Grow On/ Seems Like Old Times/ I'll Never Forget What's Her Name
programme.desc: On her 18th birthday, Vicki learns that her father is a recovering alcoholic and a woman hires a detective to find her college sweetheart.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Aerobic April/ The Wager/ Story Of The Century
programme.desc: April Lopez (Charo) returns and gets the crew bent out of shape while two women complicate a wager between brothers.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie Loves Pinky Part II
programme.desc: The Malachi brothers sabotage Pinky's car the night before the demolition derby.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Physical
programme.desc: A short-tempered sergeant loses his tenuous grasp on discipline when the Fonz reports to the army recruitment center soon after draftees Richie, Ralph and Potsie check in for physicals.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Apartment
programme.desc: Personality quirks begin to fray nerves after best friends Richie, Ralph, and Potsie rent an apartment together.

programme.title: Happy Days: Hard Cover
programme.desc: Richie and Fonzie must think fast to outwit a tough housemother after they're caught past curfew in the college girls' dormitory.

programme.title: Happy Days: Hollywood Part 2
programme.desc: Soon after getting the bad news that the studio deemed his James Dean impression obsolete, and gave Richie's wholesome good looks a contract instead, the Fonz finds a bigger fish to fry.

programme.title: Happy Days: Hollywood Part 3
programme.desc: Richie must choose either a 5-year Hollywood contract or college in Milwaukee while the Fonz accepts the California Kid's challenge to perform a dangerous water ski jump...over a shark!

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonsilectomy
programme.desc: Forced to spend the night in the hospital's children's ward, Fonzie worries more about who will be making time with his girl at the Halloween party than the tonsillectomy he's scheduled for the next morning.

programme.title: Happy Days: My Cousin the Cheat
programme.desc: Fonzie is furious with his rebellious cousin, Chachi Arcola, after Chachi cheats on a school test using answers stolen from a tutoring session with Joanie Cunningham.

programme.title: Happy Days: Nose is for News
programme.desc: To prove to his college journalism professor that he has what it takes to be a good investigative reporter, Richie gets down and dirty to expose who's behind an illegal garbage collection scheme.

programme.title: MacGyver: Lost Love (Part 1)
programme.desc: MacGyver's loyalties are put to the test when the KGB challenges him to steal a touring Chinese artifact in exchange for the release of a woman he once loved.

programme.title: MacGyver: Lost Love (Part 2)
programme.desc: MacGyver heists an ancient Chinese artifact as a ransom for a woman he once loved, only to learn she's double-crossed him.

programme.title: MacGyver: Back From The Dead
programme.desc: When former mobster Jimmy "The Eraser's" new identity is exposed, MacGyver is forced into action to save Jimmy's daughter and grandson.

programme.title: MacGyver: Ghost Ship (Aka "Sasquatch")
programme.desc: While hiking through remote wilderness, MacGyver uncovers an elaborate scheme to siphon oil from a pipeline when he comes to the aid of a young girl, terrorized by the legendary Sasquatch.

programme.title: MacGyver: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: MacGyver teams up with the sister of a murdered friend to expose a diamond heist operation that they suspect is the work of a diplomat, using his status to shield him from suspicion and arrest.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ta frem bestikket! Fire fremmede konkurrerer om penger og tittelen som den ultimate vert for middagsselskapet, følg med for en spicy konkurranse.

programme.title: Matlock: The Pi
programme.desc: Thanks to Matlock, a struggling private investigator, played by guest star George Peppard, reunites with his long-lost daughter! Together they investigate a mysterious trail of clues to solve the toughest murder case of his career.

programme.title: Matlock: The Scandal
programme.desc: Matlock takes the defense of a young attorney accused of murdering her boss, a man she was about to blow the whistle on for sexually harassing his female employees.

programme.title: Matlock: The Tabloid
programme.desc: A frame-up finds Matlock immersed in libel, scandal, and tales of alien spaceships! Delving into the lurid world of tabloid publishing, Matlock and his new investigator, Jerri Stone, sort through the world’s weirdest clues to solve a murder.

programme.title: Matlock: Deadly Dose
programme.desc: A surgical mishap and a malpractice suit aren’t the end of Dr. Bradley Gray’s troubles. He’s been murdered! Jerri Stone’s little sister, Nurse Rachel, is the number one suspect.

programme.title: Matlock: The Target
programme.desc: An afternoon fishing expedition evolves into a nightmare. Matlock watches in horror as the boat he just disembarked suddenly explodes into a fireball killing his companion, Judge Stern.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: To Steve, Jesse, and Amanda's embarrassment, Dr. Sloan rehearses with a swing band at BBQ Bob's as he prepares for a benefit dance for the children's unit at the hospital. But the mood quickly transforms into a tone of horror.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve meets up with his young protégé, Tommy Allen, but is ready to strangle him when he finds out that Tommy was involved in another brawl, this time at BBQ Bob's!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A ratings war sparks a wave of deaths across the big TV networks - a magician impales himself on a bed of spikes, and Dr Danger also turns up dead.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: With the latest murder on TV taking place at Community General, Dr. Sloan, Steve, Jesse, and Amanda prepare to solve this case and protect their integrity.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve assigns Amy Devlin and Taylor Lucas, two police officers from the Vice Squad, to assist in solving the homicide of local pimp Milton Wilder. However, Taylor convinces her partner to take a temporary detour on their way to the investigation.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Følg med huseiere når de tar valget om å endre livsstilen sin og bytte ut bylivet med det rolige livet på landet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Strandkompisene flesker til. Nicoles tidlige utgivelse og Nashville hot chicken krever nok et offer. Samt et legandarisk Jersey Shore-øyeblikk får en spagettiwestern-vri. Finn ut i andre del av Jersey Shores familiegjenforening!

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Sammi tar et stort skritt. Vinny åpner seg om psykiske problemer. Nicole leter etter svar. Angelina og Mike fører ekstra feider til kjøttbollefesten.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Hvem vinner første pris i den årlige kjøttbollekonkurransen? Gjengen er invitert til Las Vegas for 'det store spillet', og å være i Paulys 'nye' hus.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Jwoww tok helt av, og kjøttbollene forberedte seg for åpnebaringen den første utekvelden i Las Vegas. Samtidig renset Angelina og 2.0 luften i Jersey.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Guido fikser verken bunkeren eller sannheten om at det store spillet faktisk ikke kan være det.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Sakai faces a challenger known as 'Mr. Gourmet.' Komine is a world-class vegetable chef who feels right at home with the secret ingredient.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Can the former chef to Deng Xiaoping, Zeityen Wan, make magic with his noodle dishes in just one hour?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The challenger is the first pizza expert to enter Kitchen Stadium. What pizza can he create with squid?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Shigeo Yuasa is the head chef of the Okayama International Hotel. With test tubes and litmus papers, Yuasa uses shocking cooking techniques to get his meals to exacting pH levels.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Challenger Chiyo Cho has the support from the people of Kobe as he challenges Iron Chef Chen to a titanic tofu tussle.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' er Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood en fare for seg selv i 'Selvfelling', drar på gymet for å få seg en 'Boksesekktrøkk' og går langt i å utfordre høydeskrekken med 'Elleville høyder'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne 'Ridiculousness' har Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood med en spesiell gjest, Dee Snider, og møter rebeller i 'Tenker ikke å tåle det', opplever band som sliter i 'Kommer ikke til å slå gjennom' og blir nedstemt av spilt kaffe i 'Kaffetragedier'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood på konsekvensene ved å overse skilt i 'Skiltblind', lærer om merkelige ting som er 'Teknisk sett sant' og finner ut hvordan sprø ting blir 'Sprøere og sprøere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood syklister få seg en overraskelse i 'Uventede sykkelhinder', møter ondskapsfulle katter som viser 'Kattevrede' før de tar en titt på folk som setter hodet fast i 'Skallefeller'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' prøver Rob, Steelo og Kristy Sarah seg på 'Kostymekatastrofer', kommer i kontakt med 'Etikettefjerne folk' og blir vitner til 'Nære på-overganger'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood se folk som snus opp ned av 'Påtvungne overslag', får seg en drink og to for mye med 'Pussa bestemødre' og finner ut grunnen til å unngå dansing med drinker i 'Ikke drikk og dans'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' med Rob, Steelo og Kristy Sarah får vi se strålende treffsikkerhet i 'Skallesnikskyting', finner ut av hva som er motsatt av å prestere under press i 'Vanære under press' og avslutter med noen 'Sjalu hjerter'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' drar Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood for å skate med gjenstander på hjul som er 'Park-uforenlig', tar bilder og får seg en smell i 'Knipseattakk' og holder fast på verdisakene i møte med 'Mobile skurker'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' opplever Rob, Steelo og spesialgjest Lolo Wood at selv dommere kan oppleve stygge 'Dommertreff', at de kan bli fiskemat under 'Vannattakk og de hopper over instruksjoner i 'Anvisningskaos'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood imot høyhastighetpresanger i 'Gaver i forbifarten', opplever massiv bråstopp i 'Løperhinder' og blir opprørt av 'Kritiske mødre'.

programme.title: Andromeda: Det som ikke var
programme.desc: Tunneler oppdages på Seefra som kan brukes til å nå åtte andre Seefra-planeter.

programme.title: Andromeda: Testen
programme.desc: Når en gammel mann blir drept, er Beka, Rhade og Harper de viktigste mistenkte og stilles for retten

programme.title: Andromeda: Gjennom et glass mørkt
programme.desc: Rhade leder opprørerne i en kamp mot en krigsherre på Seefra-5.

programme.title: Andromeda: Stolthet før fallet
programme.desc: Dylan oppdager at kjæresten til Beka var Drago Musevini, og han brukte Bekas DNA til å skape Nietzscheans.

programme.title: Andromeda: Måneskinn blir deg
programme.desc: Beka og Rhade finner en test som enten gir dem stor rikdom eller driver dem til galskap.

programme.title: Andromeda: Fortiden er Prolix
programme.desc: Harper oppdager et program som kan ødelegge åtte av Seefra-planetene og drepe millioner.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within a Hair
programme.desc: In 1996, Indiana police identified Richard Alexander as the “River Park Rapist” who assaulted four women that year. Later, DNA analysis casts doubt on his conviction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: After the 1996 murder of Seattle residents Raquel Rivera and Jay Johnson, evidence from the couple's dog eventually ties one of the murderers to the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bitter Pill to Swallow
programme.desc: Soon after becoming pregnant by Dr. Maynard Muntzing, firefighter Michelle Baker's health quickly deteriorates. Eventually, she raises suspicions that Muntzing is doing her harm.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: In the 1980s, a trio of unsolved murders occurred in Wichita Falls, Texas. Later, a fourth murder from the same time period provided the police with far more than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Telltale Tracks
programme.desc: The disappearance of Philadelphia college athlete Aimee Willard is investigated after her car is found on the roadside. When her body is found, the police find unusual marks and DNA evidence that eventually lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ghost in the Machine
programme.desc: While investigating the apparent overdose suicide of Reverend Bill Guthrie's wife, detectives recover incriminating files from Bill's computer and learn of his infidelity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dressed to Kill
programme.desc: After 6-year-old Michelle Lee Dorr went missing, her father confessed to murdering her. But investigators soon poked holes in his story, leaving the case unsolved for 14 years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: The 1987 disappearance of Houston resident Tracy Jo Shine is recalled. The investigation went cold until 2000 when a "cold case squad" learned that the woman's ex-boyfriend Michael Neal had bragged about killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Metal Business
programme.desc: Doctors cannot pinpoint the source of a businessman's illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Print Conviction
programme.desc: The 1996 investigation into 48-year-old Martha Hansen's murder is helped by a legal requirement that bars have video cameras installed on the premises.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 10
programme.desc: This episode includes: Emery's Last Stand, Hansen Twin Murder (Pts. 1 & 2), Pix Of The Dead, Fatal Obsession and Baseball Amnesia.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 11
programme.desc: This episode includes: After Dinner Death, George Anderson (Pts. 1 & 2), Rudolph on the Run, Campus Murder Expose and Palm Beach Embezzler.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 12
programme.desc: This episode includes: Kilgore Isn't Here, Ground Zero, Dead Realtor, Lottery Miracle, ATM Mystery and Missing Anchorwoman.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 13
programme.desc: This episode includes: Who's Tyler?, Not Suicidal, Gordy's Ghost, Jeanne Boylan and Bowen Out.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 14
programme.desc: This episode includes: Strychnine Death, Kidnapped Executive, Murder in Connecticut, Swoops and Squats, Wandering Fishman and Major Lazarus.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 15
programme.desc: This episode includes: Mystery Robber, Magnetic Attraction (Pts. 1 & 2), Johnny Lee Wilson, Call for Help and Borden House.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hired Gun
programme.desc: When three people were found murdered in their home, it appeared like a burglary gone awry. But a crime this horrific deserved a closer look.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Moving Target
programme.desc: When a sniper in Utah started targeting African-American men for death, authorities launched a massive investigation. With scant clues and no witnesses they found the odds stacked against them, and they had no idea where the killer would strike next.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Backstage Murder
programme.desc: In the 1980's, two partners created a nightclub that would bring them wealth and international fame. The male strip club phenomenon promised female patrons fun and excitement. But the bright lights hid a dark side.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Stranger
programme.desc: The body of a young woman found burned in a truck launched a manhunt to find her killer. When more bodies began to turn up across the country, the FBI believed the cases were linked. Investigators had a suspect. They just couldn't find him.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Manhunt
programme.desc: A killer was on the loose in one of America's most popular tourist destinations. Armed and desperate, he evaded law enforcement at every turn. As the Fourth of July weekend quickly approached, thousands of people became potential targets.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Marked For Death
programme.desc: Sometimes killers are careful to leave no fingerprints behind. But methods of the murder itself can leave a lasting impression on police, especially when the tools (or weapons) of a killer's trade leave an innocent victim marked for death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Bloodlust
programme.desc: For homicide investigators, it's a race against time as they track their deadliest foe: a serial killer for whom killing is the only way to feel alive.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Random Targets
programme.desc: Most victims of multiple murderers are meticulously chosen because of a mutual connection with the killer or because they match an intricate set of criteria that fits the killer's MO.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Trial By Fire
programme.desc: At a crime scene, anything left behind or seemingly out of place is considered a clue. But a fire can extinguish everything in its path challenging forensic investigators at every turn and making each arson a trial by fire.

programme.title: The New Detectives: True Crime
programme.desc: They know as much about crime as any crime fighter, or any criminal. They're the crime writers, and through their eyes we see murder most foul.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Lady in Grey
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate ruins of The Orangery in Merseyside and claims that the ghost of a grey lady is haunting the location. They capture some of the most compelling paranormal evidence they have ever encountered.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Ghosts of the Pumping Pit
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension head to Wigan and investigate Aspull Pumping Pit. Built in 1871, the location is currently in ruins and is home to a whole host of paranormal activity. Ghostly entities make contact tonight, in an unforgettable paranormal investigation!

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Bump In The Bingo Hall
programme.desc: The team head out to Blackpool for a day out at the seaside that they will never forget. Investigating one of Blackpool's iconic buildings The Empire Bingo Hall. Many famous acts have played here and it seems that some may have never left.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Night Before The Storm
programme.desc: In this special episode, it's the night before Sean and Bex are joined by their celebrity guest and they check out The Black Horse in Pluckley Village to investigate the paranormal hauntings at the most haunted pub in the UK.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Sinister Happenings at The Village Farm Museum Part 1
programme.desc: The team heads to Lincolnshire to investigate the Village Farm Museum. This location looks out of place, being in the middle of a residential housing estate.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Sinister Happenings at The Village Farm Museum Part 2
programme.desc: This fascinating location sees a twist in the activity with Bex and Sean getting more than they bargained for.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: My Teen Daughter Wants a Baby
programme.desc: 17-year-old Naomi has undergone a sudden attitude change and is on a mission to have a baby. Parents Leeanders and April need Steve to intervene!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Stole 15 Years of My Life
programme.desc: Jennifer left home to protect herself from her stepdad Allen. 15 years later, her mother wants a second chance, but Jennifer is hesitant. Can Steve help mend this broken family?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: She Is My Property
programme.desc: Lanikka is sick and tired of her boyfriend Malcom’s abusive ways. Then, Tim’s jealousy has torn his family apart, but now he’s desperate to win them back, but will Tiffany leave him for good?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Slept With THAT Man?
programme.desc: LaShawna and her boyfriend James will learn if her friend Coral harmed her child years ago. She’ll also admit that she cheated with Coral. How will he react when he finds out another bombshell?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Better Not Fail That Test!
programme.desc: Lainie and Justin have a 9-month-old baby together. Justin hurts Lainie because he thinks she’s cheating. But how will Steve react when he confronts Justin?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: How Could You Cover for Him?
programme.desc: Gina believes that her daughter’s boyfriend Efrain is abusing her grandson. Her daughter wants to prove that Efrain is innocent, but her father Raul suspects she is covering for Efrain.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: No Good Deed
programme.desc: After a man is brutally gunned down in the middle of the street, Kenda must piece together a complicated puzzle of conflicting stories and dead ends.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My Worst Fear
programme.desc: Police are shocked to find a 13-year-old boy killed in an explosion, but their grief turns to alarm when they discover a second, unexploded bomb.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Preying on the Innocent
programme.desc: When the son of a prominent politician is murdered in his basement, Lt. Joe Kenda feels pressure from City Hall to solve the case.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Case That Haunts Me
programme.desc: As Det. Joe Kenda digs into another murder, he uncovers a world of violence and sexual fetishes, culminating in perhaps the most intense interrogation of his career.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: We Kill the Ones We Love
programme.desc: A drive-by shooting leaves Van Terry dead; to crack the case, Lt. Joe Kenda must put his faith… in a burglar.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Nine-Year-Old Hostage
programme.desc: A hostage situation puts Sgt. Joe Kenda and his team to the test, as they try to save a family without getting shot themselves.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Crime Spree
programme.desc: They swept through six states like a plague, thrill killers acting without rhyme or reason. They targeted adults and young girls, kidnapping, and murdering. And in their rampage, they left plenty of clues, but moving targets are the hardest to hit.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Manchester
programme.desc: The series returns to take a closer look at the most horrific crimes ever committed on British soil, starting with the May 2017 Manchester Arena bombing.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Ann Maguire
programme.desc: The tragic story of Ann Maguire, who was stabbed to death by a teenage pupil while teaching a Spanish lesson at Corpus Christi Catholic College in Leeds.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Gemma McCluskie
programme.desc: The harrowing story of EastEnders actress Gemma McCluskie, who was murdered by her older brother in the flat they shared in east London in 2012.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Stepping Hill
programme.desc: An inside look at the series of mysterious deaths that occurred at Stepping Hill Hospital in Stockport, Greater Manchester, in 2011.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Steven Wright
programme.desc: A closer look at the crimes of Steve Wright, who was dubbed 'The Suffolk Strangler' after murdering five women who worked as prostitutes in Ipswich in 2006.

programme.title: My Ghost Story: The Hand of Death
programme.desc: A cemetery that's home to 80,000 dead souls becomes a "ghost magnet"; a family discovers that their new home is filled with the sounds of strange footsteps and whispered conversations; and more.

programme.title: Death Walker with Nick Groff: Warwick Prison
programme.desc: Nick tries to contact the ghost of a serial killer who haunts buildings in the Warwick Prison complex.

programme.title: Death Walker with Nick Groff: Broadwell Funeral Home
programme.desc: Nick attempts to communicate with two men who died in the Broadwell Funeral Home in Ohio.

programme.title: Death Walker with Nick Groff: Old Williams County Jail
programme.desc: Nick investigates two infamous killers who may be responsible for haunting the Old Williams County Jail.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Sinister Happenings at The Village Farm Museum Part 1
programme.desc: The team heads to Lincolnshire to investigate the Village Farm Museum. This location looks out of place, being in the middle of a residential housing estate.

programme.title: Andromeda: En bekreftende flamme
programme.desc: Dylan beskytter Andromeda mot leiesoldater mens Beka begynner å lure på om de kjemper for feil side.

programme.title: Andromeda: Å miste den skjebnesvangre lynet
programme.desc: Dylan finner en romstasjon full av barn som tror at han er der for å bringe fred ved å drepe fiendene sine.

programme.title: Andromeda: D Minus Zero
programme.desc: Andromeda-mannskapet lærer fremdeles hvordan de skal samarbeide ettersom de blir angrepet av restauratørene.

programme.title: Mutant X: The Shock of the New (Pilot)
programme.desc: En mutant empat på flukt fra mystiske regjeringsagenter blir reddet av et team av andre 'nye mutanter', gruppen kjent som Mutant X.

programme.title: Mutant X: I Scream the Body Electric
programme.desc: Brennan blir fanget og faller under Eckharts kontroll, og han blir tvunget til å jobbe mot de nye mutantene.

programme.title: Mutant X: Russian Roulette
programme.desc: Mutant X kommer til hjelp av en tenåring New Mutant forfulgt av russere fordi hun har hemmeligheten til et nytt våpen som er rettet mot mutanter.

programme.title: CBS News 24/7
programme.desc: Coverage, reporting and storytelling from CBS News and Stations; a look at how news coverage comes together.

programme.title: The Takeout with Major Garrett
programme.desc: The Takeout is a new spin on the widely acclaimed podcast hosted by Major Garrett; a daily streaming show that harnesses the best of CBS News' political reporting and lives comfortably in deep discussions.

programme.title: On the Case: Path of Destruction
programme.desc: When a 14 year old girl is murdered detectives must solve several terrifying crimes before they can bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: On the Case: Twisted Lies
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, 41-year-old Nancy Menke, a mother of four, is found handcuffed and murdered in the passenger seat of her car; a records clerk in the insurance fraud unit stumbles upon a strange report that blows open Menke's murder case.

programme.title: On the Case: The Day After Christmas
programme.desc: A man and his girlfriend are attacked by a mysterious intruder in their home. Despite near fatal wounds, she survives and helps investigators solve the crime.

programme.title: On the Case: Followed Home
programme.desc: A mother of three is found shot to death inside the trunk of her car, just steps from her home.

programme.title: On the Case: 22 Hours of Terror
programme.desc: A 12-year-old girl is kidnapped during a home invasion, and police frantically search for her and her abductor. Paula Zahn explores the case.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Change of Seasons
programme.desc: When her husband quits after a blowout with Joe, Kelly is put in a terrible position. Will she stay at Buffalo - or will she go? Scott gets the news he must stand down from flying so another co-pilot can fast-track to captain.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Up In the Air
programme.desc: After her husband's acrimonious departure from Buffalo, Kelly has a confrontation that decides whether she, too, will quit. Jeremy makes a mistake that could end his Buffalo career.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Frozen Four
programme.desc: As Joe fights a Transport Canada claim against the airline, star pilot Justin is tasked with shipping an 8,000lb generator to a remote town. But a controversial decision results in the DC-4 becoming stranded and frozen solid on a High Arctic airstrip.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: When a deadly fire destroys a northern outpost a week before Christmas, Buffalo puts everything aside to come to the rescue. Cargo Manager Kelly receives a shocking diagnosis that renews her fight to quit smoking.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Under Pressure
programme.desc: The curse of -40 hits Buffalo pilots Devan and Scott on a food mail flight up the Mackenzie Valley when a mysterious rise in oil pressure threatens to destroy one of the C-46's engines.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: The Right Stuff
programme.desc: Mikey goes on a treasure hunt to Venezuela for a rare CL-215 waterbomber. Cargo Manager Kelly's stress levels hit a new high when she returns from her Mexican vacation in even worse health than when she left.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: “Drew’s D-Cluttering” Show, Marie Kondo, Rachael Ray
programme.desc: It’s “Drew’s D-Cluttering” show! Drew is joined by tidying expert Marie Kondo who shares her tips for sparking joy. Then, Rachael Ray shares kitchen staples for a clutter-less kitchen. Plus, Drew surprises one single mom with a home office makeover.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Time Management Hour, 5-Min Meals with Chef Rocco DiSpirito
programme.desc: It’s Drew’s time management hour! Time management expert Laura Vanderkam shares tips. A five-min meal with Chef Rocco DiSpirito. "The People’s Court" Judge Marilyn Milian and husband Judge John Schlesinger on balancing work and relationships effectively.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: “Queer Eye’s” Karamo Brown, Beauty In A Box, Halloween Tablescapes with Darcy Miller
programme.desc: “Queer Eye’s” Karamo Brown joins Drew. In Beauty in A Box, Drew surprises a viewer at home who is need of a quick makeup routine. Plus, celebrations expert Darcy Miller shares Halloween tablescapes to help your family celebrate the holiday this year.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Seth MacFarlane & Liz Gillies, Drew’s Surprise For Family Who Adopted 5 Siblings, The Weekender
programme.desc: Seth MacFarlane and Liz Gillies on their new album. Drew surprises Andi & Thomas Bonura, parents of three, who adopted five siblings after hearing they were separated in different foster homes. Drew gives a list of her favorite picks in “The Weekender.”

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Halloween Celebration with Adam Sandler, Pumpkin Blaze, Jill Kargman
programme.desc: Drew kicks-off her week-long Halloween celebration with Netflix’s “Hubie Halloween” star Adam Sandler. Then, actress Jill Kargman and Drew visit Pumpkin Blaze Long Island! Plus, Drew tackles dating at any age in her signature “Love Bug” segment.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Fight for Melissa
