programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark help aging movie heroes to stand up to a street gang known as Satan's Helpers. They persuade a young boxer not to throw a big fight when the gang tries to bully him.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark assist a young country singer who is hoping to follow in her mother's footsteps. Next, they help a widow mourning her late husband.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan must find a way to help Deke, a college football star whose dreams of reaching the pros are shattered by a tragic motorcycle accident.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan enlists the aid of a gymnast to rehabilitate Deke. Meanwhile, Deke's parents have been deeply affected by the accident.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A construction company tycoon now believes he's King Arthur, and his estranged son determines to have him declared incompetent. Can Jonathan work a reconciliation?

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark have been hired to look after the kids of a movie star who never has time to spend with his family.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Devalos etterforsker dødsfallet til en av hans nære venner og får hjelp av Allison, som har hatt urovekkende drømmer om en ung kvinne som ser ut til å være besatt.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Tiden er viktig når en misfornøyd arbeider som ikke har noe å tape, tar Joe og tre andre som gisler.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Devalos' venns søster blir myrdet og Allison prøver å hjelpe til med å løse forbrytelsen. Drømmene hennes ser imidlertid ikke ut til å gi mening, ettersom de fortsetter å implisere vennens første ektemann, som døde for to år siden.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison drømmer om et spøkelse som var vitne til flere drap. I mellomtiden har Ariel en merkelig reaksjon på en oppgave i helsetimen.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Mens hun jobber med en 17 år gammel forbrytelse, viser Allison uvanlig oppførsel som kan være avgjørende for å løse saken, men som samtidig setter familien hennes i fare.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison våkner under en motorvei uten å vite hvor hun er eller hvordan hun kom dit. Hennes mangel på hukommelse får henne til å begynne å tenke at hun kan ha drept noen med bilen sin.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: When Cheyenne medicine man Cloud Dancing is wounded by General Custer, who intends to hang him, Sully and Dr. Mike join forces to help him escape.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: As Dr. Mike's birthday approaches, the kids decide to do something about her unmarried status

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Matthew and Michaela are at odds over his future when he sets out to prove to others -- and to himself -- that he's a grown man ready to take on life -- and decides to marry Ingrid.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Influenced by the pulp romance novels she loves, Colleen develops her first crush -- on Sully -- and schemes a way for him to rescue her from danger.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike faces the most difficult challenge of her career when she is forced to operate on Brian after he suffers a brain injury.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 3002
programme.desc: 33 år gamle Viktoria i Norrköping har aldri hatt en heltidsjobb, men det hindrer henne ikke i å kjøpe ting på avbetaling, som hun så ignorerer å betale.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 3003
programme.desc: Emma har levd et fartsfylt liv med mye festing. For noen uker siden valgte hun å pakke ned sakene sine og flytte fra Stockholm til Helsingborg for å starte på nytt.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 3004
programme.desc: Sara og Villy i Boliden har, så lenge de kan huske, hatt mye gjeld. Det er når de innser at barna deres begynner å ta etter deres oppførsel at de blir desperate og forstår at de trenger hjelp.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 3005
programme.desc: For ti år siden døde sønnen til Johan i en tragisk drukningsulykke. Han sier selv at han ikke har bearbeidet sorgen, noe som igjen har gjort at han i dag har store økonomiske problemer.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 3006
programme.desc: Emma, som bor i Kungsbacka og er alenemor til to, driver en skjønnhetssalong med stort engasjement. Dessverre vet hun ingenting om økonomi...

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 3007
programme.desc: Selmin og Amela har tre barn som de ofte unner ting, samtidig som de sover dårlig på grunn av økonomien. De har en lang historie med å ta lån etter lån, og nå har situasjonen blitt uholdbar.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 307
programme.desc: Linn får lyst til å spraye morsmelk på alle som kommenterer negativt om amming på offentlig sted og for første gang drar hun inn til byen med Tindra. Julia og Milan besøker Julias søster Maja.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 308
programme.desc: Julia forteller om hvordan hun takler slemme kommentarer på sosiale medier. Hun får mange fine kommentarer, men det er også de som tror hun lever på Milans funksjonshemming.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 309
programme.desc: Natalie og barna drar ut i skogen for å plukke sopp, men blir tvunget til å snu når de innser at det er elgjakt. Julia snakker om graviditeten og om at hun har lyst til å bli gravid igjen.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 310
programme.desc: Fayme forteller om depresjonen etter fødselen og Colin og Leo klipper seg hos frisøren. Julia og Milan drar hjem til Julias venn for å hilse på de nye kattungene hennes.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 311
programme.desc: Milan hater å gå til tannlegen, og Julia er forberedt på det verste før dagens besøk. Fayme og Colin baker kake til Leos fest. Når kaken nesten er ferdig, nyser Colin over hele kaken.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 312
programme.desc: Linn og Tindra tar toget til Örebro for å besøke Unge Foreldre-gruppen. Linn blir sint når hun hører at de alle må tåle så mange fordommer bare fordi de er unge mødre. Milan og Julia flyr til Stockholm.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 313
programme.desc: Milan og Julia er i Stockholm for å bli fotografert for magasinet MAMA. Tindra har fylt en måned og feires med kaffe og kaker.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 314
programme.desc: Fayme har blitt diagnostisert med GAD, en angstlidelse. Hun er lettet over å ha endelig fått en diagnose og snakker om hvordan det er å leve med den.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 315
programme.desc: Julia og Milan plukker blader sammen, men hvordan håndterer Julia Milans trassalder? Fayme, venninnen Nicky og barna deres besøker Junibacken sammen.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 316
programme.desc: Milan kan fortsatt ikke gå. Julia bryter sammen når hun forteller om hvor trist hun er over situasjonen og at kroppen hennes ikke lenger orker å bære han.

programme.title: The Two Jakes
programme.desc: I etterfølgeren til Chinatown (1974) etterforsker Jake Gitters utroskap og mord... og oljepenger.

programme.title: Jade
programme.desc: Corelli er dypt involvert i en sak som kan føre til et sted han ikke vil gå. Chazz Palminteri spiller Matt, en advokat, og Corellis gamle venn. Linda Fiorentino er Matts kone Trina, en psykolog som er i stand til alt, til og med mord.

programme.title: Hard Eight
programme.desc: John, en halvsmart taper strandet i Reno, har bare noen få dollar igjen når Sydney forbarmer seg over ham, spanderer frokost og gir ham tips om hvordan man tjener penger på kasino. To år senere har John blitt Sydneys partner.

programme.title: Defiance
programme.desc: Året er 1941 og de tyske styrkene har inntatt Øst-Europa. De tre brødrene Bielski (Daniel Craig, Live Schreiber og Jamie Bell) unngår fangenskap og finner beskyttelse i den tette skogen de har kjent siden de var barn.

programme.title: The Homesman
programme.desc: Mary Bee Cuddy 'Hilary Swank' er en singel og 'voksen' dame i en liten ørkenby i Nebraska på 1800'tallet. Til tross for at hun har en betydlig sum med penger og masse land blir hun gang på gang avvist av potensielle ektemenn.

programme.title: Henrys Crime
programme.desc: Henry (KEANU REEVES) har ingen ambisjoner og sover seg gjennom livet. Men en morgen han uvitende blir deltager i et dårlig gjennomført bankran, får han en oppvåkning, og tar på seg straffen. I fengselet blir han venn med Max (JAMES CAAN).

programme.title: A Christmas Feast
programme.desc: Det er jul og familien Oliverio gjør seg klare til De Syv Fiskers Middag, en italiensk kulinarisk tradisjon som har sine røtter fra gamlelandet. Midt i forberedelsene undrer Tony, en ung mann med store drømmer, om han vil finne kjærligheten i julen.

programme.title: Orange County
programme.desc: Shaun trives som en smart, men ufokusert surfer, helt til han oppdager en roman av den anerkjente forfatteren Martin Skinner. Han blir inspirert, og forlater Orange County for å studere kreativ skriving ved Stanford University.

programme.title: Howard Stern'S Edle Deler
programme.desc: Edle Deler følger Howard Sterns fantastiske transformasjon fra skolenerd til mediesuperstjerne.

programme.title: Red Dawn
programme.desc: Når en amerikansk by blir invadert av nordkoreanske soldater, kommer en gruppe unge mennesker sammen for å beskytte hverandre, frigjøre byen og gjenvinne sin frihet.

programme.title: Taken
programme.desc: Den tidligere agenten Bryan Mills begynner de lengste 96 timene i sitt liv når han tar opp jakten på mennene som kidnappet datteren hans.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Eleanor Rigby: Them
programme.desc: Engang var Conor og Eleanor lykkelig gift. Nå føler de seg fremmed for hverandre, og i kjølevannet av en tragisk hendelse lengter de etter å finne tilbake til det liv og den kjærligheten de engang hadde.

programme.title: Sweet Carolina
programme.desc: Josie vender tilbake til den lille hjembyen sin da hun uventet blir verge for niesen og nevøen sin. Der møter hun Cooper, kjæresten fra high school.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: 1905 Hand-crank Thomas Edison gramophone with cylindrical records; a discontinued Addictor 190 Mini Boat; a rare 1897 Regina music box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Mr. Haff Goes to Washington
programme.desc: Ton and Allen invade the Nation's capital, but meet strong resistance from local bidders. The guys uncover a Civil War era black powder revolver and a stash of South African gold coins!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Smoking Ton
programme.desc: WW2 Stuart M3 tank barrel and heavy duty tank treads; rare, collectors' 1890 silver inlayed humidor; high-end industrial meat slicer in the ultimate restaurant unit.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Voodoo Moola
programme.desc: Allen & Ton hit a storage auction in Louisiana's Capitol City and quickly find themselves in trouble with the law! The guys uncover a pair of racing lawnmowers and then stumble on an antique barber chair from the early 1900s!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Diesel Digs
programme.desc: The guys head to the industrial hub of LA to score some heavy machinery and unearth a 1981 Bobcat 743 Frontloader, one of the first powered by a diesel engine and a trench-defending WWI German Sturmtrupp helmet bashing mace.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hidden Hot Wheels
programme.desc: Ton and Allen challenge a big time auction buyer on his home turf. The guys uncover a 1969 Chevelle Malibu muscle car and a single-shot pistol designed to aid Allied resistance fighters during WWII.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Real Thing
programme.desc: Allen and Ton compete with a notorious deep-pocketed bidder in Oxnard, CA, and score a vintage Coca-Cola vending machine, a vintage desk and a rare 1971 GMC truck.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: High Flying Ton
programme.desc: A nerdy auction buyer tests Ton and Allen's patience at a big container auction in Ventura. The guys discover a basket and burners for a hot air balloon and a 19th century German single shot rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Viva la Vegas
programme.desc: 1974 death-defying Zig Zag magic sword box, an ultra-rare 1910 poster of the infamous magician Chung Ling Soo, an 1800s naval cane sword and century-old Metlach German beer steins.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Driller Instinct
programme.desc: Ton & Allen encounter aggressive outdoorsmen in the Alaskan wilderness. The guys discover an 8-wheeled ATV that travels on both land & water and an air percussion hammer that can drill through solid rock!

programme.title: A Chestnut Family Christmas
programme.desc: En privat kokk må finne på noe for å imponere den ambisiøse familien hennes før de kommer for å tilbringe jul med henne.

programme.title: The Winter Palace
programme.desc: En forfatter med et alvorlig tilfelle av skrivesperre, får sjansen til å fullføre boken sin på et tomt vinterslott.

programme.title: A Country Christmas Harmony
programme.desc: Ekskjærestene Luke og Chrissy, tidligere en countrymusikkduo, støter på hverandre år etter at Chrissy forlot Luke sporløst - og innser at de bare kan komme seg gjennom ferien med hverandres hjelp.

programme.title: Bel Ami
programme.desc: Georges Duroy (Robert Pattinson) er en attraktiv og hensynsløs sjarmør som manipulerer seg til toppen av 1890-tallets Paris.

programme.title: Results
programme.desc: Personlige trenere (Cobie Smulders og Guy Pearce) blir gitt i oppdrag å få en nyrik og svært umotivert klient (Kevin Corrigan) i form. Deres tre liv blir raskt uløselig sammenknyttet, både profesjonelt og personlig.

programme.title: Delirious
programme.desc: Les er kjendisfotograf og er avhengig av blinkskudd for å overleve. Toby Grace (Michael Pitt) er uteligger og avhengig av veldedighet for å overleve. En dag møtes disse to tilfeldig og et slags vennskap på godt og vondt utvikler seg dem imellom.

programme.title: 30 Dager I Mørke
programme.desc: Under det årlige månedslange polarmørket blir en liten by i Alaska angrepet av en gjeng vampyrer som herjer og ødelegger. Mens kaos senker seg over byen, kjemper sheriffen og kona hans for å redde familien sin.

programme.title: We Need to Do Something
programme.desc: Melissa og familien hennes låser seg inne på badet under en storm, når et tre faller gjennom huset og blokkerer døren. Fanget uten mulighet for kontakt med omverdenen begynner det provisoriske ly å ligne mer og mer på en dødsfelle...

programme.title: Ginger Snaps
programme.desc: En tenåringsjente forsøker å hindre søsteren sin fra å bli til en varulv.

programme.title: Ghost In The Shell
programme.desc: I år 2029 er en kvinnelig kyberagent på sporet av "Dukkemesteren" – et datavirus som kan invadere kybernetiske hjerner og endre offerets minner.

programme.title: Ghost In The Shell 2.0
programme.desc: A film that has spawned a thousand imitations but never been bettered – Mamoru Oshii's legendary anime film Ghost in the Shell returns in a stunning new edition remastered by Oshii himself with the original animations.

programme.title: Tetsuo II: Body Hammer
programme.desc: Tre år etter Metal Fetisjistens forvandling ser kontorarbeideren Taniguchi Tomoo verden falle sammen når skinheads kidnapper sønnen hans. Tvunget til å frigjøre sin destruktive kraft, forvandles han til en grusom symbiose av metall og vev.

programme.title: Sharknado 4: The 4th Awakens
programme.desc: Five years after the wave of sharknados that wracked the east coast, our heroes are living a quiet life- as far away from sharks as possible. But when a sand sharknado hits Vegas, Fin is thrown back into action, fighting sharknados across the country

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 309
programme.desc: Ditte har brukt 120 000 kroner på å få større bryster - som er asymmetriske. Eva har fått utført en brystreduksjon, men føler seg nå mer maskulin enn feminin.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 802
programme.desc: For første gang i programmets historie har både mor og datter havnet i et plastisk mareritt, og begge trenger hjelp.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 302
programme.desc: I dagens episode møter vi bl.a. Isabella, som fikk utført brystforstørring som 18-åring for å ligne Pamela Anderson, men som i dag sitter igjen med to steinharde kuler på brystkassen.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 104
programme.desc: Pernille får kick av å få utført plastisk kirurgi, men armene hennes er vansiret av store arr. Mille drømmer om at de feilopererte brystene hennes blir fiksa før bryllupet.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 205
programme.desc: I denne episoden møter vi bl.a. Dianne, som fikk fjernet brystene grunnet mistanke om kreft, men som nå lever alene fordi hun føler seg utilpass, og Anette, som fikk foretatt en hudoperasjon i utlandet.

programme.title: World of Love Island
programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.

programme.title: World of Love Island
programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 701
programme.desc: I det nordlige vinterlandskapet må Anton stoppe transporten av et tungt toglokomotiv når tilhengeren går i stykker. Elin, en melkebilsjåfør, starter dagen rolig, helt til en melkeslange ryker og kaos oppstår.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 702
programme.desc: For Denkan fra Göteborg blir transporten et mareritt. Etter å ha reparert en lekk bremseklokke blinker lysene rødt. Bremsene overopphetes, og han må skynde seg dit med et brannslukningsapparat.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 703
programme.desc: Kellys stressende dag blir verre når det viser seg at flere bedrifter holder stengt på grunn av ferien. Emina må rekke en fotballkamp, men det blir full stopp hos den første kunden da hun ikke kommer seg inn på lageret.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 704
programme.desc: Når Roine laster okser, nekter de å gå opp på lastebilen. Og det er ikke lett å få okser på 1100 kg til å adlyde. Emina leverer fisk i sommervarmen, men havner bak saktegående feriegjester.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 705
programme.desc: Tove dekker opp for vikarer som har sommerferie og jobber derfor på dagtid. De nye arbeidstidene i det sommerlige Småland byr på andre problemer enn vanlig.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 706
programme.desc: Kranfører Carl har blitt bedt om å flytte en havnekran som veier nesten 200 tonn og er 33 meter høy. Men arbeidet må brått avbrytes fordi det er fare for at kranen kan velte når en del mangler.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The competition heats up as "America's Next Top Model" returns, featuring male and female aspiring models competing for a career-launching prize package. The contestants participate in their first runway show.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The models have to compete in a vertical runway down the side of a building in the pouring rain.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The models get a lesson in chemistry as they pose alongside sexy supermodels Alessandra Ambrossio and Rob Evans in a risque photo shoot.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The models have their balance tested when they have to walk on a spinning runway during a turntable challenge judged by the editor-in-chief of Nylon Magazine, Marvin Scott Jarrett.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Tensions run high when some of the models accuse another of abusing her power in the house. The guys and girls act as fashion correspondents in a challenge led by celebrity blogger Perez Hilton.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Getting The DCC Look
programme.desc: For å være en DCC må man se ut som en DCC. Denne uken skal Kelli sørge for at alle jentene har den rette looken. De begynner med en makeover og jentene drar til snobbete Halcyon Salon for å få nye frisyrer.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Time To Get Serious
programme.desc: Kandidatene starter sin sjette uke og de må begynne å se ut som DCC, eller så kan de risikere å miste plassene sine. Melissa Rycroft og tidligere DCC Tina Kalina vikarierer for Judy og Kelli for å se kandidatene med nye øyne.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: A Lucid Dream
programme.desc: Det er tre jenter igjen å sende hjem og den første kampen er rett rundt hjørnet, så trykket er enormt når jentene vender tilbake til AT&T Stadium for å innta banen for første gang siden uttaket.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: The Payoff
programme.desc: Det er treningsleirens siste dag og alle er nervøse for at Kelli og Judy skal velge ut en tropp med færre enn 36 medlemmer. Etter noen tøffe beslutninger forvandles skrekk til glede når sluttroppen kunngjøres.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Dare To Dream
programme.desc: Denne sesongen har 400 jenter våget å drømme stort at de kan bli en av de verdensberømte Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders. De satser alt når de preliminære uttakene for 2015-2016-troppen begynner.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Dance Your Heart Out
programme.desc: Tjuetre veteraner melder seg på uttaket for å konkurrere mot 59 nybegynnere som vil ta plassene deres. Talent og utseende er ikke nok for å sikre en plass i troppen. Drømmer både går i oppfyllelse og knuses når kun 46 kommer seg til leiren.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 5
programme.desc: Battling to keep the flow of patients moving is Sister Jane Hawksworth but she’s got a problem. They’re two porters down and it’s causing a backlog, but the emergencies keep arriving.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 6
programme.desc: We spend an eventful night shift with Barnsley Hospital’s Casualty team. Evenings are a peak time for road traffic collisions and the most critical cases are blue lit straight to Casualty.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 7
programme.desc: Registrar Doctor Ashleigh Trimble takes the next call from paramedics. 81-year-old Roy is being blue lighted in, after falling over and landing badly on one of his artificial hips.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 8
programme.desc: With an already busy department, Nurse Chloe Wesley answers the red emergency phone. A 23-month-old toddler is being rushed in with suspected sepsis, a life-threatening condition that attacks the internal organs.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 9
programme.desc: Registrar Doctor Rob Cornford heads straight to Resus to treat 58-year-old window-fitter Craig who’s been blue-lighted in. He was working on a ladder on the first floor of a house when he fell and was knocked unconscious.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 1
programme.desc: In this brand-new series of Dirty Home Rescue, Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Toni from Telford whose house is so dirty her partner of 10 years, Rich, won’t move in with her.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 2
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Bill and Antionette from Newport, who share their home with their 3 cats. They admit they’ve not deep cleaned their home since they moved in.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 3
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of married couple Lynne and Keith from Chudleigh in South Devon whose house hasn’t had a deep clean since they moved in nearly 20 years ago.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 2
programme.desc: From the outside 69-year-old Barbara’s house in Braintree looks like any other on the street, but she wasn’t always a hoarder, as the tragic deaths of her husband and son sent her life spiraling out of control.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 3
programme.desc: In West London, former exotic dancer Dione’s flat is bursting at the seams with a lifetimes collection of memorabilia and hand me down relics. Help is at hand as deep cleaning arrive to clear the hoard.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 4
programme.desc: In the South Wales Valleys, 42-year-old Phillip has it all, he runs a successful business, he’s in a long-term relationship, he owns his own home and... he has a rat infested, humongous hoard.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 2
programme.desc: A trailer laden with 29-tonnes of gym weights has rolled over on a busy roundabout. Lantern boss Lee and his team rush to the scene to get the trailer upright using two heavy recovery vehicles.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 3
programme.desc: Lantern Recovery Operator, Michael risks life and limb when a worrying call comes in concerning a broken down lorry on one of the busiest stretches of the M25.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 4
programme.desc: On the A1 motorway northbound, recovery op Jason is in a 4am race against time to remove a stranded lorry before rush hour begins. It's suffered an electrical fire on its underside, but what first appears a straight forward recovery is anything but.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 5
programme.desc: A trucking disaster strikes on a country road when a 44-tonne truck, loaded with frozen chips, careers into a ditch and ends up resting dangerously on its side.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 6
programme.desc: Crouch Recovery op Steve Hodges gets the call that a truck is stranded in a park. The stricken vehicle is stuck on a wet and muddy field that has become incredibly soft due to heavy rainfall.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Buddy, Teddy, and Matilda
programme.desc: Lab/Staffordshire mix unfriendly to small animals; a poodle that can't stop running in circles; bulldog obsessed with attaching skateboard wheels.

programme.desc: Et timelangt spesialprogram midt i sesongen som oppsummerer familiefeider, svik blant bestevenner og umistelige øyeblikk fra denne sesongens New Beginnings.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Burying The Past
programme.desc: Etter nesten et år fra hverandre, gjenforenes gjengen for å begrave fortiden og starte på nytt. Brody prøver å samle kropp og sjel og fokusere på å gjøre det godt igjen etter å ha slått opp med Kaitlynn

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Best Friends Kissing
programme.desc: Brody og Audrina utforsker en ny romanse. Brandon er klar for å utvikle forholdet ytterligere. Heidi og Spencer kjemper for å bli enige om familieforøkning og må avreagere. Jason og Ashley får skjellsettende nyheter.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: The Queen Has Arrived
programme.desc: Lateysha og David når bunnen da reality-dronningen Tiffany Pollard skaper dramatikk ved å avsløre Davids ekte følelser for Lateysha. Og to ekser forlater villaen for godt.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Battle of the Divas
programme.desc: Følelsene gnistrer da Victoria slites mellom Michael og en nyankommet. Lateysha eksploderer da Marissa flørter med David, og Joey fremfører en romantisk rap for Lorena.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Heartbreak
programme.desc: Den mest dramatiske og følelsesladde ankomsten noensinne gir Lorena hjertesorg, men blir det slutten for JOLO? Michael stoler på Ellie, men kommer han til å glemme Victoria?

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Joeys usikkerhet får overtaket da Lorena vil legge an på Patrick. David ber endelig Lateysha om unnskyldning og sjokkerende doble ekser kommer på stranden.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Calum's Choice
programme.desc: TOT gjør så Calum sender hjem en av eksene sine, Georgia blir sentimental med Ashley. Michael og Ellie blir nærmere "venner" og en overraskende kjendis er på gang.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Miles and the Mob Wife
programme.desc: Den nye kjendisen, Miles, gjør inntrykk på Marissa. David må kle på seg igjen og jentene må fatte en tøff avgjørelse.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Louis' Subaru Impreza.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Andrew's Cadillac Fleetwood Hearse.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1978 Cadillac Sedan DeVille
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen Niles Cadillac Sedan DeVille. Nile ruller hjem i en mørkerosa metallic bil med bagasjerommet fullt av nye sko.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1986 Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet Logans Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme. Logan ruller hjem med basketgulv og lakk i to farger.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1992 Honda Civic
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet Christines Honda Civic. Tre dager etter at avsnittet med Christine ble sendt, døde en nær slektning av magekreft.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1990 Mitsubishi Mirage
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Antwons Mitsubishi Mirage. Antwon ruller hjem på 18-tommersdekk og med et akvarium i baksetet.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1967 Ford Mustang
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper West Coast Customs Marys Ford Mustang. Bilen hennes utstyres med det aller nyeste innen flatskjerm-tv.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1985 Ford Ranger
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Jareds Ford Ranger. Jared ruller i vei tre tommer lavere, nylakkert i metallic oransje.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Pontiac Trans Am
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper West Coast Customs Danelles Pontiac Trans Am. Hun triller i vei i en bil utstyrt med kaffetrakter og krystallkrone.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1974 Chevy Luv
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Neils Chevrolet LUV Truck. Han triller av gårde i et campingtelt på hjul.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1989 Ford Mustang
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Shondas Ford Mustang Convertible. Hun ruller i vei i et pimpet og helt trafikksikkert kjøretøy.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Punch Drunk Love
programme.desc: John eksploderer når forholdet med Julia endres. Asaf og Francesca vet ikke hvor de står når en tur til Boom Boom Room'et mislykkes. Kaylen slipper en bombe om sitt forhold til Gio som sjokkerer huset.

programme.title: Are You The One?: She Don't Want You
programme.desc: John tar av når Stephen prøver seg på Julia. Tori og Camille er begge ute etter den samme fyren. Presset er stort for de 'gylne parene' som skal i Truth Booth.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: Huset er i opprør når Gio og Kaylens perfekte forhold begynner å rakne. Asaf sover med feil person.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Beer Goggles
programme.desc: Eventyret om Gio og Kaylen skaper uro i gjengen når Gio gjør tegn til å ville prøve seg på Julia, og alle de andre jentene i huset. Cam og Victoria tilbringer en natt sammen som ikke er verdt å huske.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Mammas' Boys
programme.desc: Guttene avslører sine myke sider når mødrene deres avslører pinlig informasjon. Stephen blir mer og mer paranoid på grunn av Gios interesse for Julia. Francesca blir fanget i Gios ulvehi.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Pulling Punches
programme.desc: En Adam og Eva-fest fører til sjalusi når parene blandes. Det dannes en kjærlighets-sekskant og slagene faller når John, Tyler, Stephen og Gio prøver å få orden på sin forvirrede hjerter.

programme.title: MTV Teen Mom
programme.desc: Opplev de dramatiske øyeblikkene når de unge mødrene takler hverdagslige utfordringer eller opplever uforglemmelige øyeblikk. Det er uavbrutt drama hele dagen, hver dag.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams must pick a team leader for the next dinner service; a chef serves an undercooked dish; a contestant is eliminated.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Contestants from each team must work in pairs and present a unique pizza dish to Ramsay; the losers clean up and prepare both kitchens for dinner service, while the winners go to a luxurious hotel; one team runs out of a crucial ingredient.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The team that prepares the most-impressive Southern-inspired menu for a sorority's anniversary party wins a trip to Las Vegas; both teams struggle with communication during dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The contestants are given 30 minutes to create an entrée from surprise ingredients; Ramsay conducts one-on-one evaluations.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The contestants visit one of Gordon Ramsay's restaurants; the teams prepare meals inspired by Ramsay's cuisine; the contestants face elimination.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: A team competition tests the contestants' knowledge of pork, with the winners receiving an indoor sky-diving experience; during dinner service, both teams face struggles.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Middelalderforbrytelser
programme.desc: Sofistikerte innbruddstyver som utgir seg for å være riddere fra middelalderen, ankommer Texas.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Legender
programme.desc: En mafiaboss’ sønn drar på drapstokt etter at Alex stiller faren hans for retten.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Utrygg hastighet
programme.desc: Sydney og Gage bruker sine undercoverevner for å spille MC-folk for å infiltrere en meth-gjeng.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Uten en lyd
programme.desc: Gage kommer nærmere Sydney da han ikke kan høre, mens biltyver lager kaos i Texas.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker og rangerne må stoppe en gjeng som bytter stjålne diamanter mot våpen.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Vaklende rangere
programme.desc: Alex og Walker gjør barnerommet klart mens de venter på at babyen skal komme.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Good Riddance
programme.desc: Trekanten blir mer intens når Ronnie tar Sammy i å gi nummeret sitt til en annen gutt. En deltaker velger å forlate The Shore for godt.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Destiny's Child, Taylor Hawkins, P.O.D.
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of P.O.D., Destiny's Child and Taylor Hawkins with Chad Smith.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Snoop Dogg, Jeremy Popoff, Silkk The Shocker
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of Snoop Dogg, LIT and Silkk the Shocker.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Pamela Anderson, K - CI, Jojo
programme.desc: Starting in sunny Southern California, Cribs pays a visit to Pamela Anderson's spectacular beach-front home.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Moby, Xzibit, Brett Michaels
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of Moby, Bret Michaels and Xzibit.

programme.title: Made: Mixed Martial Artists
programme.desc: Sabrina and Jenna are best friends and the biggest girly girls in their school. They want to shed their spoiled images and be MADE into tough, disciplined Mixed Martial Artists.

programme.title: Made: Boxer
programme.desc: Cheerleading princess Erin wants to get tough by becoming a burley boxer. Can boxing trainer Kenny Porter get Erin ready to fight in the showcase of the stars in just 5 weeks?

programme.title: Made: Rockstar
programme.desc: Obsessively organized Jessica wants to show that she can let loose by being MADE into a rockstar.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Psychic
programme.desc: The team must trick a crooked investment promoter into endorsing $80 million in stolen stocks and then getting them back from him.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Survivors
programme.desc: A grave threat to national security is posed when an enemy agent (Albert Paulsen) kidnaps two of the three key scientists who collectively know the formula for the cobalt bomb.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Trek
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force matches wits with a hijacker and a disloyal prison commandant.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Bank
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force is dispatched to Berlin's East Zone.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Operation Heart
programme.desc: The IMF races against time to convince the president (Pernell Roberts) of a small country that his chief of secret police plans to overthrow the government and seize power.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Slave pt. 1
programme.desc: The IMF is called upon to end an inhuman situation which the United Nations has been unable to abolish: slave trade in the country of Elkabar, ruled by King Ibn Borca.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 503
programme.desc: Tina og Danni solgte rekkehuset sitt i den tro at de snart skulle finne det rette huset. Men sånn gikk det ikke. Paret er utrolig kresne, og har høye krav. Kan ekspertene skape hjemmet som Tina og Danni drømmer om?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 504
programme.desc: Laura og Jesper og Jespers to barn leier i Humlebæk, og de er mildt sagt lei av det. De mangler plass, hage - og de vil også ha barn sammen snart. Men to års husjakt har ikke gitt resultat.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 505
programme.desc: Ulla og Kristian bor i en vakker herskapsleilighet på Frederiksberg med sine to barn. Men de vil ha mer plass i et barnevennlig nabolag, innom sykkelavstand fra sentrum. Kan Tobias Edlev-Nielsen finne et hus til dem?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 506
programme.desc: En liten leiebolig i Vanløse og to små barn - ikke den beste kombinasjonen. Lisa og Erling drømmer om et stort hus med en stor hage. Tobias må jobbe hardt, da drømmene er mye større enn budsjettet.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: North Denmark
programme.desc: North Jutland has a rich culinary history. The unique conditions have created equally unique products. Tareq meets local food entrepreneurs who have learned to adapt to this ever changing environment and putting this region on the culinary map.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Uppsala
programme.desc: Uppsala is the city of knowledge: home to the oldest university in Scandinavia. It’s a wonderful agricultural area surrounded by fertile flatlands. Tareq discovers the historical treasures of Uppsala and its thriving culinary life.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: North Sealand
programme.desc: North Zealand has been a playground of the rich and famous since the fifteenth century. Tareq learns how this beautiful north eastern part of Denmark is the perfect place to go foraging for wild berries and herbs.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Åre
programme.desc: Sweden’s largest ski resort Åre is well known for its local ingredients, boasting the highest number of organic food producers per capita in Sweden. The fresh water and clean air create unique conditions for growing excellent food.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: The Danish Lakelands
programme.desc: The Danish Lakelands produce some of the finest ingredients that you can find. Tareq has a go at an old cooking technique from New Zealand called Hangi - using heated rocks buried in a pit oven.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: West Sweden
programme.desc: Gothenburg on the west coast of Sweden has recently been discovered as an exciting destination by both international travel journalists and food bloggers. Tareq tracks down an old army barracks which has been converted into a world class cheese factory.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Luleå
programme.desc: Tareq visits Luleå, home to the beautiful Tree Hotel: a collection of treehouses built by an award winning architect. Following the river further up into the mountains he reaches the land where, for centuries, the Sami people kept their reindeer herds.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Halmstad
programme.desc: In Halmstad Tareq explores the contrast between the busy summer scene at the beach and the quiet rural country life, meeting Jörgen Persson: award winning table tennis player and visiting a village famous for its cheese.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Family Means Family
programme.desc: Feststemning råder når Jay overraskende kommer på party-besøk. Charlottes følelser for Gaz går opp og ned, Vicky sjekker og konkurransene om tittelen superpuler går så det suser når alle jeneter i Sydney er på radaren til Scotty og Gaz - supergutta!

programme.title: Geordie Shore: House Divides
programme.desc: James og Gaz krangler om krafttaket, noe som får alle Geordierne til å tilte helt og Gaz tvinges å forlate huset. Men er det å bli bortvist så ille? Gaz og Scotty unngår straffen og oppdager hva som virkelig fins i Australias krattskog.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Vicky Meets Dan
programme.desc: Mens Australias mest veltrente fyr sender jentene til himmels og klubblivet tar en stygg vending, drar Gary inn i bushen. Charlotte får en åpenbaring, Vicky kommer i ekstase og Scotty T nyter straffen sin ørlite gran for mye.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Anger Management
programme.desc: Gruppen får undervisning i sinnemestring, og Charlotte slipper ut alle sine negative følelser for Gaz. Sophie og Joel blir for fulle og skjemmer ut gruppen i løpet av en utekveld.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Pie Shop Argument
programme.desc: James og Garys utfall mot hverandre sender sjokkbølger gjennom huset og Charlotte mykner og kommer til Garys forsvar. En hemmelig singeltur til Whitsundays ender i katastofe og gutta må ta tak i en lite hyggelig penisblokkering.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Goodbye Australia
programme.desc: Tiden i Sydney er i ferd med å ta slutt og singlene gjør det til sitt kall å få en stormende kveld på Whitsunday-øyene. Vickey og Fit Dan har en pågående date. Får Gary og Charlotte avsluttet en gang for alle?

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Blues, Balls, & Brawls
programme.desc: Jenny planlegger en overraskelsesfest på Rogers bursdag som faller litt i fisk. Deena prøver ut Danny som kjøttbolle. Vennegjengen befinner seg plutselig midt i et digert basketak på klubben og en av dem meies ned i håndgemengen.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Merp Walk
programme.desc: Jenny får vite omfanget av skaden sin. Mike vurderer å gå et skritt videre i forholdet til Paula. Når Deena holder kjøttbolle-auditioner, ender det med at hun selv triller ut av panna og rett ned i bålet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Let's Make it Official
programme.desc: Jenni lurer på hvordan det går mellom henne og Roger og forstår at de kanskje er verre ute og kjøre enn hun trodde. Mike vil ta forholdet med Paula et skritt videre...til han får virkeligheten i fanget.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Great Meatballs of Fire
programme.desc: Mike prøver å tilpasse seg å være i et forhold, men blir forvirret rundt hvordan reglene egentlig funker. Deena går tilbake til sitt liv som kjøttbolle, men må kjempe med nebb og klør for sine festrettigheter.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Control the Crazy
programme.desc: Sammi konfronterer Deena med hennes kjøttbolleutbrudd og de blir stående og stange. Mike og kompisene blir kjent med Paulas "ville" side, og Mike vet ikke helt om han kan takle det.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Make it Unofficial
programme.desc: Jenni planlegger en babyfest for Nicole og inviterer alle kameratene. Gutta støtter Mike som vil slå opp med Paula, og blir med ham for å oppleve øyeblikket fra første rad.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Legacies
programme.desc: Upon returning to "The World Below" upon the knowledge of some of ex-tunnel inhabitants being murdered, Father encounters Gregory Coyle who seeks revenge for the death of his father by cave-in 20 years ago.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Once Upon a Time in the City of New York
programme.desc: Attacked, mutilated and left for dead, Catherine Chandler is rescued by the mysterious man-beast called Vincent.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Terrible Savior
programme.desc: Witness descriptions of a vigilante lead Catherine to fear Vincent may be a killer.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Siege
programme.desc: Vincent helps the residents of an apartment building defend their homes against thugs who want them out so the land can be re-developed.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: No Way Down
programme.desc: Injured in an explosion, Vincent is captured by a vicious street gang.

programme.title: JAG: Need to Know
programme.desc: As a favor from Congresswoman Lillian Dorning, SECNAV Sheffield asks the JAG staff to get the story of a submarine, USS Angel Shark (SSGN-559), which was lost on a CIA mission in 1968.

programme.title: JAG: Friendly Fire
programme.desc: Harm serves as a judge and Mac is the contentious prosecutor in a case fraught withpolitical implications when an American aviator is charged with killing three Britishsoldiers during a flight mission in Afghanistan.

programme.title: JAG: Shifting Sands
programme.desc: When a Gulf War MIA victim is found as the sheik’s wife in a nomadic Arab tribe, Bud prosecutes and Mac defends her against charges of desertion and, in a stunning turn of events, treason. Harm tries to get his old job back but is turned away.

programme.title: JAG: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: Mac defends and Turner prosecutes in the case of a special op marine who, during an Iraqi mission, may have deserted his team for his own survival. Harm takes on a CIA training assignment in a mach six craft that soon has him in danger.

programme.title: JAG: Close Quarters
programme.desc: Back at JAG, Harm is flooded with cases but still wants to help out an 80-year-old veteran accused of robbery. Meanwhile, Turner takes on an assignment in a sub whose crew has rescued possible defecting North Koreans.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Aerobic April/ The Wager/ Story Of The Century
programme.desc: April Lopez (Charo) returns and gets the crew bent out of shape while two women complicate a wager between brothers.

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Last Heist/ Starting Over/ Watching The Master
programme.desc: Doc's plans for romance with a beautiful woman are ruined by his ex-wife's fiance and Judy's newly divorced friend shares a secret.

programme.title: The Love Boat: By Hook Or By Crook/ Revenge With The Proper Stranger/ Don't Get Mad, Get Even
programme.desc: Gopher and Isaac think that Judy's love interest has a shady past and a consumer advocate does not approve of his wife's business ventures.

programme.title: The Love Boat: London-Paris Cruise/ My Mother, My Chaperone/The Present/The Death and Life of Sir Alfred Demerest - Part 1
programme.desc: A renowned author disapproves of her daughter's affair with a married man, while a mother reveals to her son the truth about his famous father.

programme.title: The Love Boat: London-Paris Cruise/ My Mother, My Chaperone/The Present/The Death and Life of Sir Alfred Demerest - Part 2
programme.desc: A renowned author disapproves of her daughter's affair with a married man, while a mother reveals to her son the truth about his famous father.

programme.title: Happy Days: Nose is for News
programme.desc: To prove to his college journalism professor that he has what it takes to be a good investigative reporter, Richie gets down and dirty to expose who's behind an illegal garbage collection scheme.

programme.title: Happy Days: My Fair Fonzie
programme.desc: Snobby Cynthia Holmes schemes with her obnoxious cousin, Skippy, to make the Fonz look foolish at a country club soirée.

programme.title: Happy Days: Bye Bye Blackball
programme.desc: Richie, Ralph, and Potsie endure the harassment of "hell week" to prove themselves worthy to enter their college fraternity, Phi Kappa Nu.

programme.title: Happy Days: Joanie's First Kiss
programme.desc: Sophomore Joanie Cunningham gets basic back-seat defense tips from Richie and Fonzie before her first "car date" with a senior boy, and then cramps her older brother's style when she and her date show up at his college "make-out" party.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Almost Dies
programme.desc: What begins as a humorous escapade with a motorcycle turns into a tragic vigil for the Cunninghams and their friends.

programme.title: Happy Days: Do You Want to Dance
programme.desc: Fonzie's latest romantic interest, a ballet teacher, is secretly yearning to turn professional and dance with the greats in New York. Fonzie, however, has trouble accepting that she may forgo their relationship to pursue her dreams of fame.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fearless Malph
programme.desc: When Ralph Malph is hypnotized to cure his fright after a tornado warning is posted, Ralph's loss of fear causes him to tempt fate by suggesting that the Fonz needs training wheels for his stupid motorcycle

programme.title: Happy Days: Smokin' Ain'T Cool
programme.desc: Joanie believes she has to smoke to fit in with the cool girls. She ignores the pleas from her family to stop, until the Fonz defines what cool really means

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie's Blindness
programme.desc: In a poignant, change-of-pace episode titled Fonzie's Blindness, Al barges through the kitchen door at the drive-in and hits Fonzie in the head with a tray of food.

programme.title: MacGyver: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: MacGyver teams up with the sister of a murdered friend to expose a diamond heist operation that they suspect is the work of a diplomat, using his status to shield him from suspicion and arrest.

programme.title: MacGyver: Gx-1
programme.desc: Working behind the iron curtain to destroy the wreckage of a top-secret jet, MacGyver comes to the aid of a renowned Russian psychic who wishes to defect.

programme.title: MacGyver: Jack in the Box
programme.desc: MacGyver and old buddy Jack Dalton are arrested and thrown into a labor camp, only to discover they are being used by the local authorities to search for some hidden bank robbery loot.

programme.title: MacGyver: Widowmaker
programme.desc: MacGyver and Nikki are trapped by old nemesis Murdoc and are forced to flee down the side of a sheer rock formation where an old friend of MacGyver's lost her life.

programme.title: MacGyver: Hell Week
programme.desc: MacGyver comes to the aid of college student David Ryman, distraught over losing a Physics contest sponsored by David's father, a professor at MacGyver's alma mater.

programme.title: MacGyver: Blow Out
programme.desc: Nikki unknowingly becomes the target of an international terrorist group, planning to detonate bombs across the city in exchange for the release of their recently imprisoned leader.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve assigns Amy Devlin and Taylor Lucas, two police officers from the Vice Squad, to assist in solving the homicide of local pimp Milton Wilder. However, Taylor convinces her partner to take a temporary detour on their way to the investigation.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The new attending physician, Kate Delibe, is causing a stir at Community General with her unorthodox methods of care. Delibe assists terminally ill patient George Dugan's suicide against Dr. Sloan's wishes.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: As Lou Summers heads to the comedy club to host Mark's Man of the Year Roast, a driver in a nearby car shoots at him and misses, but Lou doesn't hear it because his hearing aids aren't on.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Sloan is caught between family and professional loyalties as his brother Stacy, and medical student Daniel, are both implicated in a mysterious series of events that end in an accidental death.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve responds to a call where earlier a man chased another man out of a store with a gun.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When Dr. Wesley, Dean of the medical school, is arrested for sale of narcotics, she pleads her innocence to Mark. Meanwhile, Mark's student Quinn and neighbor Jennifer plan to marry.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Snooki gjør store fremskritt i å finne sine biologiske foreldre. Paulys 'store spill' er endelig her.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Det spraker fortsatt mellom Angelina og Nicole.når Las Vegas-turnèen nesten er over, Klarer gjengen seg uskadd ut av Vegas?

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Jenni åpner seg som aldri før. Mike og Lauren er på nære nippet. Mens krangelen mellom Angelina og Nicole vokser, er tiden inne for en fredsfest.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: JWOWWs fredsfest går ikke som planlagt. Pauly lærer Nikki forskjellen mellom rigatoni og linguini. Mike planlegger den neste famileutflukten når babyen nesten har kommet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Mike og Lauren får sitt tredje barn. Sammi fortsetter prøverørsreisen. Og resten av gjengen inntar 'The Big Apple' i en dobbeltdekker med Vinnys standup-forestilling som endestopp.

programme.desc: Former challenger Kandagawa retaliates against the Iron Chefs by sending his head chef Keisuke Tamano. Tamano challenges Michiba to an ultimate grudge battle.

programme.title: Iron Chef

programme.title: Iron Chef

programme.title: Iron Chef

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood imot høyhastighetpresanger i 'Gaver i forbifarten', opplever massiv bråstopp i 'Løperhinder' og blir opprørt av 'Kritiske mødre'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' foretar Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood litt amatørmessig jordforflytning med 'Helgedosere', tar med ungene i butikken i 'Shoppingmonstere' og setter nesen sørover og opplever litt 'Landsens vrede'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' feirer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood noen første smeller som ektepar med 'Første store feilsteg', prøver å kommunisere med berusede ved å 'Snakke fyllisk' og opplever fryktløse folk som er 'Slangesikre'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' holder Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood hodet høyt for å unngå 'Baller fra oven', tar et lett kaotisk bad og opplever full 'Badekarinvasjon' og får hører den ufiltrerte sannheten av 'Søte små kritikere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' morer Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino seg i parkeringsanlegg med 'Garasjegøy', ser at avløpsåpnere kan brukes til mer enn kun nummer to i 'Mangefasetterte avløpsåpnere' og lurer døden i 'Nesten knust'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino seg noen ordentlige 'Foreldreoverraskelser', ruller med noen skikkelig 'Dediserte inlineløpere' og mister litt kontroll i 'Radioustyrlige'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' gjemmer Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Carly Aquilino drinken for Drikketyver', ser nye merkelige antrekk i 'Bærbare rariteter' og får andrehånds skrubbsår av trafikanter som følger regelen 'Se i begge retninger'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og gjest Carly Aquilino trappene med barn som gjør noen 'Mini-feilsteg', tester senger med 'Madrassprøving' og lokaliserer alle de løse skruene i 'Oppussingsanger'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XL
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' avdekker Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood farene med døråpninger i 'Dørdengt' før de drar til havs på 'Kræsjcruise' og avslutter med noen mestere i forkledning i 'Bykamuflasje'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' slåss Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino mot vinden i 'Aggressiv luft', sliter med spisepinnene i 'Fomlepinner' og viser fram rare evner i 'Ferdigheter er ferdigheter'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino nærmere på utsatte besteforeldre i 'Barnebarnskader', får ødelagt humøret av 'Stemningssenkere' og har det gøy med litt 'Landsens avslapping'.

programme.title: Andromeda: Fortiden er Prolix
programme.desc: Harper oppdager et program som kan ødelegge åtte av Seefra-planetene og drepe millioner.

programme.title: Andromeda: Motstandene av tiltrekning
programme.desc: Mens Harper jobber på en måte å redde Seefra-systemet, smyger en spion ombord Andromeda og angriper Beka.

programme.title: Andromeda: Sparer lys fra en svart sol
programme.desc: Det blir gjort et forsøk på å fikse den blinkende solen til Seefra, men Trance blir erstattet av en dobbeltganger.

programme.title: Andromeda: Total tilbakekalling
programme.desc: Når Dylan er hardt skadet i en laboratorieeksplosjon, reiser han gjennom en rekke alternative virkeligheter.

programme.title: Andromeda: Quantum Tractate Delirium
programme.desc: Rommie blir ombygd for å hjelpe til med å evakuere Seefra-systemet.

programme.title: Andromeda: En dag til - Lys
programme.desc: En krigsherre overbeviser sine tilhengere om at den nærliggende ødeleggelsen av de ytre planetene er et komplott for å gjøre det lettere å plyndre planeten deres.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Print Conviction
programme.desc: The 1996 investigation into 48-year-old Martha Hansen's murder is helped by a legal requirement that bars have video cameras installed on the premises.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elephant Tracks
programme.desc: The murders of an elderly couple leave police stumped until, two years later, they receive a major break. A jeweler looking through old newspaper clippings recognizes a necklace the female victim wore as having been pawned in her own shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bag of Evidence
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of 9-year-old Jessica Knott, police use a garbage bag to connect suspect James Edward Crow, Jr. to the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of Katie Poirier is stymied by the lack of a body. Finally, investigators use a single tooth found among some charred remains to identify her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scratching The Surface
programme.desc: The only clue recovered from a shooting is a twelve-guage shotgun. Scientists use unique methods to lift the serial number from the weapon to trace it to its owner

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Proof
programme.desc: A serial arsonist starts several fires that cause millions of dollars worth of damage and the deaths of three people. He is discovered, partly through the use of forensic hypnosis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking the Mold
programme.desc: A three-year-old develops a respiratory condition. His father has Alzheimers. An investigator reveals that their ill health is due to mold in their modern home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Call
programme.desc: A murder investigation in Florida crosses jurisdictions from New York and Jamaica. The police rely on cell phone mapping, wiretapping and a host of forensic evidence to link a suspect to a murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Fire
programme.desc: A woman convicted of killing her mother in a car fire is granted a new trial. An expert witness has a different opinion as to how the fire started and, if proven, would clear the woman of any culpability.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Will
programme.desc: Authorities track a kidnapper who let his victim write a last will and informed the family of her murder. A phone number written on a previous page left a lasting impression, which helped to convict.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 15
programme.desc: This episode includes: Mystery Robber, Magnetic Attraction (Pts. 1 & 2), Johnny Lee Wilson, Call for Help and Borden House.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 16
programme.desc: This episode includes: Texas Wife Murder, Falcon Lake UFO, Trucker Death, Lost Dutchman's Mine and Rider Down.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 17
programme.desc: This episode includes: Casolaro, Update: Thelma and Louise, Mothman, Elysian Park Treasure, Fatal Flowers and Missing Rainman.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 18
programme.desc: This episode includes: Two May Murders, The Dale, Carolina Cop Killer, Haunted Mansion, Update: Red Lake Heir and Florida Fires.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 19
programme.desc: This episode includes: Love Triangle, Ghostly Attraction, Update: Shigemoto's Bodyguard, Amtrak Sabotage, Artist for the Prosecution and Fake Doctor Fraud.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Manhunt
programme.desc: A killer was on the loose in one of America's most popular tourist destinations. Armed and desperate, he evaded law enforcement at every turn. As the Fourth of July weekend quickly approached, thousands of people became potential targets.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Crazy Don
programme.desc: To the FBI, he was believed to be the boss of New York's most powerful mafia organizationthe Genovese crime family. Was Gigante crazy or was his behavior a shrewd attempt to disguise his position as a ruthless mafia boss?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Killer Abroad
programme.desc: Beginning in 1990, Europe found itself in the clutches of a serial killer. He became an international outlaw, hopping from country to country to evade capture and to kill again.

programme.title: The FBI Files: .22 Caliber Killer
programme.desc: In Buffalo, New York, a sniper targeted African-American men. He held a city hostage, and threatened to ignite a racial powder keg. And it looked like others might be following his bloody example.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Unabomber
programme.desc: For nearly two decades a mathematical genius with delusions of single-handedly destroying industrial society, planted or mailed powerful bombs to unsuspecting innocent victims.

programme.title: The New Detectives: True Crime
programme.desc: They know as much about crime as any crime fighter, or any criminal. They're the crime writers, and through their eyes we see murder most foul.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Trails of Evidence
programme.desc: In criminal investigations, a simple clue can provide the missing link by placing a suspect at a crime scene. Dirt left on shoes, tires or clothes, or even a tiny piece of plastic can pinpoint a crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Material Witness
programme.desc: Lies and deceit can often throw investigators off the trail of justice. But when hard evidence contradicts a killer's story, police must use the clues to piece together the truth.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Unlikely Sources
programme.desc: Some of the best clues come from the least likely places. Baffling crimes have been solved and criminals betrayed through evidence provided by insects, beer bottles, and other seemingly meaningless objects.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Camera Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Photography: Forensic photographers are among the first people at a crime scene, capturing vital clues on film. What do the cameras capture that can't be seen first-hand, and who are the men and women who analyze the camera's clues?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Sinister Happenings at The Village Farm Museum Part 2
programme.desc: This fascinating location sees a twist in the activity with Bex and Sean getting more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Brookside
programme.desc: Multiple ghostly sightings have been reported that could be connected to the close, but what will Sean and Bex encounter during the day for a special Ghost Dimension Lock Down investigation?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Will it All Go Pear Shaped at Pear Mill? - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Stockport to investigate a haunted mill, which has a lift with a mind all of its own. Will any of the ghosts haunting the mill join him on the investigation tonight or will it all go pear shaped?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Will it All Go Pear Shaped at Pear Mill? - Pear 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation of the mill and is attacked by a spirit. Jane joins the investigation with surprising results. Will it have a happy ending?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Escape the Escape Room - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean enters one of the UK's most haunted escape rooms and it appears that he is not the only one trying to escape. Will the spirits play games with him tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Escape the Escape Room - Part 2
programme.desc: The investigation continues at the escape room and a certain spirit attempts to tug at Sean's clothing. Will he finally survive the escape room?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: How Could You Cover for Him?
programme.desc: Gina believes that her daughter’s boyfriend Efrain is abusing her grandson. Her daughter wants to prove that Efrain is innocent, but her father Raul suspects she is covering for Efrain.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Who Did This?
programme.desc: Who’s responsible for toddler Noel's well-being? Everyone may deny the allegations, but someone knows what happened, and Steve is getting answers!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: My Boyfriend Beat Up My Mom
programme.desc: Kendra is on a mission to save herself from her toxic boyfriend Chris. At 17, Kendra is pregnant with his sixth child. Kendra has tried almost everything including kicking him out of their house, but he not only argued back but assaulted Kendra as well.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Over the Edge
programme.desc: Sheroya is 17 and struggling to raise 2 kids while trying to party all the time. Her boyfriend Malcolm frequently cheats and verbally abuses her. Steve’s got a lot of work ahead with this couple, but will either of them wake up?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Failed 5 Times?
programme.desc: Did Everett touch his girlfriend Michelle’s daughter? Her ex Robert says that his 7-year-old daughter said so. Everett will take a lie detector test to disprove it! Don’t miss these shocking results!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I’m Not the Man You Think I Am
programme.desc: Sean says his wife has made him so angry that he’s put her in the hospital over 10 times. Sean’s also got a secret of his own — he is really a she! Can Steve help Sean iron out his issues?

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Nine-Year-Old Hostage
programme.desc: A hostage situation puts Sgt. Joe Kenda and his team to the test, as they try to save a family without getting shot themselves.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Door No. 12
programme.desc: Neighbors are stunned when close friends Louis Matos and Colleen Johnson are gunned down for no apparent reason. The case kicks into high gear when Lt Joe Kenda locates a panic-stricken eyewitness.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Powder Kegs
programme.desc: When uninvited guests crash a barrio birthday party, violence erupts—leaving Enrique Urrutia dead and potentially sparking a gang war.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Confession
programme.desc: After a husband and wife are viciously attacked in their own home, Kenda is on the hunt for a troubled teen whose appetite for violence knows no bounds.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Joker In the Pack
programme.desc: A card game is interrupted by gunfire, leaving a young man dead. Lt. Joe Kenda soon learns the seeds of his destruction were sewn earlier the same day.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Steven Wright
programme.desc: A closer look at the crimes of Steve Wright, who was dubbed 'The Suffolk Strangler' after murdering five women who worked as prostitutes in Ipswich in 2006.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Stephen Port
programme.desc: A chilling look at the crimes of Stephen Port, the east London serial killer who poisoned four young men with lethal doses of a date rape drug.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: The Duke of Death (Part 1)
programme.desc: From 1976 to 1977, David Berkowitz terrorized New York City under his creepy self-given moniker: “Son of Sam.” He committed eight shootings, wounding seven people and killing six.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: I Am A Monster (Part 2)
programme.desc: From 1976 to 1977, David Berkowitz terrorized New York City under his creepy self-given moniker: “Son of Sam.” He committed eight shootings, wounding seven people and killing six.

programme.title: Very Scary People: BTK: Bind, Torture, Kill (Part 1)
programme.desc: Four members of a family are brutally murdered in Wichita, Kansas by the “B.T.K.” killer, which stands for Bind, Torture, Kill. He finally makes a mistake decades later.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Sinister Happenings at The Village Farm Museum Part 1
programme.desc: The team heads to Lincolnshire to investigate the Village Farm Museum. This location looks out of place, being in the middle of a residential housing estate.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Sinister Happenings at The Village Farm Museum Part 2
programme.desc: This fascinating location sees a twist in the activity with Bex and Sean getting more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Souls Seeking Solace Gotts Park Mansion
programme.desc: The team encounters a spirit member joining them on the thermal imaging camera and appearing to leave its ghostly hand print behind.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Mysterious Death of the Somerton Man / The Horrifying Unsolved Slaughter at Hinterkaifeck Farm
programme.desc: Ryan and Brent delve into the Somerton Man, a farm slaughter, a hotel murder and the deaths of nine hikers.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Mysterious Deaths of Tupac Shakur and Biggie Smalls
programme.desc: Ryan and Brent explore the theories surrounding the deaths of legends Tupac Shakur and Biggie Smalls.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Horrifying Murders of the Zodiac Killer
programme.desc: Join Ryan and Brent on the hunt for clues as they delve into the chilling mystery of the Zodiac Killer.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Mysterious Disappearance of the Sodder Children / The Odd Death of Michelle Von Emster
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane dive into the Sodder children's disappearance and the truth about the Micelle Von Emster case.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Terrifying Axeman of New Orleans
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane explore the spine-chilling tale of the mysterious Axeman Killer of New Orleans.

programme.title: Mutant X: Russian Roulette
programme.desc: Mutant X kommer til hjelp av en tenåring New Mutant forfulgt av russere fordi hun har hemmeligheten til et nytt våpen som er rettet mot mutanter.

programme.title: Mutant X: Fool for Love
programme.desc: Shalimar nærmer seg en annen vill når det er 'lyst ved første blikk', men saken blir komplisert når hennes nye kjæreste prøver å finne en kur for tilstanden hans.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Buddha's Bowl
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel drar til Nepal for å gjenopprette Buddhas fantastiske, overfylte almisse-skål for landsbyboere som bygger en helligdom til den opprinnelige Buddha.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Headless Nun
programme.desc: Når Sydneys fly krasjer, blir hun bedt av en gruppe nonner om å finne hodet til en annen nonne som ble halshogd for flere århundrer siden.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Smoking Gun
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel søker etter Al Capones diamantkledde pistol på oppdrag fra en mann som håper det vil fjerne bestefaren for et drap han var innrammet for.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Affaire de Coeur
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel drar til Skottland for å finne den andre ringen av paret Twining Rings of Calum og Elena.

programme.title: The Takeout with Major Garrett
programme.desc: The Takeout is a new spin on the widely acclaimed podcast hosted by Major Garrett; a daily streaming show that harnesses the best of CBS News' political reporting and lives comfortably in deep discussions.

programme.title: The Daily Report
programme.desc: The Daily Report on CBS News features original interviews and insights on the most important, urgent and interesting stories of the day.

programme.title: 24/7 Primetime
programme.desc: 24/7 Primetime is your essential daily guide to all the stories shaping your world. Anchored by CBS News' Elizabeth Cook, the show delivers the news you need to know.

programme.title: The Daily Report
programme.desc: The Daily Report on CBS News features original interviews and insights on the most important, urgent and interesting stories of the day.

programme.title: On the Case: 22 Hours of Terror
programme.desc: A 12-year-old girl is kidnapped during a home invasion, and police frantically search for her and her abductor. Paula Zahn explores the case.

programme.title: On the Case: A Father's Quest
programme.desc: After finding his beautiful 19 year old daughter dead, a father launches a relentless pursuit of her killer.

programme.title: On the Case: Twisted Obsession
programme.desc: When a beautiful young woman is found murdered out in the New Mexico wilderness, police must unravel her killer's twisted obsession in order to solve the crime.

programme.title: On the Case: Mystery in the Mountains
programme.desc: After a young woman disappears from her mountain home, it looks like the case will never be solved. Then, a retired FBI profiler joins the cold case team and jump starts a 13 year old investigation.

programme.title: On the Case: The Pastor's Wife
programme.desc: Two boys witness the brutal murder of their mother, and their story may bring her cold-blooded killer to justice 30 years later.

programme.title: On the Case: A Nightmare in Memphis
programme.desc: In Memphis, Tennessee, a young mother's mysterious disappearance launches one of the city's most noteworthy criminal investigations.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: The Right Stuff
programme.desc: Mikey goes on a treasure hunt to Venezuela for a rare CL-215 waterbomber. Cargo Manager Kelly's stress levels hit a new high when she returns from her Mexican vacation in even worse health than when she left.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: The River Lift
programme.desc: A vital ferry link is down, so Buffalo mounts an all-out campaign to airlift 100,000lbs of essential goods across the Mackenzie River.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Don't Muck with Chuck
programme.desc: Crusty mechanic Chuck leads the scramble to ready the Electra for a disaster relief mission in Haiti, but fate's curveball sends them to the High Arctic instead.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: The Finish Line
programme.desc: A multi-stop mission to the Far North has Devan, Scott and Adam facing a series of white- knuckle obstacles.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Ski Plane
programme.desc: Young pilots AJ and Andrew get the chance of a lifetime to fly the magnificent DC-3 specially equipped with skis to land on frozen strips.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Buffalo Scores
programme.desc: Buffalo scores the charter of a lifetime when they're asked to transport the Stanley Cup on a tour of the North. Cup fever spreads quickly around Buffalo, and for Mikey, what begins as an innocent love for this hockey icon soon becomes an obsession.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Halloween Celebration with Adam Sandler, Pumpkin Blaze, Jill Kargman
programme.desc: Drew kicks-off her week-long Halloween celebration with Netflix’s “Hubie Halloween” star Adam Sandler. Then, actress Jill Kargman and Drew visit Pumpkin Blaze Long Island! Plus, Drew tackles dating at any age in her signature “Love Bug” segment.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: "The Witches" Star Stanley Tucci, "Hubie Halloween" Star Noah Schnapp
programme.desc: Drew continues the week-long Halloween celebration with "The Witches" star Stanley Tucci. Leo Kelly joins to make a mocktail. "Hubie Halloween" star Noah Schnapp stops by to chat. Plus, Design by Drew Scarrymore and the Drew Scarrymore Costume Challenge.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew’s Never Have I Ever Hour, First Date After Divorce
programme.desc: It’s Drew’s Never Have I Ever Hour! Drew helps a viewer get ready for her first date since her divorce. New foods with Eitan Bernath. Then, we follow a couple as they go sky diving for the first time! Plus bonus moments with actress Charlize Theron.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Dr. Phil, "Hubie Halloween" Star China Anne McClain, Drew’s News with Ross Matthews
programme.desc: Dr. Phil shares why it was important for him to produce his new docuseries "That Animal Rescue Show." Then, Halloween week continues with "Hubie Halloween" star China Anne McClain. Plus, Drew’s News with special guest Ross Matthews.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Anne Hathaway, "The Daily Show’s” Dulce Sloan
programme.desc: Week-long Halloween celebration w/ "The Witches" star Anne Hathaway. "The Daily Show's" Dulce Sloan introduces some single men & their furry sidekicks! Drew goes down to the basement of the CBS Studios with ghosthunter Steve Gonsalves to hunt for ghosts!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew’s Halloween Show! "Emily in Paris" Star Ashley Park
programme.desc: Drew’s Halloween show! "Emily in Paris's" Ashley Park stops by. Plus, celebrations expert Darcy Miller shares tips to repurpose leftover Halloween candy. Drew's "Stans for Stains: Halloween Edition." A curated list of Drew's favorites in "The Weekender."
