programme.title: 2024 Farmers Insurance Open - Final Round
programme.desc: Watch the final round of the 2024 Farmers Insurance Open, where Matthieu Pavon captures his first victory on the PGA TOUR and becomes the first Frenchman to win since 1907.

programme.title: 2013 Farmers Insurance Open - Final Round
programme.desc: Tiger Woods shoots a final-round 72 for a 4-stroke victory over Brandt Snedeker to claim his 75th win on TOUR.

programme.title: The Starter

programme.title: 7th Heaven: In Praise of Women
programme.desc: The Camdens await the arrival of the twins as Annie endures a long, hard labor.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: It Happened One Night
programme.desc: Matt takes a job as a fast food delivery boy to get out of the house and away from the crying babies.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Paranoia
programme.desc: Lucy's ex-boyfriend Jimmy Moon is in serious trouble, and she desperately tries to help him.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Sometimes That's Just the Way It Is
programme.desc: Mary and Lucy narrowly escape serious injury when a drunk driver smashes into their car.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: We the People
programme.desc: Mrs. Hinkle, Mary, Lucy, and even Matt and Shana lend a hand to their industrious younger siblings with the paper route.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: The Voice
programme.desc: The custodian at Simon's school tells the Reverend that he's been hearing the voice of God.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark have been hired to look after the kids of a movie star who never has time to spend with his family.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: An elderly scriptwriter needs someone to bankroll his movie. Meanwhile, Mark has fallen in love with an attractive woman, but Jonathan receives news about her from higher up.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark must help an Amerasian girl facing racial prejudice when she goes to live with her father's family in the United States.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark are bellhops at a hotel that has been given to an aimless young man by his father. They must deal with an unkind boss, an obnoxious kid and a difficult guest.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark try to help a heartless used car salesman reconsider his actions on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison våkner under en motorvei uten å vite hvor hun er eller hvordan hun kom dit. Hennes mangel på hukommelse får henne til å begynne å tenke at hun kan ha drept noen med bilen sin.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison blir bedt av Devalos om å hjelpe noen av vennene hans med å finne deres savnede datter, men møter motstridende bevis på hvem som er ansvarlig for hennes forsvinning.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Flere urovekkende drømmer om en forestående apokalypse får Allison til å ta drastiske tiltak som forberedelse til sivilisasjonens undergang.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison får nok en gang besøk av spøkelset til agent Cooper, som prøver å hjelpe henne med å finne ut hvem den virkelige morderen er i en forvirrende sak.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison har en drøm om et gameshow som kan avsløre løgner, og når hun våkner, hører hun en buzzer i hodet hver gang noen forteller henne en løgn.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike faces the most difficult challenge of her career when she is forced to operate on Brian after he suffers a brain injury.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike discovers Hank's dark secret -- an illegitimate son.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: A famous civil war photographer realizes he may be taking his last picture after Dr. Mike discovers that he is going blind.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike breaks the rules to enter her new horse in an important race.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike must prove that Loren’s sister-in-law did not murder her abusive husband.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: A dead man walks when Halloween comes to Colorado Springs.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 3007
programme.desc: Selmin og Amela har tre barn som de ofte unner ting, samtidig som de sover dårlig på grunn av økonomien. De har en lang historie med å ta lån etter lån, og nå har situasjonen blitt uholdbar.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 3008
programme.desc: Sabrina og Abdullahs økonomi blir dårligere og dårligere, noe som tærer på forholdet. Men Sabrina fortsetter å skjemme bort de små jentene sine med klær og leker.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 3009
programme.desc: Sykepleieren Jenipher har tre voksne barn og foreldreretten til hennes seks år gamle barnebarn. Jenipher er redd for at gjelden hennes skal bli inndrevet, og at hun risikerer å miste barnebarnet.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 3010
programme.desc: Sandra og Pierre er gift, har barn og bor under samme tak, men lever helt separate liv når det kommer til økonomien.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 3101
programme.desc: Magdalena er i Gävle for å hjelpe ekteparet Mirjam og Jonas, hvis økonomi er anstrengt. Etter mange år med motgang har prioriteringene gått feil vei og økonomien har blitt nedprioritert.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 3102
programme.desc: Allerede for ti år siden var Evas økonomi så dårlig at hun ble innvilget gjeldssanering. Det som skulle ha vært starten på en ny livsstil, ble i stedet starten på en nok en negativ spiral.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 316
programme.desc: Milan kan fortsatt ikke gå. Julia bryter sammen når hun forteller om hvor trist hun er over situasjonen og at kroppen hennes ikke lenger orker å bære han.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 317
programme.desc: Tindra og Linn prøver babymassasje for å kurere Tindras kolikk. Natalie og Joline har besøkt logopeden for å utvikle Jolines talespråk.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 318
programme.desc: Alicia blir med når Natalie skal tatovere en rose på hånden. Julia har mottatt sponsede klær til Milan, inkludert en ny parkdress som Milan skal fotograferes med.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 319
programme.desc: Julia og Milan maler med fingermaling, og Julia snakker om forholdet til Dennis. Linn og Marcus prøver å få et gipsavtrykk av Tindras hånd og fot før hun blir for stor.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 320
programme.desc: For Fayme er dagens beste øyeblikk når pappa Moltas kommer hjem fra jobb. Da løper alle barna til pappa og Fayme kan endelig puste ut. Linn, Marcus og Tindra drar på ferie til Marcus familie.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 321
programme.desc: Linn, Marcus og Tindra drar til Brunneby Musteri. Julia og vennene hennes leker med Milan i parken, og han nyter all oppmerksomheten.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 322
programme.desc: Julia prøver å få hverdagen til å gå rundt med tre forskjellige jobber, samtidig som hun er alenemor annenhver uke. Colin, som er veldig interessert i klær, skal endelig shoppe med Fayme.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 323
programme.desc: Julia er glad for hvor raskt Milanos utvikler seg, og på søndager er det tid for en koselig kveld. Da kan ikke Julia avstå fra å gi Milan nesten alt han vil.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 324
programme.desc: Fayme og familien drar til lekeland. Natalie er nervøs når hun skal ri med sin venn.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 325
programme.desc: Julia snakker om Milanos fødsel og hvorfor barn med Downs syndrom kalles for solskinnsbarn. Natalie inviterer til Halloween-fest.

programme.title: Hard Eight
programme.desc: John, en halvsmart taper strandet i Reno, har bare noen få dollar igjen når Sydney forbarmer seg over ham, spanderer frokost og gir ham tips om hvordan man tjener penger på kasino. To år senere har John blitt Sydneys partner.

programme.title: End of Sentence
programme.desc: Frank Fogle (John Hawkes) legger motvillig ut på en reise for å hedre sin avdøde kone med sin fremmedgjorte sønn (Logan Lerman). Med en irsk minnestund, en gammel flamme, en pen haiker og uoppgjorte problemer, blir reisen mer utfordrende enn antatt.

programme.title: The Way Way Back
programme.desc: 14 år gamle Duncan sliter med å passe inn i sin nye familesituasjon, med mor, hennes nye, nedlatende kjæreste, og hans datter. Mens moren blir stadig mer fraværende finner Duncan en usannsynlig venn i sjefen på badeanlegget hvor han har sommerjobb.

programme.title: Henrys Crime
programme.desc: Henry (KEANU REEVES) har ingen ambisjoner og sover seg gjennom livet. Men en morgen han uvitende blir deltager i et dårlig gjennomført bankran, får han en oppvåkning, og tar på seg straffen. I fengselet blir han venn med Max (JAMES CAAN).

programme.title: Wild Target
programme.desc: En iskald leiemorder får sitt liv snudd på hodet når han blir forelsket i sitt mål, en sjarmerende svindler med uventede planer.

programme.title: Down Terrace
programme.desc: Etter å ha sonet fengsel for en mystisk forbrytelse, slipper Bill og Karl seg ut av fengselet og blir opptatt av å finne ut hvem som leverte dem til politiet. På toppen av det, er "familiebedriften" på steinene

programme.title: Howard Stern'S Edle Deler
programme.desc: Edle Deler følger Howard Sterns fantastiske transformasjon fra skolenerd til mediesuperstjerne.

programme.title: Weird: The Al Yankovic Story
programme.desc: Utforsker alle sider av Yankovics liv, fra stjerneskuddet med tidlige hits som "Eat It" og "Like a Surgeon" til hans brennende kjendisforelskelser og beryktede røffe livsstil.

programme.title: Den siste gentleman
programme.desc: Robert Redford spiller bankraneren Forrest Tucker. Som 70-åring rømmer han fra fengsel og begår en rekke bankran. Men den ene skatten han virkelig drømmer om er hjertet til Jewel, og det skal vise seg å bli Forrests mest utfordrende kupp noensinne.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Eleanor Rigby: Them
programme.desc: Engang var Conor og Eleanor lykkelig gift. Nå føler de seg fremmed for hverandre, og i kjølevannet av en tragisk hendelse lengter de etter å finne tilbake til det liv og den kjærligheten de engang hadde.

programme.title: Sweet Carolina
programme.desc: Josie vender tilbake til den lille hjembyen sin da hun uventet blir verge for niesen og nevøen sin. Der møter hun Cooper, kjæresten fra high school.

programme.title: Worth
programme.desc: Etter angrepene på World Trade Center og Pentagon utnevner kongressen advokaten Kenneth Feinberg til å lede erstatningsfondet for ofrene. Feinberg står overfor en umulig oppgave - å bestemme hvor mye et liv er verdt.

programme.title: Barely Lethal
programme.desc: 16-år gamle Megan Walsh er i trening for å bli en iskald internasjonal leiemorder, men i hemmelighet lengter hun etter å være en normal tenåring. Hun forfalsker derfor sin egen død.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Driller Instinct
programme.desc: Ton & Allen encounter aggressive outdoorsmen in the Alaskan wilderness. The guys discover an 8-wheeled ATV that travels on both land & water and an air percussion hammer that can drill through solid rock!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Night of the Digging Dead
programme.desc: A custom-built shark cage; 1900s pathologist's dissection toolkit; 1940s embalming pump and one of the first electric bone saws.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rodeo Ton
programme.desc: 1970s El Toro mechanical bull used to train bull riders; silver WWII era banjo; a collection of 1800s handcrafted hunting duck decoys.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Drumming Up Cash
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face some silent but deadly competition at an auction in nearby Glendale. They discover a Zildjian brand percussion cymbal from the 1940's and a pyrotechnics control board designed for large-scale fireworks displays!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Labor of Love
programme.desc: Harley Davidson V-twin EVO engine and revolutionary 1958 dual-suspension swingarm frame; '80s Ms. Pac-Man arcade machine; rare Air Jordan vintage shoe collection in mint condition.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Reel Money
programme.desc: 1970's-era Fighting Chair used for big-game fishing; military MILES "laser tag" training system.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Hot Commodity
programme.desc: Allen is late to the auction, leaving Ton to battle a feisty female auction buyer on his own! The guys find a fully functional flamethrower and a rare hand-carved bow and arrow set from South America!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fire in the Hole!
programme.desc: 1930s "blasting machine" dynamite detonator box; 1890s treasure chest with secret compartments. Ton smelts jewelry to forge bricks of silver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Disco and Dice
programme.desc: 1978 Williams Disco pinball machine; 1898 dice popper gambling device; talking 1990s bar top breathalyzer; deadly fishing harpoon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Dallas Mavericks
programme.desc: Military-grade Tomahawk cruise missile jet engine; century-old handcrafted wild west cowboy saddle; 1960s high roller's gold money.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gold 'n' Gloves
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes toe-to-toe with Ton's evil twin! They find a medieval catapult designed for storming castles and Ton uncovers a hidden collection of gold bars worth thousands of dollars!

programme.title: A Country Christmas Harmony
programme.desc: Ekskjærestene Luke og Chrissy, tidligere en countrymusikkduo, støter på hverandre år etter at Chrissy forlot Luke sporløst - og innser at de bare kan komme seg gjennom ferien med hverandres hjelp.

programme.title: How Sarah Got Her Wings
programme.desc: Den barmhjertige samaritanen Sarah Fitzpatrick dør i en ulykke rett før jul, og befinner seg plutselig ved himmelporten. Hun er sikker på at hun kommer inn, men navnet hennes står ikke på listen.

programme.title: A Star For Christmas
programme.desc: Cassies bakeri er en stor suksess, men i kjærligheten går det ikke like bra. Det blir imidlertid snudd på hodet da hun intetanende forelsker seg i en berømt og beryktet skuespiller.

programme.title: A Perfect Christmas
programme.desc: Tom hjelper klientene sine med å finne den perfekte gaven. Etter hvert som Tom blir bedre kjent med Jenny, blir ting komplisert når han innser at han forelsker seg i vennens kjæreste.

programme.title: Delirious
programme.desc: Les er kjendisfotograf og er avhengig av blinkskudd for å overleve. Toby Grace (Michael Pitt) er uteligger og avhengig av veldedighet for å overleve. En dag møtes disse to tilfeldig og et slags vennskap på godt og vondt utvikler seg dem imellom.

programme.title: Boys And Girls
programme.desc: Ryan (Freddie Prinze, Jr.) and Jennifer (Claire Forlani) couldn't be more different. As kids, they couldn't stand one another. As adults, its their differences that bind them together in this fun RomCom from the director of SHE'S ALL THAT.

programme.title: 10 Things we should do before we break up
programme.desc: Den kvelden da Abigail, enslig mor til to små barn, møter Ben på en bar, lager de på fleip en liste over ting å gjøre før et tenkt brudd, enda de godt vet at de aldri kommer til å innlede noe forhold engang.

programme.title: Ginger Snaps
programme.desc: En tenåringsjente forsøker å hindre søsteren sin fra å bli til en varulv.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Descent
programme.desc: Johnny struggles to rescue four teens trapped in a collapsing mine, all the while reliving - and in some way trying to redeem - sins from his family's past.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Ascent
programme.desc: In the continuation of the episode "Descent," an unexpected incident leads Johnny to a new understanding of Walt.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: The Last Goodbye
programme.desc: A performance by the son of a rock and roll legend leads Johnny and Sarah (Nicole de Boer) on a search for clues about the mysterious death of his famous father.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Lateness of the Hour
programme.desc: The daughter of an inventor objects to their 'perfect' home where they are waited on by mechanical servants.

programme.title: Sharknado 4: The 4th Awakens
programme.desc: Five years after the wave of sharknados that wracked the east coast, our heroes are living a quiet life- as far away from sharks as possible. But when a sand sharknado hits Vegas, Fin is thrown back into action, fighting sharknados across the country

programme.title: Wagons East
programme.desc: De var ute etter gull, men nå tar de til takke med innlagt vann. John Candy og Richard Lewis spiller i dette hysterisk ukonvensjonelle blikket på den legendariske ville vesten.

programme.title: Tucker: The Man And His Dream

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: An Emotional Beginning

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Becoming World Class

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Having A Bad Day

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Best Friends Kissing
programme.desc: Brody og Audrina utforsker en ny romanse. Brandon er klar for å utvikle forholdet ytterligere. Heidi og Spencer kjemper for å bli enige om familieforøkning og må avreagere. Jason og Ashley får skjellsettende nyheter.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: The Last Hurrah
programme.desc: Gjengens ferie får en vri da Kaitlynn uventet får møte Brodys nye flamme. Brandon håp om en romantisk tur med Dani settes på spill etter en fatal karrierefeil. Samtidig blomstrer en usannsynlig forbindelse.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Who's a Better Kisser
programme.desc: Brody og Heidis vennskap er i et skjæringspunkt da en middag utvikler seg til en eksplosiv krangel. Brody lurer på om Amber er den rette. Audrinas første kyss med Sean gir flere spørsmål. Justin åpner seg for gruppen.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: You Told Her?!
programme.desc: Heidi og Spencer blir sjokkerte over at oppførselen deres blir diskutert. Audrina står ved en korsvei med både Brody og Sean; samtidig foretar Caroline en djerv påstand om sine ekte følelser for Kaitlynn.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: I'm Back in LA Bitches!
programme.desc: Gjengen feirer Kristin Cavallaris besøk i LA. Det er anspent mellom Heidi og Audrina. Justin og Jason styrker vennskapet. En bra natt blir til en god morgen da Brody og Audrina endelig setter følelsene sine på prøve.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: "Who Slept at Your House?"
programme.desc: Da Kristin har grillet Brody om 'overnattingen' hos Audrina, går ryktene under en tur til Lake Tahoe, og Kaitlynn føler seg utenfor. Caroline konfronterer Kaitlynn om det kalde vennskapet. Jason hører Spencer tvile på edrueligheten sin.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Miles and the Mob Wife
programme.desc: Den nye kjendisen, Miles, gjør inntrykk på Marissa. David må kle på seg igjen og jentene må fatte en tøff avgjørelse.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: As One Door Closes Another One Opens
programme.desc: En av gutta blir sendt hjem og jentene gråter. Det hele blir for mye for en av de opprinnelige åtte. Sophie kan endelig ha truffet drømmemannen. Kommer David til å få en sjanse til?

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: The Mob Wife Goes In
programme.desc: Georgia og Miles kommer nærmere, men slutter alt i tårer? Marissa presses til sin "bande kone" grense og Joey og Lorena drar ned på stranden for den siste ankomsten.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: The Finale
programme.desc: Joey får sitt livs sjokk, en eks gjør en praktfull entre til den store finalen og Georgia blir rørt, men vil hun få en lykkelig slutt sammen med de andre parene?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Ex On The Beach er tilbake! Åtte heite single får snart ødelagt tidenes ferie når en av eksene deres ankommer og ødelegger festen! Hat, krangler, tårer, drama, følelser og enda flere ekser!

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: To ekser har ankommet villaen og skaper kaos - og det blir verre. Rogans forhold til Anita kan stå i fare for å ødelegges når eksen Jess ankommer. Mere kjærlighet, mere hat - og framfor alt: flere eks-kjærester!

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1989 Ford Mustang
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Shondas Ford Mustang Convertible. Hun ruller i vei i et pimpet og helt trafikksikkert kjøretøy.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Maxima Station Wagon
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Ezras Nissan Maxima Station Wagon. Han kjører av gårde i en mobil DJ-bås.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Volkswagen Baja
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Krissys Volkswagen Baja Bug. Boblen fra 1969 ble konstruert med holdbarhet som mål. Men med sitt bøyde eksosrør og sine ødelagte dører, kan den virkelig beskrives som alt annet enn akkurat det.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1987 Honda CRX
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Brians Honda CRX. Det er den første bilen som får en splitter ny motor, ettersom den gamle dør innen Xzibit får den inn på verkstedet.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: '72 Landcruiser
programme.desc: Gaby var en nylig dumpet yogainstruktør som ikke hadde noe i verden utenom yogamatten sin og sin Land Cruiser fra 1972. Ekskjæresten solgte bilen til henne for 200 dollar. Gutta begynner å jobbe med utsiden...

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1989 Ford Escort
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Kerrys Ford Escort. Bilen var blitt sveiset og "limt sammen" av to separate biler. Gjengen mente den var trafikkfarlig...

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: Xzibit takes a beat-up 1984 Cadillac Eldorado and restores it to it's former glory.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, Xzibit and the boys at West Coast Customs transform a '91 Ford Escort into a European luxury mobile.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, Xzibit and West Coast Customs give a 1958 VW some California love, and turn it into the ultimate beach ride.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, Xzibit takes a busted off-road '85 Suburban and gives it an electronic makeover not to be believed.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, Xzibit puts the fire back into a wrecked '87 Chevy Blazer.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Pulling Punches
programme.desc: En Adam og Eva-fest fører til sjalusi når parene blandes. Det dannes en kjærlighets-sekskant og slagene faller når John, Tyler, Stephen og Gio prøver å få orden på sin forvirrede hjerter.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Great Ex-pectations
programme.desc: Guttenes ekser blir invitert til skittentøyvask i en utfordring som skaper forlegenhet. Gio og Stephen får endelig høre sannheten når det gjelder Julia.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Third Eye Blind
programme.desc: Gamle konflikter koker over og huset går i oppløsning når en kjempekonflikt fører til sjokk og tårer. Med kun to parseremonier igjen, prøver huset desperat å bruke strategi for å vinne.

programme.title: Are You The One?: All or Nothing
programme.desc: Det er alt eller ingenting når siste og tiende parseremoni går av stabelen. Strategi fører til at gruppa tror på én parvariant, men Asaf vakler mellom å følge hjertet eller å være en lagspiller.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Swipe Right for Love
programme.desc: 22 single flytter inn i et hus i New Orleans for å prøve å finne sammen som 11 perfekte par og vinne $ 1,000,000. Parene dannes hardt og fort kjærlighetstrekanter tar form.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Shot Through the Heart
programme.desc: Malcolms flørting skaper problemer når han føler seg fanget mellom Diandra og Nurys. Keith og Alexis prøver å knuse hverandres hjerte ved å date andre mennesker.

programme.title: MTV Teen Mom
programme.desc: Opplev de dramatiske øyeblikkene når de unge mødrene takler hverdagslige utfordringer eller opplever uforglemmelige øyeblikk. Det er uavbrutt drama hele dagen, hver dag.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: A team competition tests the contestants' knowledge of pork, with the winners receiving an indoor sky-diving experience; during dinner service, both teams face struggles.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: After both teams are reorganized, the chefs blindly choose ingredients from which they must create a unique dish; the chefs must serve a five-course meal to UNICEF Ambassador Angie Harmon and other VIP attendees.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The red team and the blue team each create their own menus, from which guests can order during dinner service, the team that impresses diners with its food and service wins the challenge, contestants face elimination.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The remaining contestants face the blind taste test, with the winning team getting an ice skating lesson with figure skater Rachael Flatt, and the contestants struggle to stay organized during the dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Ramsay challenges the teams to create entrees with high dollar values, using ingredients purchased on a small budget. Three previous winners judge individual contestants' entrees.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Vaklende rangere
programme.desc: Alex og Walker gjør barnerommet klart mens de venter på at babyen skal komme.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Det siste oppgjør, del 1
programme.desc: En notorisk gjeng Walker arresterte, kommer tilbake for å ta brutal hevn. Gjengen rømmer fra fengsel og går etter alle rangerne.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger
programme.desc: En notorisk gjeng Walker arresterte, kommer tilbake for å ta brutal hevn. Gjengen rømmer fra fengsel og går etter alle rangerne.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Ett opprør, én ranger
programme.desc: Et veterinærteam setter Walker på sporet av en gjeng som dumper giftige kjemikalier.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: Made: Rockstar
programme.desc: Obsessively organized Jessica wants to show that she can let loose by being MADE into a rockstar.

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16 NO
programme.desc: Jacqueline and Lauren are really close friends, and have their joint party at The Hard Rock Cafe. Will their over-the-top party live up to the expectations of them and their hundreds of guests?

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16 NO
programme.desc: Ava has a taste for the finer things in life. Only the best of the best will do for her Arabian Night Sweet 16.

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16 NO
programme.desc: Natalie's just moved from sleepy Roswell. This new girl figures planning the biggest bash LA Jolla has ever seen will put her on the map with the kids at school.

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16 NO
programme.desc: Sierra (daughter singer/producer of Cee-Lo) is a little diva who wants what she wants, which includes having a Sweet 15 party so she can be the first among her friends to celebrate their coming of age.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1978 Cadillac Sedan DeVille
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen Niles Cadillac Sedan DeVille. Nile ruller hjem i en mørkerosa metallic bil med bagasjerommet fullt av nye sko.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1986 Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet Logans Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme. Logan ruller hjem med basketgulv og lakk i to farger.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1992 Honda Civic
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet Christines Honda Civic. Tre dager etter at avsnittet med Christine ble sendt, døde en nær slektning av magekreft.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1990 Mitsubishi Mirage
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Antwons Mitsubishi Mirage. Antwon ruller hjem på 18-tommersdekk og med et akvarium i baksetet.

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV) NO: Mandy Moore, Eliza Dushku, Todd Oldham, Oscar de la Joya, Ashton Kutcher
programme.desc: Eliza Dushku is mistaken for a shoplifter. Mandy Moore & Todd Oldham do a little bit of crib crashing - literally! Oscar De La Hoya steps into the ring for some Punk'd style rounds.

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV) NO: Jessica Alba, Wilmer Valderama, Tom Arnold, Ashton
programme.desc: Jessica Alba is tormented by a naked shopper, thinking that the SUV belongs to Ashton, a jealous boyfriend in a love triangle feud destroys Wilmer Valderrama's SUV and Tom Arnold drops off his brat kid with Ashton's newly hired assistant.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Slave pt. 1
programme.desc: The IMF is called upon to end an inhuman situation which the United Nations has been unable to abolish: slave trade in the country of Elkabar, ruled by King Ibn Borca.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Slave pt. 2
programme.desc: The IMF continues to battle slave-trading in a Middle Eastern country by eliminating De Groot, one of the principal suppliers of victims for King Borca's slave market.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Widow
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force is asked to destroy an international narcotics ring operated by Alex Cresnic and his partner Mark Walters.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Money Machine
programme.desc: The economy of the small African country of Ghalea is threatened by a mass counterfeiting scheme directed by Walter DuBruis, one of the country's richest financiers.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Seal
programme.desc: America's relations with Kuala Rokat, a small neutral country on the China-India border, are threatened when a priceless national treasure, a carved jade seal, is stolen and bought by American art collector, J. Richard Taggart.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 506
programme.desc: En liten leiebolig i Vanløse og to små barn - ikke den beste kombinasjonen. Lisa og Erling drømmer om et stort hus med en stor hage. Tobias må jobbe hardt, da drømmene er mye større enn budsjettet.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark
programme.desc: Kristian drømmer om en diger garasje, og Nathja vil heller bli i Køge – kan Tobias oppfylle drømmene sine?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark
programme.desc: Maja og Kenneth bor på Vestjylland og drømmer om å komme nærmere familien til Maja i Silkeborg. Men budsjettet deres krever at de går på akkord med beliggenheten og ser i de nærliggende små byene.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 603
programme.desc: I Ikast er Camilla og Marc sultne på et hus med plass til oppbevaring. Men når Tobias finner et stort hus til dem, mister de motet, da det nå er SÅ mange rom som må pusses opp...

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 604
programme.desc: Stine og Daniel lengter etter mer plass før de snart utvider familien fra tre til fire. Derfor er det ikke optimalt når Mads ringer og forteller at avtalen med det nye huset deres i Langå ikke gjelder.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Halmstad
programme.desc: In Halmstad Tareq explores the contrast between the busy summer scene at the beach and the quiet rural country life, meeting Jörgen Persson: award winning table tennis player and visiting a village famous for its cheese.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Kemi
programme.desc: Kemi is situated in northern Finland by the Bothnian Bay and it is part of Lapland region. Tareq tries his luck at a spot of burbot fishing on the frozen sea and visits the snow castle hotel.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: West Sweden
programme.desc: Situated on the west coast of Sweden, Bohuslän is a place where you can really feel the history of fishing all around a tradition that is still active. Tareq will be harvesting supreme quality oysters and lobsters and cook some wonderful seafood dishes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Florø
programme.desc: Tareq visits Norway and Florø to celebrate their national day -17th of May. Surrounded by breathtaking archipelagos and stunning fjords he dives for scallops in the north sea, cooking at mountain peaks and exploring the history of norwegian salmon

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Estonia
programme.desc: Tareq makes his way across the baltic sea to Estonia and the capital Tallinn. He discovers the historical treasures of the city and its thriving culinary life before he heads out into the vast and beautiful countryside and the national park of Soomaa.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Ringkøbing
programme.desc: Ringkøbing, a lovely old market town located at the west coast of Denmark. Here, Tareq visit a traditional Herring Festival and meets up with local entrepreneurs who have learned to adapt to this ever-changing environment.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Falkenberg
programme.desc: Something is definitely happening in Falkenberg on the west coast of Sweden. Over the last couple of years it have become somewhat of a haven for foodies. Tareq is on a mission; taking him through a fertile landscape with vineyards and salmon fishing.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Estonia (Part 2)
programme.desc: Estonia has embarked on a journey greatly inspired by the nordic cuisine. Tareq explores the countryside of Estonia before he returns to the capital of Tallinn where he meets people that really love their traditional food.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Goodbye Australia
programme.desc: Tiden i Sydney er i ferd med å ta slutt og singlene gjør det til sitt kall å få en stormende kveld på Whitsunday-øyene. Vickey og Fit Dan har en pågående date. Får Gary og Charlotte avsluttet en gang for alle?

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Bucket List
programme.desc: Geordie-gjengen er tilbake i Newcastle der de hører hjemme, og det skal bli nok en sommer med festing, sjekking, spying og klining og sanseløs fyll. Men akkurat når de finner seg til rette i huset igjen, kommer sjokket: Den nye jenta Marnie ankommer.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Double Dating
programme.desc: Geordiegjengen er tilbake og det festes, sjekkes og klines i Newcastle, men det skurrer fortsatt etter at den nye jenta Marnie kom i huset og problemene oppsto. Hun blåser i hva folk syns, og kan ikke holde labbene unna Scott.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Holly's Birthday
programme.desc: Det er Hollys 21-årsdag og Geordigjengen feirer som bare de kan - med full fest i huset, fyll, sex og spetakkel. Men en liten tragedie inntreffer også, som fører til en uventet begravelse på stranden.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: It All Kicks Off
programme.desc: Huset til Geordie Shore-gjengen ryster i sammenføyningene når Charlotte og Holly ender i kjempekrangel med den nye jenta Marnie på en nattklubb og det tar helt av.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: First Impressions Stick
programme.desc: Det ulmer i luften når Marnie kommer tilbake til huset etter kjempekrangelen på nattklubben med Holly og Charlotte. Jentene takler ikke at Marnie kommer tilbake, og gutta ender i sjokktilstand når en ondskapsfull kamp igjen bryter ut.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Make it Unofficial
programme.desc: Jenni planlegger en babyfest for Nicole og inviterer alle kameratene. Gutta støtter Mike som vil slå opp med Paula, og blir med ham for å oppleve øyeblikket fra første rad.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Shore Shower
programme.desc: MVP er tilbake og muliggjør en nær-trekantopplevelse for Vinny. Gjengen treffer på Angelina i en klubb. Jentene sliter med å holde babyfesten hemmelig for Nicole, og Vinny liker ikke tanken på seg selv og Jionni sammen på babyfesten.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Awkward!
programme.desc: Vinnie prater ut med Jionni og de ordner opp i flokene, så Vin og Nicole kan gjenoppta vennskapet om de vil. Samtidig innser Mike de feilene han har gjort og forsøker å få Nicoles tilgivelse.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Raining Men & Meatballs
programme.desc: Kjøttbollene tar over strandpromenaden og holder audition for å finne en midlertidig festkompis til Deena. Mike avslører at han var stripper før i tiden og romkameratene får ham til å vise sine kunster.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Icing on the Cake
programme.desc: Det er slutten på sommeren, og slutten på en lang reise for romkameratene når de forbereder seg på å ta et siste farvel med Seaside.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Jersey Shore Reunion
programme.desc: Hver sommer kommer tusenvis av unge til Jersey Shore for å delta i østkystens overgangsritual: The Shore House. Jersey Shore viser dette fenomenet.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: No Way Down
programme.desc: Injured in an explosion, Vincent is captured by a vicious street gang.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Masques
programme.desc: Free to walk the streets openly on Halloween, Vincent becomes the guardian of an Irish peace activist who's been targeted for assassination.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Beast Within
programme.desc: Vincent must choose loyalties when a childhood friend becomes a mob enforcer.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Nor Iron Bars a Cage
programme.desc: Accidentally caught on film, Vincent become the target of a scientist desperate to learn the truth about him.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Song of Orpheus
programme.desc: When Father ventures to the Above World for the first time in decades, he is arrested for murder. Vincent and Catherine must delve into Father's mysterious past to uncover the truth.

programme.title: JAG: Close Quarters
programme.desc: Back at JAG, Harm is flooded with cases but still wants to help out an 80-year-old veteran accused of robbery. Meanwhile, Turner takes on an assignment in a sub whose crew has rescued possible defecting North Koreans.

programme.title: JAG: Posse Comitatus
programme.desc: Harm and Mac argue the case of a Marine pilot who used force to interfere with a local police matter that led to a man’s killing. Roberts is the investigating officer in the matter of a Navy doctor who is requesting conscientious objector status.

programme.title: JAG: The Boast
programme.desc: When an unwitting corporal boasts to a reporter that he killed an Iraqi prisoner of war, facts begin to emerge that could convict him despite his later claim that he was only lying toi mpress.

programme.title: JAG: Pulse Rate
programme.desc: Harm and Mac go aboard the USS Gillcrist to determine if a seaman’s fatal accident during a routine repair was the result of a co-worker’s dereliction of duty or worse.

programme.title: JAG: Good Intentions
programme.desc: Mac defends a petty officer and former alcoholic accused of a brutal murder after a drinking binge which renders him useless in remembering details that could help him. Roberts is entangled in the case of a Navy Commander accused of embezzling funds.

programme.title: JAG: People vs SECNAV
programme.desc: After an incident in Iraq claims the lives of innocent civilians, SecNav is brought up on charges of war crimes in International Court, and Harm and Mac must defend him. Meanwhile, during a trip to the arcade, little A.J. goes missing.

programme.title: The Love Boat: London-Paris Cruise/ My Mother, My Chaperone/The Present/The Death and Life of Sir Alfred Demerest - Part 2
programme.desc: A renowned author disapproves of her daughter's affair with a married man, while a mother reveals to her son the truth about his famous father.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Paying The Piper/ Baby Sister/ Help Wanted
programme.desc: A homemaker gives her unappreciative husband a bill for her household services and a woman's infatuation with a young man leads to a shocking disclosure.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Country Blues/ A Matter Of Taste/ Frat Brothers Forever
programme.desc: In a poignant episode, Doc's former fraternity brother must decide if he should tell Doc the truth about himself and his companion. Two rival designers vie to redecorate the ship and an unorthodox business manager sees his plans go up in flames.

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Christmas Show: Santa, Santa, Santa/ Another Dog Gone Christmas/ Noel's Christmas Carol
programme.desc: On a special Christmas cruise, no fewer than three Santas vie to entertain the passengers and a faded comedian gets a new lease on life.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Instinct/ Unmade For Each Other/ BOS
programme.desc: Isaac meets a beautiful woman obsessed with self-help books and two men become involved following a computer dating error.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie's Blindness
programme.desc: In a poignant, change-of-pace episode titled Fonzie's Blindness, Al barges through the kitchen door at the drive-in and hits Fonzie in the head with a tray of food.

programme.title: Happy Days: Casanova Cunningham
programme.desc: When Richie is caught two-timing Lori Beth for a pretty baton twirler, the Fonz has to step in and give Richie a few lessons in love.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Gets Framed
programme.desc: Richie and the Fonz visit a massage parlor to escape the pressures of a heated class presidency race, and Richie's opposition photographs the sheet-clad candidate with a pretty masseuse.

programme.title: Happy Days: Potsie Quits School
programme.desc: When troubles with his studies and an insulting professor cause Potsie to quit school, the Fonz comes up with an ingenious but offbeat plan to help his friend.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie'S Funeral (Part 1)
programme.desc: In Part I, Fonzie is called to make emergency mechanical repairs on a stalled hearse and inadvertently discovers thousands of dollars in counterfeit money hidden in the coffin.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie'S Funeral (Part 2)
programme.desc: In Part II, after Fonzie discovers thousands of dollars in counterfeit money in a hearse, the counterfeiters attempt to silence him.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Duel
programme.desc: The Fonz defends America's pride and saves Richie's hide when he matches blades with a French fencing champion, who not only insults the country, but makes nasty remarks about Joanie

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie Gets Shot
programme.desc: During a week-end at Potsie's uncle's hunting cabin, Fonzie is accidentally shot in the vicinity of his favorite jeans' back pocket.

programme.title: Happy Days: American Musical
programme.desc: Struggling to write a school essay on America's immigrant history, Chachi is inspired by Fonzie's colorful story told to the tune of an imagined melting pot melody.

programme.title: MacGyver: Blow Out
programme.desc: Nikki unknowingly becomes the target of an international terrorist group, planning to detonate bombs across the city in exchange for the release of their recently imprisoned leader.

programme.title: MacGyver: Kill Zone
programme.desc: MacGyver battles an eccentric scientist whose bizarre biological experiments go out of control and threaten the environment.

programme.title: MacGyver: Early Retirement
programme.desc: After an accident forces Pete Thornton to retire from the foundation, MacGyver suspects foul play within the organization and uncovers a plot to assassinate a visiting Third World Leader.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Odd Triple
programme.desc: MacGyver and old buddy Jack Dalton are arrested in France after becoming unwitting accomplices in an international jewel heist.

programme.title: MacGyver: Thin Ice
programme.desc: MacGyver helps a promising young hockey player tone down his aggressive style of play and possibly reclaim his position on Team USA, America's ice hockey team.

programme.title: Matlock: The Seduction (Aka "The Quarterback")
programme.desc: A football star is accused of killing the owner of his team.

programme.title: Matlock: The Angel
programme.desc: Ben defends a flashy rock star against charges of murder.

programme.title: Matlock: The Don (Part 1)
programme.desc: Ben defends an organized-crime boss.

programme.title: Matlock: The Don (Part 2)
programme.desc: Ben defends an organized-crime boss.

programme.title: Matlock: The Professor
programme.desc: A professor becomes framed for murder.

programme.title: Matlock: The Sister
programme.desc: Two nieces frame their uncle for their aunt’s murder.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When Dr. Wesley, Dean of the medical school, is arrested for sale of narcotics, she pleads her innocence to Mark. Meanwhile, Mark's student Quinn and neighbor Jennifer plan to marry.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: While out on his morning jog, Jesse unsuccessfully attempts to save a man who has locked himself in his gargage with the engine running, an apparent suicide.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: After Madison hears that Lisa, a personal friend and one of her star students, has missed a few classes, she visits her and finds Lisa comatose from a drug overdose.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: It's a case of mistaken identity when Greg, a mobster who looks just like Mark, is released from prison and moves into Mark's neighborhood.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Jesse operates and removed the bullet from Greg, thinking he is Mark. But everything starts to unfold when mark show up for his shift at the hospital.

programme.desc: Følg med huseiere når de tar valget om å endre livsstilen sin og bytte ut bylivet med det rolige livet på landet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Mike og Lauren får sitt tredje barn. Sammi fortsetter prøverørsreisen. Og resten av gjengen inntar 'The Big Apple' i en dobbeltdekker med Vinnys standup-forestilling som endestopp.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Slutt på pizzaen
programme.desc: Familien drar tilbake for å gratulere den nybakte trebarnsfaren. Angelina kjører direkte i sosiale medier. Sammi er klar for en våt overraskelse.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Deenas familieferie
programme.desc: Gjengen drar tilbake til Miami for Deenas familieferie. Pauly og Sammi rotetr seg sammen for fantesteker.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: På ting-leting
programme.desc: Deena tar av da gjengen klager over gjøremålene hennes. Mike blir overrumplet av et besøk. Angelina bringer klarhet med Mike.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Bak lukkede dører
programme.desc: Mike gir gjengen designerklær under en dag fylt av ekstravaganse. Forholdet til Angelina får en merkelig vri.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Pauly planlegger en storslått yachtdag. Vinny tar med samboerne på bowling. Det blir pinlig da Snooki konfronterer 2.0.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Challenger Etsuo Joh, the god of sauces in classic French cuisine, takes on the Iron Chef Japanese, Rokusaburo Michiba.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Chairman Kaga invites the very first diner cook to compete at Kitchen Stadium. Katsuo Omiya, trained in the French tradition, challenges Iron Chef Sakai to a tearful battle!

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Dissatisfied with the results of their last encounter, Club Mistral is back for a rematch. Kazutaka Okabe challenges Sakai to a rematch of extreme grandeur.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: In this battle of blue crab, Challenger Akaboshi Sou, a favorite cook of the royal family, takes on Iron Chef Michiba.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Esteemed chef and owner of the Italian restaurant Sabatini in Roppongi has sent his protégé Yukihiro Noda to go head-to-head with Iron Chef Chen in a fierce battle of sardines.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: In the battle of sole at Kitchen stadium, Iron Chef Sakai faces off against Chef Takayoshi Kawai who heads the kitchen of the Pan Pacific Hotel in San Francisco.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino nærmere på utsatte besteforeldre i 'Barnebarnskader', får ødelagt humøret av 'Stemningssenkere' og har det gøy med litt 'Landsens avslapping'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran sjansen på å ta seg en lur i 'Blottlagte blunder', finner nye bruksområder i tillegg til hockey i 'Nyttekøller' og får seg en trøkk fra oven med 'Takattakk'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino seg en kakk i hodet når de er 'Uten høydebevissthet', får multitaskingeksamen ved 'Simultankapasitets-universitetet og betrakter barn som dras i 'Hunder med barneslep'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino litt konkurransesugne i 'Utilsiktede hjulskader', opplever T-banekaos på 'Ville tog' og morer seg stort med 'Skjelettkompiser'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' forårsaker Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran alvorlige skader når de spiller 'Hjemmegolf', møter bygningsarbeidere som morer seg med 'Jobbskøyere' og blir vitner til vindens kraft i 'Tatt av vinden'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' deltar Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran i timen med 'Forelesningssabotører', stopper hjorter som foretar 'Bukkattakk' og flipper helt når de får seg en 'Turntrøkk'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' sklir Rob, Steelo og gjest Karrueche Tran rundt i gatene fordi de er 'Dårlig til å drifte', tar seg litt snacks med folk som liker å 'Småspise i alle situasjoner' og holder festen i gang med 'Bursdagsbomber'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' triller Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran ut på skumruller i 'Fatal foam', tar begrepet "hot date" til neste nivå med 'Ildfulle utekvelder' og kommer litt for nær de verste flysetenaboene i 'Ekle passasjerer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' leker Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran utryddere i 'Kryppatruljen', blir spesielt følsomme og feller 'Kjærlighetstårer' og skater ute i det ville i 'Bli i parken'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXXI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran nye farer ved å drikke i 'Ølskutt', møter folk som blir oppglødd når de går i bakken i 'Krasjglad' og fortsetter å kjøre i 'Kan ikke og vil ikke stoppe'.

programme.title: Andromeda: En dag til - Lys
programme.desc: En krigsherre overbeviser sine tilhengere om at den nærliggende ødeleggelsen av de ytre planetene er et komplott for å gjøre det lettere å plyndre planeten deres.

programme.title: Andromeda: Kaos og stillheten i det
programme.desc: Dylan, Rhade og Beka jobber sammen for å redde Trance fra Methus-2 og Harper fra general Burma.

programme.title: Andromeda: Hjertet av reisen (del 1)
programme.desc: Mannskapet gjør det endelig ut av Seefra-systemet og oppdager at Dylan er den siste Paradine.

programme.title: Andromeda: Hjertet av reisen (del 2)
programme.desc: Den siste kampen for å redde New Systems Commonwealth begynner.

programme.title: Andromeda: Under natten
programme.desc: Etter å ha blitt igjen strandet i nærheten av et svart hull, blir kaptein Dylan Hunt oppdaget av et leiesoldat bergingsskip og finner at han har vært frossen i tide i 300 år.

programme.title: Andromeda: En bekreftende flamme
programme.desc: Dylan beskytter Andromeda mot leiesoldater mens Beka begynner å lure på om de kjemper for feil side.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Will
programme.desc: Authorities track a kidnapper who let his victim write a last will and informed the family of her murder. A phone number written on a previous page left a lasting impression, which helped to convict.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dessert Served Cold
programme.desc: A man dies in his home after a long history of heart disease. A few weeks after the funeral, rumors surface that the death was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign Here
programme.desc: A mother of two vanishes after a shopping trip. Her body is discovered a month later, and witnesses say they saw the victim being forced into a car by an unknown person.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: A woman is shot to death in her store just one day before she is to testify against the man accused of robbing her. The robber becomes the prime suspect, but he has a solid alibi: a timestamped videotape of his activities on the day of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tourist Trap
programme.desc: In 1993, the state of Florida was known for more than just Disney World. Worldwide attention focused on a rash of robberies which targeted tourists. Some vacationers were killed in these attacks, but some fought and survived.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Once Bitten
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe print, several foreign hairs and unknown fingerprints at a murder scene. But they believe the most telling piece of evidence is the bite mark on the victim's chest.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Wet
programme.desc: A woman's death in Pennsylvania triggers a homicide investigation into another woman's death in North Carolina. Faced with striking similarities, examiners must determine if their suspect's story about accidental drowning is all wet.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shot of Vengeance
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse experiences a variety of flu-like symptoms. None of her doctors are able to discover the cause, until she visits her gynecologist for a routine check-up.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dinner and a Movie
programme.desc: Time of death becomes pivotal after a pregnant woman is found murdered in her air-conditioned bedroom. A striking similarity between her death and an HBO movie gives examiners the clues they need to thaw out the alibi of a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Wrong Foot
programme.desc: Police were puzzled by an obscure print found at a crime scene where one man had been killed and two teenage girls were seriously injured. Neither of the girls could identify their attacker, but one simple clue helped track the footsteps of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: A man is found dead in his home and his ex-wife has a perfect alibi. To determine time of death, investigators need to know when the victim ate his last meal. An endocrinologist, a forensic botanist and a short-order cook answer their question.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 19
programme.desc: This episode includes: Love Triangle, Ghostly Attraction, Update: Shigemoto's Bodyguard, Amtrak Sabotage, Artist for the Prosecution and Fake Doctor Fraud.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 20
programme.desc: This episode includes: Millionairess Murder, Medjugorje, Huey's Quest (rts. 1 & 2) and Where Is She Now?

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 21
programme.desc: This episode includes: A Couple of Good Men, Ladies Man, McDonald's Murder, Lucky Choir and Vanished in the Heartland.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 22
programme.desc: This episode includes: Murder Premonition, Lady and the Tramp, Getaway Photo, Coma Recovery, Newsman's Lost Love and Update: Cop Assault.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 1
programme.desc: This episode includes: Stamper's Rampage, Desperately Seeking Susan, Mucho Oro, Airline Employee Murder, Update: DJ Death and Hospital Hoax.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 2
programme.desc: This episode includes: Rainboy, Louisiana Burning, Update: Car Crash Thank You, Donut Murder and Social Security Murder.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Unabomber
programme.desc: For nearly two decades a mathematical genius with delusions of single-handedly destroying industrial society, planted or mailed powerful bombs to unsuspecting innocent victims.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Held For Ransom
programme.desc: Wealth has its rewards, but it also brings its dangers. Kidnapping is one of them. No ordeal is more horrifying for a family than to have a child taken.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Paradise
programme.desc: It should have been Shangri-La, but when bad blood developed, piracy took over and the only law was the law of the jungle.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Millionaire Murder
programme.desc: A businessman went to Florida to make one last deal before he retired-he never returned home to his millions. Authorities examined who was closest to him and who stood to gain from his disappearance. But this time conventional rules didn't apply.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Family Torn
programme.desc: The parents of 11 yr. old Brittany Martinez knew their daughter was no runaway. Something had happened to her, something terrible. When they failed to find Brittany in their quiet Illinois neighborhood, they called the police.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Camera Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Photography: Forensic photographers are among the first people at a crime scene, capturing vital clues on film. What do the cameras capture that can't be seen first-hand, and who are the men and women who analyze the camera's clues?

programme.title: The New Detectives: Tainted Trust
programme.desc: Poison is the subtlest form of death, and investigators must see through unusual circumstances to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Family Plots
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When murder becomes a family affair, investigators must turn to forensics to uncover family plots.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Murderous Attraction
programme.desc: In Columbus, Ohio, a woman is found shot in the head. The death is ruled a suicide, but something is not right and detectives refuse to let the matter rest.

programme.title: The New Detectives: For Love Or Money
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When money is the motive, murder can rip at the very foundation of marriage and family.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Escape the Escape Room - Part 2
programme.desc: The investigation continues at the escape room and a certain spirit attempts to tug at Sean's clothing. Will he finally survive the escape room?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Buried inside the Bombing Decoy
programme.desc: A Second World War bombing decoy site at Formby. It was commissioned in December 1940 as a 'Permanent Starfish' site to deflect enemy bombing from the city of Liverpool and it is now home to a whole host of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Fun and Games at The Sportsman Inn
programme.desc: Bex, Sean and Paul, investigate claims of paranormal incidents inside of a haunted inn. Once three separate cottages, will any of the previous residents join the investigation tonight? Or is there something more sinister haunting here?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: A Poltergeist Nightmare at 30 East Drive
programme.desc: The team step into a house that has become a legend with the paranormal community, 30 East Drive, Pontefract.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: The Club
programme.desc: One haunted members only club and a bar full if spirits. Ghost Dimension capture ghostly goings on, inside of Aintree Conservative Club. A place never investigated before and has paranormal activity daily.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I’m Not the Man You Think I Am
programme.desc: Sean says his wife has made him so angry that he’s put her in the hospital over 10 times. Sean’s also got a secret of his own — he is really a she! Can Steve help Sean iron out his issues?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Real Teens: Real Topics
programme.desc: Steve’s hosting another teen girl town hall to address critical issues all teen girls could face, including drug use, physical abuse, and online predators. No question is off limits!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Rescues a Runaway
programme.desc: Sherry was attacked at 15 and ran away from home. She wants Steve’s help with reuniting her with her mother. Then, Dawn's teenage daughter Cathy recently gave birth, but lives in fear of the baby’s unemployed and unstable father Nick.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Look What You Did to Your Baby
programme.desc: Kristy wants her baby back from her mother Donna! Donna claims she took the baby away because he was born with severe disabilities due to Kristy’s drug use during pregnancy. Who’s the liar?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Teen Mom Murderer?
programme.desc: At 17, Janelle's infant son died from serious injuries. She was sentenced to 3 years in prison for reckless homicide, but claims she's innocent. What will her polygraph results say?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Shocking Betrayal
programme.desc: Korey is positive that his girlfriend Dominique is cheating on him and is also worried that she might be selling sex. She says that his suspicions have caused him to become abusive. Then, Gregory thinks that his girlfriend Robin isn’t faithful!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Did It To Hurt You
programme.desc: Aeshia’s here to prove to Terrence and his wife Lashondra that Terrence is the father of her child, but Lashondra knows she’s wrong! Both Shaunah and Chris have convinced themselves that they’re being cheated on. Who’s the father?

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Joker In the Pack
programme.desc: A card game is interrupted by gunfire, leaving a young man dead. Lt. Joe Kenda soon learns the seeds of his destruction were sewn earlier the same day.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Time Bomb
programme.desc: In 1978, Lt. Joe Kenda is new to the CSPD, and gets more than he bargains for when a local bank is the target of a massive explosion.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Too Young To Die
programme.desc: A frenzied ambush at a hamburger stand leaves a 16-year old boy dead. Lt. Joe Kenda must cut through a mountain of rumor and innuendo in order to zero in on his prime suspect.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Murder Haunts Me
programme.desc: A young mother-to-be is shot and left for dead. To catch her assailant, Kenda must elicit a death-bed confession from the victim herself.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Razor’s Edge
programme.desc: When police find 24-year-old Patrick Ray with a gunshot to the temple, the scene has all the telltale signs of suicide. But Lt. Joe Kenda's instinct says otherwise.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Manifesto
programme.desc: A cabin on the slopes of Pikes Peak catches fire, and a young sheriff’s deputy is posted to guard the scene overnight--then he’s found dead in his patrol car the next morning.

programme.title: Very Scary People: BTK: Bind, Torture, Kill (Part 1)
programme.desc: Four members of a family are brutally murdered in Wichita, Kansas by the “B.T.K.” killer, which stands for Bind, Torture, Kill. He finally makes a mistake decades later.

programme.title: Very Scary People: BTK: The Taunting (Part 2)
programme.desc: Four members of a family are brutally murdered in Wichita, Kansas by the “B.T.K.” killer, which stands for Bind, Torture, Kill. He finally makes a mistake decades later.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: Summer of Terror (Part 1)
programme.desc: The Summer of 1985, the Night Stalker was on the loose in Los Angeles, and his crimes were vicious, random, and committed in the name of Satan. His victims ranged from toddlers to the elderly.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: I Will Be Avenged (Part 2)
programme.desc: The Summer of 1985, the Night Stalker was on the loose in Los Angeles, and his crimes were vicious, random, and committed in the name of Satan. His victims ranged from toddlers to the elderly.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-ed Killer: The Murder Capital of the World (Part 1)
programme.desc: Santa Cruz, California, is a beachside paradise, until female students begin to go missing. A frantic public live in terror, waiting for the man they dubbed “The Coed Killer” to strike again.

programme.desc: Santa Cruz, California, is a beachside paradise, until female students begin to go missing. A frantic public live in terror, waiting for the man they dubbed “The Coed Killer” to strike again.

programme.desc: Ryan and Shane unravel the mystery of the Boy in the Box as well as the unsolved case of a missing family.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Tragic Murder of JonBenét Ramsey / The Odd Vanishing of Amelia Earhart
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane discuss the JonBenét Ramsey case and the mystery in the disappearance of Amelia Earhart.

programme.desc: Carnie Wilson meets the ghost of a drunken barber from the 1890s; Eric Roberts has an out-of-body experience after a car wreck.

programme.title: Cops: I Always pay my Debts

programme.title: Cops: Skipping Rocks
programme.desc: A man who ran from police complains that he was not read his rights. Officers detain kids who threw rocks at windowfronts. A paranoid man claims he is being chased by drug dealers.

programme.title: Cops: Tow Time
programme.desc: Police conduct a high-speed chase on a car with a missing tire. Police respond to a tow truck driver being assaulted. Police are called when a relative attacks a woman's husband.

programme.title: Cops: Borderlands
programme.desc: Officers attempt to detain undocumented border crossers. Border patrol discovers a driver with a load of drugs in his car. Officers check passports and a suspicious-looking laptop.

programme.desc: Police respond to a report of prostitution in a hospital parking lot. A man and woman engaged in solicitation are pulled over. A woman in an area known for prostitution tries to evade police.

programme.title: Cops: Uncomfortable Shoes

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Strange Hanging - Chantal Ternik Case

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 607

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 103

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En tidlig februarmorgen i Stockholm melder en mann sin kone, Sacha, savnet. Etter hvert som politiet graver i parets fortid, oppdager de et turbulent forhold under den tilsynelatende ryddige overflaten.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 204

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 403
programme.desc: Marit Ødegaard jobber på en veikro ikke langt fra svenskegrensen. En oktoberdag i 2000 dukker hun ikke opp på jobb. Kort tid etter blir Marit funnet drept i hjemmet sitt

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: The Final Solution
programme.desc: This is the story of how Hitler orchestrated the genocide of 6 million Jews. Hitler portrayed Jews as a societal threat, using Goebbels' propaganda. Deportations were masked as resettlements while Auschwitz-Birkenau became a death factory.

programme.title: Mata Hari - The Beautiful Spy
programme.desc: Mata Hari. Dance, Seduction and Espionage. The enduring myth.

programme.title: Secret War: Hardy Amies and Operation Ratweek
programme.desc: Operation Ratweek’s existence has always been denied. However WMR has now discovered evidence that it existed and was carried out.

programme.title: WWII's The Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails: Slovenia: The Crow's Flight
programme.desc: Monty heads to Slovenia to retrace one of the most daring, yet unknown, mass escapes of Allied prisoners during the second world war, made possible only with the help of partisans and locals.

programme.title: Secret War: Double Agent Tricycle
programme.desc: Dusan Popov was almost certainly James Bond. Ian Fleming knew all the stories about him. Popov managed to persuade both the Germans and MI6 to keep him in the style of a millionaire businessman while performing a series of missions against the Nazis.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: iCarly: Ja
programme.desc: Etter at en iCarly fan frir til kjæresten på nettshowet, blir gjengen nesten tvunget til å gå i bryllupet. Men når bruden får kalde føtter, må Carly komme til unnsetning.

programme.title: iCarly: T-skjortesalg
programme.desc: Gjengen begynner å selge Penny-skjorter, og når salget går susende, rekrutterer Sam barn fra 4. klasse for å bidra til å lage t-skjorter. Men Carly, Sam og Freddie er uenige om hvordan de skal behandles.

programme.title: iCarly: Rampestreker
programme.desc: Når hun blir ertet for aldri å ha funnet på en morsom spøk, rekrutterer Carly Spencer for å spøke med Sam og Freddie. Men etter at Spencer har fått sansen for det, kan han ikke slutte. Mob må finne en måte å stoppe ham på.

programme.title: iCarly: Moren til Sam
programme.desc: Etter å ha kranglet ned moren sin, flytter Sam inn til Carly, som snart innser at hun er en fryktelig gjest. Freddie blir forfulgt av en farlig kriminell etter å ha fanget ham på film da han begikk en forbrytelse.

programme.title: iCarly: Nevel trenger hjelp
programme.desc: Når en video av Nevel, som skriker til en liten jente, dukker opp på internett, blir Nevel hatet av alle. Men Nevel trygler iCarly-gjengen om hjelp for å redde sin ære.

programme.title: iCarly: Den kjekke assistenten
programme.desc: Carly og Sam ansetter en kjekk fyr som praktikant på nettshowet.

programme.title: iCarly: iOMG
programme.desc: Gjengen tilbringer kvelden med å fullføre sine prosjekter ved Ridgeway under den årlige skole-innlåsingen. Carly og Freddie mistenker at Sam er forelsket i sin nye venn Brad.

programme.title: iCarly: iParty med Victorious
programme.desc: Carly mistenker at den nye typen hennes, Steven, er utro med Tori Vega, så gjengen planlegger en tur til Los Angeles for å ta ham på fersken på en fest som Andre holder i Kenan Thompsons hus.

programme.title: iCarly: Datehjelpen
programme.desc: Carly trår til for å løse en krangel mellom Sam og Freddie. Snart kommer Freddie og Sam til Carly for å få hjelp med hver eneste krangel. Nå som hun har involvert seg, hvordan kan Carly trekke seg ut av det igjen?

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Call Me Crazy

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Shift Happens

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Free Sabrina
programme.desc: Reporter Sabrina follows a story and almost lands herself in jail.
