programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: "Who Slept at Your House?"
programme.desc: Da Kristin har grillet Brody om 'overnattingen' hos Audrina, går ryktene under en tur til Lake Tahoe, og Kaitlynn føler seg utenfor. Caroline konfronterer Kaitlynn om det kalde vennskapet. Jason hører Spencer tvile på edrueligheten sin.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Get Dessert and Bail
programme.desc: Brody og Audrinas flørting blir hetere. Krigen mellom Pratt- og Wahler-familiene koker over, mens Brandon blir fryst ut av Danis kalde skulder etter at de flyttet sammen. Audrina og Heidis vennskap er ved et veiskille.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Time Heals Not Some Things
programme.desc: Heidi og Spencer søker hjelp for sin finansielle situasjon. Mens Kaitlynns nye forhold fortsetter å blomstre, truer en av Brandons gamle flørter å ødelegge ting mellom ham og Dani. Justin og faren blir kjent igjen etter en vanskelig tid.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: That's Math Right There
programme.desc: Kaitlynns avgjørelse om å flytte inn med kjæresten får alle til å lure på hva som skjer. Heidi & Spencer bekymrer seg for selskapet. Brandon revurderer forholdet sitt, mens Audrina får en vekker angående Brody.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: What About Me?
programme.desc: På Speidis velværeanstalt går det rykter om at Kaitlynn er gravid. Brandon avslører sjokkerenede nyheter om forholdet. Familien Wahlers kamp for å slutte fred med familien Pratt, blir distrahert av mulige skjellsettende forandringer for egen del.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Timing Is Everything
programme.desc: Kaitlynn knekker nyheten om sin graviditet til Brody, men er urolig når han og Kris skal møtes på fristedet. Pratt- og Wahler-gjengen håndterer endelig feiden som har delt gruppen. Justin får lære viktigheten av å vedlikeholde kontakter.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: To ekser har ankommet villaen og skaper kaos - og det blir verre. Rogans forhold til Anita kan stå i fare for å ødelegges når eksen Jess ankommer. Mere kjærlighet, mere hat - og framfor alt: flere eks-kjærester!

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Tre ekser har ankommet huset og det blir mer og mer spent. Kayleigh får vite at venninnen hennes Loren har kysset eksen hennes Adam, og når to ekser kommer samtidig får vi se et velkjent ansikt.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Fem ekser befinner seg i villaen og alle er på tuppa etter at Gaz fra Geordie Shore kom dit. Gary prøver seg på Anita og de faller for hverandre, men eksen som knuste hjertet hennes, dukker opp av havet. Imens har Adam en helt forferdelig dag.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Joes ankomst sjokkerer alle og Anita blir helt ødelagt. Kayleigh lager drama og forteller Joe at Anita har rotet med to av guttene. Neste eks er et velkjent ansikt som kan ødelegge for Gaz og Anita. Velkommen Charlotte!

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Jess får høre at Rogan har kysset Megan og hevner seg ved å kysse bestekompisen hans, Morgan. Bromansen ligger på is og villaen er på smeltepunktet. Imens har Adam gått til Charlotte, og hun og Kayleigh krangler, voldsomt.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Opp av sjøen kommer et kjent fjes, Ash fra Ex on the Beach første sesong, og han har bare én ting i hodet: Kaos. Alle jentene liker ham, guttene frykter ham. Når Ash velger Anita til privatfesten, bryter helvetet løs og Gary blir helt vill!

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Det er nesten over, og noen ekser slutter fred, mens andre aldri vil se hverandre igjen. Gruppen nyter en bankettmiddag, og Anitas utblåsning avslutter alle utblåsninger. Det blir en siste tur på stranden. Hvem er klar for et siste sjokk?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Welcome to Ex on the Beach
programme.desc: 10 reality- og sosiale media-kjendiser tror de er på en sexy heisatur, men paradiset blir et mareritt når deres ekser begynner å dukke opp fra stranden for å ødelgge hyggestunden. Tennes det gamle flammer eller åpnes det gamle sår?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Exed Out
programme.desc: En ny eks ankommer med en hemmelighet som ryster hele huset. En av eksene blir stemt av stranda. Par (og tidligere par) møter sine verste mareritt når de må inn i Hemmelighetenes hytte.

programme.desc: En tidligere sheriff som distriktsadvokat Alex Cahill stilte for retten, forfølger henne.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: En skygge i natten
programme.desc: Walker støter på en gammel venn, Yoshi Sakai, som han lærte kampsport sammen med.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Dusør
programme.desc: Bankraner Roy Buchanan blir arrestert ved et uhell, men når han blir befridd, får han Walker og Trivette etter seg, i tillegg til en morderisk dusørjeger ved navn Boone Waxwell.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Værvarsel
programme.desc: Trivette er ved elva – og vannet koker rundt ham – når han er undercover i fengsel og blir fanget med andre straffedømte under et brutalt rømningsforsøk mens en orkan raser. Nå må Walker finne Trivette før han blir avslørt.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: I Guds navn
programme.desc: Alex prøver å redde en venns datter fra en religiøs sekt, men blir tatt til fange av gruppens karismatiske leder.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV) NO: Jessica Alba, Wilmer Valderama, Tom Arnold, Ashton
programme.desc: Jessica Alba is tormented by a naked shopper, thinking that the SUV belongs to Ashton, a jealous boyfriend in a love triangle feud destroys Wilmer Valderrama's SUV and Tom Arnold drops off his brat kid with Ashton's newly hired assistant.

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV) NO: Kevin Richardson (Backstreet Boys), Seth Greene
programme.desc: The Backstreet Boys' Kevin & Trishelle from Real World Las Vegas get caught in building security. Seth Green gets stung when Ashton's celeb craps game gets raided. Punk'd takes over a tattoo parlor.

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV) NO: Jessica Biel, Jessica Simpson, Nick Lachey
programme.desc: Charges are threatened on unsuspecting Jessica Biel when she agrees to watch a fan's kid, Jessica Simpson's long-lost relatives show up on her doorstep asking for money and customers are treated badly by valets when they come to pick up their cars.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Ryan O'Malley
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo og Chanel viser sinnssykt morsomme Redneck Good Times, Nutflix og Double Whammies. Ryan O'Malley, hoppestokkmester, viser frem sportens gode og dårlige sider, og du får se hvorfor du aldri bør snu ryggen til en lama!

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Johnny Knoxville
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville hjelper Rob med å presentere Makeshift Ramps, Freak Beasts og Poorly Placed Kid, og du får vite hvorfor fugler aldri er dine venner, spesielt ikke om de har nebb lange nok til å nå hjernen din gjennom nesa!

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Big Black
programme.desc: Robs tidligere medspiller Big Black slutter seg til panelet og ser på Makeshift Thrill Rides, Bieber Hair og Coming in Hot. Se hvordan menneske-skorpioner stikker på en helt annen måte enn edderkoppen som angriper en uskyldig far.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Travis Pastrana
programme.desc: Motorsportsstjernen Travis Pastrana hjelper Rob med å presentere Poorly Placed Trees og Whiskey Throttles. Rob viser deg Pastranabees og Animals Being Human, og du får sjansen til å eksplodere av latter av Butt Bottle Rocket.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Farrah tilkaller politiet etter en heftig krangel med moren. Amber lurer på om hun er gravid, og dermed kan glemme å fullføre skolegangen. Maci saksøker Ryan for å få barnebidrag, og Catelynn må flytte ut av huset til kjæresten Tyler.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Catelynn risikerer å miste kjæresten, mens Ambers kjæreste sier at han kanskje vil forlate henne. Farrah balanserer college, ny jobb, og å bo alene med datteren. Maci innser at hun ikke kan bo sammen med både venner og babyen.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Seal
programme.desc: America's relations with Kuala Rokat, a small neutral country on the China-India border, are threatened when a priceless national treasure, a carved jade seal, is stolen and bought by American art collector, J. Richard Taggart.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Sweet Charity
programme.desc: The fraudulent international activities of Gerald and Catherine Hagar, professional fund raisers for charity, take the IMF to an estate on the French-Italian border.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Council pt. 1
programme.desc: Jim Phelps leads the IMF on an assignment to destroy the syndicate, a criminal empire headed by Frank Wayne.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Council pt. 2
programme.desc: The IMF continues its fight against organized crime.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Astrologer
programme.desc: The IMF accepts a critical mission to rescue Nikolai Kurzon, the leader-in-exile of the Baltic state of Veyska who has been kidnapped by Col. Stahl (Steve Ihnat), head of the secret police.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 604
programme.desc: Stine og Daniel lengter etter mer plass før de snart utvider familien fra tre til fire. Derfor er det ikke optimalt når Mads ringer og forteller at avtalen med det nye huset deres i Langå ikke gjelder.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 301
programme.desc: Astrid og Steffen skal kjøpe sitt første hus, men de kan ikke gå på kompromiss med ønskene sine. De møter programmets eksperter som skal kjøpe et hus på deres vegne.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 302
programme.desc: Louise og Michael har vokst ut av sin lille leilighet i Århus og trenger mer plass. Paret gjør et kompromiss, og Louise står overfor sitt største mareritt i huset som ekspertene kjøper til dem.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 303
programme.desc: Charlotte og Mikkel bor i en så liten leilighet at dusjen må tømmes for ting hver gang de skal bade. Men nå ønsker de å flytte litt ut av byen sammen med sønnen deres.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 304
programme.desc: Pernille og Nicklas fra Odense bor så lite at hvis de trenger litt privatliv, så har de bare toalettet å ty til. Nicklas drømmer om å få et kjøkken med to ovner, slik at han kan lage mer mat.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Estonia (Part 2)
programme.desc: Estonia has embarked on a journey greatly inspired by the nordic cuisine. Tareq explores the countryside of Estonia before he returns to the capital of Tallinn where he meets people that really love their traditional food.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Öland
programme.desc: Tareq bikes through the unique landscape of Öland, Sweden's second largest island located in the Baltic Sea. It is a place where the interaction between man and nature have created a diverse and rich farmland with an amazing amount of small producers.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Bornholm
programme.desc: Bornholm, the sunny bright green island with it’s own gastronomic tone is a true pioneer when it comes to local food at it’s finest quality. Tareq visit Denmark's first regional food culture house where they develop this unique flourishing cuisine.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Zealand
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor visits the South Coast of Denmark to make his own versions of open-faced sandwiches and smoked fish dishes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Dalsland
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor puts on his hiking boots and explores the pilgrim trail of Dalsland in West Sweden. This episode will include outdoor cooking, foraging and beaver safari.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Stockholm
programme.desc: When Tareq arrives in Stockholm he will meet innovation and world class gastronomy, a big city for foodies. He will make some pizza at the Rosendal garden café and go on an adventure in the archipielago.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Lolland
programme.desc: When Michelin star chefs move from Copenhagen to the countryside, they often end up in Lolland/Falster. Here Tareq will meet Claus Meyer the father of new nordic cuisine and other entrepreneurs that opened interesting restaurants here.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Skåne
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor explores his own backyard of Skåne and hometown of Malmö, a multi cultural food mix. Here you can find food and culture from all over the world that makes it a unique culinary destination.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: First Impressions Stick
programme.desc: Det ulmer i luften når Marnie kommer tilbake til huset etter kjempekrangelen på nattklubben med Holly og Charlotte. Jentene takler ikke at Marnie kommer tilbake, og gutta ender i sjokktilstand når en ondskapsfull kamp igjen bryter ut.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: So Much For Family Night
programme.desc: Geordiernes rustne sommer når et klimaks med mer fyll og klining, og en endelig dramatik som sjokkerer huset. Gary og Holly er stadig sinte på typen til Charlotte for måten han behandler henne på.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Gaz's Birthday
programme.desc: Geordie-gjengen er tilbake i byen for mer fest, flørt og fyll. Alle er forventningsfulle for den nye karen Aaron, og Marnie lover å holde seg unna alle gutter men havner i seng med Gaz første kveld.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Lad Code
programme.desc: Gary blir sjalu når Marnie flørter med den nye gutten Aaron. Alle er opphisset når Vicky kommer tilbake til huset, og den første 'Tash-On' - turen kommer når gjengen tanker opp med tequila på singel-kvelden.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Family's Reunited
programme.desc: Charlotte er tilbake! Og hun kunne ikke kommet på et verre tidspunkt, hun havner midt i en dobbeldate og blir klar over Garys opplegg med Marnie. Den nye karen Aaron vinner en date med Holly, men avslører at han digger Vicky.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Tash On Tours
programme.desc: Med Charlotte i hus igjen, tenker alle på Gary og Marnie og om de vil ligge sammen igjen. Gjengen tar 'Tash-On' - turer til Manchester for å vise Geordie-taktikken på singel-kveldene: Bli dritings og klin i vei.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Jersey Shore Reunion
programme.desc: Hver sommer kommer tusenvis av unge til Jersey Shore for å delta i østkystens overgangsritual: The Shore House. Jersey Shore viser dette fenomenet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 606
programme.desc: Deena forteller om da hun ble arrestert, Jenni og Rogers forhold analyseres, og Vinny forteller åpent om sin fordel.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 608
programme.desc: Deena og Sam starter en kjempekrangel på sofaen etter å ha sett noen provoserende klipp fra denne sesongen. Og Vinni feirer sin avgjørelse om å gå inn i sølibatet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Jersey Shore Best of Reunions
programme.desc: Amy Paffrath viser alle høydepunkter og lavmålene fra tidligere gjenforeninger, inkludert noen opptak som aldri er vist før.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 407
programme.desc: Det spisser seg til når Snooki, Jenni, Deena og Mike treffes for å diskutere Mikes påståtte beleiring av Snooki, for ikke å snakke om hva som skjedde mellom lakenene med Kjøttbollelaget.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 409
programme.desc: Bli med Snooki, Jenni, Pauly og Vinni når de snakker om de overraskende ettervirkningene av Jionnis store krangel med Snooki. Og du får en smugkikk på det som kommer resten av sesongen.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Season 4 Reunion
programme.desc: Etter en sommer full av åpning og knusing av flasker, hjertesorg, 'lesbiotiske' kollisjoner og bilkollisjoner og drama som møter i veggen - gjenforenes gjengen for å åpne gamle sår og ta farvel med Firenze i dette eksplosive gjensynet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Hurricane Situation
programme.desc: Medboerne kommer hjem fra Italia, og gleder seg over å være tilbake. Men et drama er i emning idet Mike truer med å ødelegge Snookis forhold til Jionni.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Song of Orpheus
programme.desc: When Father ventures to the Above World for the first time in decades, he is arrested for murder. Vincent and Catherine must delve into Father's mysterious past to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Dark Spirit
programme.desc: Investigating a mysterious death makes Catherine the target of a voodoo cult.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Children's Story
programme.desc: Catherine learns that the city's model foster home for children is hiding a dark secret.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: An Impossible Silence
programme.desc: When she witnesses a shooting, a deaf girl must decide whether to abandon the sanctuary of the City Below to free an innocent man.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Shades of Grey
programme.desc: Mouse makes his first appearance - and is quickly shunned by the Family of tunnel folk for thievery.

programme.title: JAG: People vs SECNAV
programme.desc: After an incident in Iraq claims the lives of innocent civilians, SecNav is brought up on charges of war crimes in International Court, and Harm and Mac must defend him. Meanwhile, during a trip to the arcade, little A.J. goes missing.

programme.title: JAG: Hard Time
programme.desc: Mac must accompany a prisoner who once assaulted her across the country while Harm and Bud delve into the case of an HIV-infected fleet officer who, after having his condition revealed and relegated to inactive duty, wants his old job back.

programme.title: JAG: Coming Home
programme.desc: A marine’s killing in Iraq has ramifications for JAG stateside as Harm helps the soldier’s family with a media onslaught, and Bud and Mac investigate the failure of his flack vest.

programme.title: JAG: Fighting Words
programme.desc: A general’s comments about Islam during a church service pit Harm and Mac against each other as a court-martial hearing examines whether those remarks were a danger to national security.

programme.title: JAG: Retrial
programme.desc: At the request of Seaman Saul Wainright (guest star William Sadler), who is serving a life sentence in a federal prison for stabbing a transsexual prostitute 20 years ago, Harm convinces Naval authorities to re-open the case.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Instinct/ Unmade For Each Other/ BOS
programme.desc: Isaac meets a beautiful woman obsessed with self-help books and two men become involved following a computer dating error.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Ace Takes The Test/ The Counterfeit Couple/ The Odd Triple
programme.desc: Ace is asked to be a donor in an unusual way to benefit a childless couple and a woman gets involved in competition with her daughter.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Ace Meets The Champ/ Why Johnny Can't Read/ Call Me A Doctor
programme.desc: Ace, Isaac, and Gopher get involved in a bout with a boxing champ and a woman hired to tutor a boy learns that he is dyslexic.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Love On The Line/ Don't Call Me Gopher/ Her Honor The Mayor
programme.desc: A woman seeks her boss' attention, a woman discovers feelings for her professional rival, and Gopher gets upset about his nickname.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Scandinavia Cruise: Girl of the Midnight Sun/There'll Be Some Changes Made/Mr. Smith Goes to Stockholm - Part 1
programme.desc: An American woman pretends to be Swedish when she meets an executive who's searching for a company spokesperson. Meanwhile, a woman mistakenly believes a man has undergone a sex change.

programme.title: Happy Days: American Musical
programme.desc: Struggling to write a school essay on America's immigrant history, Chachi is inspired by Fonzie's colorful story told to the tune of an imagined melting pot melody.

programme.title: Happy Days: Grandma Nussbaum
programme.desc: Grandma Nussbaum teaches Fonzie and Chachi a lesson in growing old gracefully when they try to convince the feisty granny to move into a retirement home.

programme.title: Happy Days: A Night at the Circus
programme.desc: Howard's teen-aged niece, K.C., comes to stay with the Cunninghams after a scandal closes her Houston boarding school while Fonzie hopes a night at the circus will help him win little Heather's heart when nothing else seems to work.

programme.title: Happy Days: Where the Guys Are
programme.desc: After tricking Fonzie into going to a single's camp to help him get over losing steady girlfriend Ashley, Potsie, Chachi and Roger get suckered into a sauna by three con-girls.

programme.title: Happy Days: You Get What You Pay For
programme.desc: Howard decides the house needs a second bathroom. Fonzie offers a way to have it installed and save Howard money as well.

programme.title: Happy Days: Kiss Me Teach
programme.desc: Joanie encounters trouble when she accepts a student teaching job at Patton High.

programme.title: Happy Days: The People vs. The Fonz
programme.desc: His friends are baffled when Fonzie refuses to speak in his own defense after he is accused of manhandling a student and brought before the school board's disciplinary court.

programme.title: Happy Days: School Dazed
programme.desc: Joanie tries to help an angry fifteen year old girl kick a drug habit that threatens to get her kicked out of school.

programme.title: Happy Days: Open House
programme.desc: Over the protests of Richie, whose parents are out of town, Potsie invites three-stranded beauty pageant contestants to spend the night.

programme.title: MacGyver: Thin Ice
programme.desc: MacGyver helps a promising young hockey player tone down his aggressive style of play and possibly reclaim his position on Team USA, America's ice hockey team.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Negotiator
programme.desc: MacGyver is marked for death after stopping the construction of a proposed marina and unknowingly falls in love with the hired killer sent to stop him.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Spoilers (Aka "Earthquake")
programme.desc: MacGyver comes to the rescue of a mountain man who has been framed for murder after agreeing to testify against a chemical company that is illegally disposing of hazardous materials in nearby streams.

programme.title: MacGyver: Mask of the Wolf
programme.desc: MacGyver and Jack Dalton come to the rescue of an Indian who is kidnapped by fortune hunters seeking the secret location of a legendary mask.

programme.title: MacGyver: Rock and Cradle
programme.desc: An abandoned baby lands MacGyver and Jack Dalton in the middle of a sophisticated counterfeiting scheme.

programme.title: Matlock: The Sister
programme.desc: Two nieces frame their uncle for their aunt’s murder.

programme.title: Matlock: The Cop

programme.title: Matlock: The Chef

programme.title: Matlock: Santa Claus

programme.title: Matlock: The Author
programme.desc: An author becomes a target for murder.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Jesse operates and removed the bullet from Greg, thinking he is Mark. But everything starts to unfold when mark show up for his shift at the hospital.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark's patient and shock-jock radio talk show host Denise announces her nation-wide search for her birth mother and jokes that she'll kill her if she doesn't want anything to do with her.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A woman is murdered during the burglary of her opulent Malibu home, a burglary in which a rare diamond, part of a set of famous Russian jewels known as The Seven Deadly Sins, is stolen.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: As preparations for the hospital's Christamas party swing into high gear, Claude, a popular hospital maintenance man, who each year portrays Santa Claus at the big bash, collapses.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Sloan finds himself needing a vacation from his vacation when his plans for a relaxing trip abroad a cruise liner as a doctor is turned upside down as a family finds their father has been murdered.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark and Amanda have brough their kids to the set of Frontier Dad, a popular western TV series, to watch the filming of an action sequence.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Følg med huseiere når de tar valget om å endre livsstilen sin og bytte ut bylivet med det rolige livet på landet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Pauly planlegger en storslått yachtdag. Vinny tar med samboerne på bowling. Det blir pinlig da Snooki konfronterer 2.0.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Elsker du ham?
programme.desc: Familien besøker favorittklubben i Miami, og i typisk Guido-stil, kommer shenganierne etter.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Adjø Miami
programme.desc: Sammi åpner seg overfor jentene. Angelina leter fortsatt etter svar.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Gjenforening, første del
programme.desc: Alle gjenforenes i MTVs studio for å diskutere kjøttboller og sesongens største krangler. Funker det virkelig mellom Angelina og Mike? Kan en ny bestevenn spolere Jenni og Nicoles venneskap? Finn det ut i Jersey Shores familieferies gjenforening!

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Gjenforening, andre del
programme.desc: I andre del av gjenforeningen av Jersey Shore familieferie, finner Justina Valentine sesongens mest dramatiske scener.. Hva er status for Angelina og Vinny 2.0? Hva er Nicoles neste skritt i slekthistoriereisen? En uvelkommen gjest sjokkerer.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: In the battle of sole at Kitchen stadium, Iron Chef Sakai faces off against Chef Takayoshi Kawai who heads the kitchen of the Pan Pacific Hotel in San Francisco.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Returning to Kitchen Stadium is the prestigious and young Japanese chef Haruyoshi Omino. Omino's specialty is creating formal Japanese dishes and will go up against the French-trained Iron Chef Sakai.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Chef Li Jinlun, the world-renowned master of Cantonese food from the prestigious Mandarin Oriental Hotel in Japan, heads to Kitchen Stadium to battle against Iron Chef Chen.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: How will Iron Chef Sakai fight in this battle against Shinichi Suematsu, a nature-loving challenger from Nara who's known for his one-of-a-kind Italian dishes?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Cooking show celebrity Hisama Hirano is invited to Kitchen Stadium to go head-to-head with Iron Chef Chen.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXXI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran nye farer ved å drikke i 'Ølskutt', møter folk som blir oppglødd når de går i bakken i 'Krasjglad' og fortsetter å kjøre i 'Kan ikke og vil ikke stoppe'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXXII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' holder Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Karrueche Tran trygg avstand til 'Kanonballknusere', bommer på svingslagforsøk med 'Luftslag' og forbløffes av folk som beveger seg så smidig at 'Det kan være magi'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' er Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz ute og henger med noen 'Kule utkastere', feirer folk med hodeskaller av stål i 'Knuserskaller' og skitner seg til når de tar seg et par 'Jordbad'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz farene ved å bli oppmuntret i 'Dette fikser du ikke', sjekker noen teknologifiender i 'Robothatere' før de møter noen arge englendere i 'Britisk raseri'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' skyter Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz rett i kurven med stil med 'Ballfintere', oppdager at enkelte dager er 'Umiddelbart dårlige dager' og blir vitner til søt justis på veien i 'Veikarma'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' er Rob, Steelo og gjestende vert Rocsi Diaz veldig oppmerksomme men gjør likevel 'Forsiktige feil', mister taket på 'Overdimensjonert last' og drar sin vei med stil i 'Smidige avskjeder'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXXI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' flipper Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz ut i 'Halvt baklengs', setter seg på 'Billige stoler' og ser hvem som får seg en 'Dekksmekk'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXXII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tilbringer Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz en smertefull dag på vannet i 'Båtknekt', går ut og blir 'Terrassevrak' og manifesterer en del smeller i 'Dårlig tiltrekning'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXXIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' passer Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Rocsi Diaz godt på bakdelene sine, så de ikke blir 'Rumpestukket', tar rare omveier for å unngå 'Ville veisperringer' og går tilbake til Robs røtter med 'Skaterhatere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Daymond John II
programme.desc: I kveldens episode av 'Ridiculousness' møter Rob, Steelo, Lolo Wood og gjest Daymond John nifse haier i 'Finneskrekk', vil ikke investere i folk som er 'Ikke banebrytende' og finner ut hva som skjer når man tar 'Slurvete snarveier'.

programme.title: Andromeda: En bekreftende flamme
programme.desc: Dylan beskytter Andromeda mot leiesoldater mens Beka begynner å lure på om de kjemper for feil side.

programme.title: Andromeda: Å miste den skjebnesvangre lynet
programme.desc: Dylan finner en romstasjon full av barn som tror at han er der for å bringe fred ved å drepe fiendene sine.

programme.title: Andromeda: D Minus Zero
programme.desc: Andromeda-mannskapet lærer fremdeles hvordan de skal samarbeide ettersom de blir angrepet av restauratørene.

programme.title: Andromeda: Dobbel helix
programme.desc: Andromeda blir involvert i en strid mellom en enn planeten og en Nietzschean-koloni.

programme.title: Andromeda: Angel Dark, Demon Bright
programme.desc: En slipstream sender Andromeda tilbake i tid til like før Commonwealth faller. Mannskapet må gripe inn for å bevare historien

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: A man is found dead in his home and his ex-wife has a perfect alibi. To determine time of death, investigators need to know when the victim ate his last meal. An endocrinologist, a forensic botanist and a short-order cook answer their question.

programme.title: Forensic Files: When the Dust Settled
programme.desc: Soon after organizing a workers' strike, a union official is executed in his home. Neither his wife nor anyone in the neighborhood hear any gunshots. It takes a forensic sound test, an electron microscope and a nightgown to explain why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: A man tells police he shot an intruder who had attacked and murdered his wife. The husband paints a tragic picture and is dubbed a hero. Four years later, forensic evidence leads police to re-examine the motives of this so-called hero.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A police officer accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide. Investigators say it was murder — that it was physically impossible for the woman to have shot herself.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Private Thoughts
programme.desc: Firefighters find an entire family dead inside their home in an apparent murder-suicide, but there are several inconsistent clues in the rubble. Could ballistics, a time card and some secret audiotapes unravel the mystery?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair of the Dog
programme.desc: Investigators are baffled after finding a murder scene devoid of any physical evidence, but they suspect that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime. If so, forensic scientists would have to find some way to learn what the dog had seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking News
programme.desc: A young TV news producer is raped and murdered in her apartment. Police identify two suspects, but both are cleared of any wrongdoing. When the case stalls for more than a year, investigators turn to the Commonwealth of Virginia's DNA Databank.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All the World's a Stage
programme.desc: Police are dispatched to the scene of a shooting and discover the victim's husband is one of their own: a homicide detective who says his wife accidentally shot herself in the head.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Big Chill
programme.desc: For years, a woman suffered from what appeared to be the unpleasant side effects of lithium, a drug prescribed to treat bipolar disorder. When she died, investigators had to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bound for Jail
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a ravine, and crucial evidence has been washed away by severe thunderstorms. Twice, the trail turns cold. Almost 20 years later, an old hat and a chip of stainless steel brings the killer to justice.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 2
programme.desc: This episode includes: Rainboy, Louisiana Burning, Update: Car Crash Thank You, Donut Murder and Social Security Murder.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 3
programme.desc: This episode includes: Baron 52 Crew, Scared to Death, Update: Thumbs, Fertility Statues, Rest Stop Killer and Thank You Philip.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 4
programme.desc: This episode includes: Casino Bandit, Update: Carolina Cop Killer, Cop Assault, Amelia Earhart (Pts. 1 & 2) and Down on the Farm.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 5
programme.desc: This episode includes: Don Kemp Story, Moss Beach Ghosts, Kerouac Fan, Update: Marsh, NY State Serial Rapist and Baby's Breath.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 6
programme.desc: This episode includes: Poison Pen, Champ, Li'l Miss + UD, Motorcyclist's Samaritan and Update: Shroud of Turin.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Family Torn
programme.desc: The parents of 11 yr. old Brittany Martinez knew their daughter was no runaway. Something had happened to her, something terrible. When they failed to find Brittany in their quiet Illinois neighborhood, they called the police.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Model Killer
programme.desc: It's a model's job to rivet the public's attention. But in 1984, some aspiring models began attracting publicity in a terrible new way.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cop Killer
programme.desc: In 1995, our nation's capital was also our nation's murder capital. Even the police weren't safe. While Washington, DC, law enforcement targeted criminals, the criminals targeted law enforcement, even gunning down officers on patrol.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Killer Instinct
programme.desc: In the early 1990's, a serial killer stalked lone victims in the dead of night, his hunting ground the suburbs of Washington, D.C., his target, anyone who owned a car.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Under Fire
programme.desc: A series of armored car heists and bloody shoot-outs shocked law enforcement. The brutal violence of the crimes suggested a motive more complex than greed. When the robbers started targeting police, the FBI took charge.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Threat
programme.desc: A suspected drug dealer would stop at nothing to keep local and federal authorities from building a case against him. When his organization started targeting the government itself, federal agencies went on high alert.

programme.title: The New Detectives: For Love Or Money
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When money is the motive, murder can rip at the very foundation of marriage and family.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Mind Hunters
programme.desc: Psychological Profiling: Journey into the dark recesses and calculated madness present only in our worst nightmares, and in the minds of serial killers.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Partners In Crime
programme.desc: They say that a burden shared is a burden halved, but when partners team up to commit murder, the weight of their guilt remains just as heavy. Investigators must rely on forensic science to capture partners in crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Broken Trust
programme.desc: A New York homebuyer gets more than he bargained for when a house inspection turns up a mummified corpse. For decades, the crime had gone undiscovered. The victim unmissed, and the killer unpunished.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Tools Of Death
programme.desc: Tool marking: A tool used to commit a crime can often be the same tool used to solve it. The pattern a machine leaves on an item, the unusual way a tool crimps a wire, and even something as innocuous as the shape of a wood chip can lead to a killer.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: The Club
programme.desc: One haunted members only club and a bar full if spirits. Ghost Dimension capture ghostly goings on, inside of Aintree Conservative Club. A place never investigated before and has paranormal activity daily.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: House of Fear
programme.desc: Located in Gran Canaria, there is one house that locals refuse to enter and that is, The House of Fear. Ghostly shadows, loud banging and demonic voices have all been reported here and the Ghost Dimension team will investigate these claims tonight.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Last Orders at The Fleece Inn
programme.desc: The team heads to Elland to investigate ghostly-goings on in this haunted pub. It's not just the spirits behind the bar lurking here. Multiple hauntings, murders and death surround this public house.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Souls Seeking Solace Gotts Park Mansion
programme.desc: The team encounters a spirit member joining them on the thermal imaging camera and appearing to leave its ghostly hand print behind.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Underground World Of The City of Caves
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team ventures underground to investigate the City of Caves in Nottingham.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Dangerous Demon of The Stork Inn
programme.desc: Sean heads to Wigan to investigate a location with history dating back to 900AD. Encountering a spirit that attacks him, will the team be safe tonight as they come face to face with pure evil?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Did It To Hurt You
programme.desc: Aeshia’s here to prove to Terrence and his wife Lashondra that Terrence is the father of her child, but Lashondra knows she’s wrong! Both Shaunah and Chris have convinced themselves that they’re being cheated on. Who’s the father?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Left You, But You Are The Father
programme.desc: Anastasia and Robert's 2 year relationship crumbled when he heard rumors that she was cheating on him. She says that she's always been faithful, but Robert doesn't believe her and now he doubts he is the father of her newborn baby.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Were You Ever Even Pregnant?
programme.desc: Kaliegh is 23 but has been a heroin addict for five years. Her mom, best friend, and ex-boyfriend who got her hooked on heroin are here to beg her to go to rehab. Follow her as she travels to the rehab clinic and tries to get clean!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Forbidden Love
programme.desc: At twelve, Crystal dated 20-year-old Matt and was pregnant at 13. He served 15 months for sexual assault on a minor and is a registered sex offender. Is this inappropriate love or a misunderstanding?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: 16-Year-Old Surrogate Stole Our Baby
programme.desc: Sarah was Dawn and Derek's surrogate, but took off while five months pregnant. Sarah claims that they took advantage of her. Who are the baby's rightful parents?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: She's a Crazy Stalker
programme.desc: Victor met Jasmine a few years ago but claimed they never had sex. Jasmine claims that they fell in love and want him back! Who's telling the truth?

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Manifesto
programme.desc: A cabin on the slopes of Pikes Peak catches fire, and a young sheriff’s deputy is posted to guard the scene overnight--then he’s found dead in his patrol car the next morning.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Shoelace Killer
programme.desc: A party on the outskirts of the city turns into a nightmare for some teenagers when they discover a woman’s corpse.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bring My Baby Home
programme.desc: A four-week-old girl is kidnapped, leaving her mother in anguish and police scrambling to find her. Joe Kenda and Robert Sapp fear she’s been sold on the black market… or worse.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Weapon of Choice
programme.desc: When mother of two Shaundra Murr is run over in front of her house, officers initially suspect a hit and run. Until Lt. Joe Kenda uncovers evidence proving Shaundra’s murder was a crime of passion.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Slaughterhouse Six
programme.desc: Solider and young father Layne Schmidtke is brutally beaten to death by a mob of teenagers. Kenda must reconstruct the chaotic scene through forensic evidence and witness testimonies.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-ed Killer: Thinking Murder All Day Long (Part 2)
programme.desc: Santa Cruz, California, is a beachside paradise, until female students begin to go missing. A frantic public live in terror, waiting for the man they dubbed “The Coed Killer” to strike again.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Rusty Updike has asked his ex-wife Vesta on a cruise. The couple hasn’t seen each other for 15 years but Vesta decides that a cruise with her ex might make for a nice change of pace.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Recent college grad Robert Terrible is out drinking at a club with friends celebrating. At 3 AM, he realizes he better call it a night and heads to the nearby garage where he parked his car.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: It’s an early Sunday morning when a local resident decides to take a shortcut through the church parking lot. Walking past a lone car, the resident can’t believe his eyes.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: It is 3 AM and Deputy Torres is cruising a Texas highway when he suddenly spots a crushed pick-up truck along the side of the road. Trapped inside is the lifeless body of 24-year-old Luis Reyes.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories (Classics): Carnie Wilson, Eric Roberts, Elisabeth Rohm, C. Thomas Howell
programme.desc: Carnie Wilson meets the ghost of a drunken barber from the 1890s; Eric Roberts has an out-of-body experience after a car wreck.

programme.title: A Haunting: Gateway to Hell
programme.desc: Bobby Mackey has heard tales that the river by his club draws Satanists to the area.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Rise of the Fourth Reich (Nazi's in America)
programme.desc: The Allies defeated the Axis Powers on the battlefield, but did they actually win the war? Richard interviews several alternative historians who say that while the German Army may have surrendered in 1945, the Nazi's never officially did.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Did Elvis Fake His Death?
programme.desc: A serious investigation of the long-held theory that Elvis Presley faked his death in August 1977. Jokes of Elvis sightings in Kalamazoo aside, there is a considerable volume of evidence to suggest Elvis may not have left the building

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Manchurian Candidates
programme.desc: Several prominent researchers in the field provide a short history of Mind Control experimentation beginning with the Nazis through to the CIA's infamous MK Ultra program.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Framing of Sirhan, Sirhan
programme.desc: Was Presidential hopeful, Robert F. Kennedy really killed by disgruntled Palestinian Sirhan Sirhan as we’ve been led to believe? Or was he another in a long line of Manchurian candidates, a victim of a long standing mind control program.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Past Life Regression Pt. 2
programme.desc: Richard witnesses a municipal employee in Toronto, Canada undergo a regression during which he re-experiences a previous life as a doctor in early 20 century England.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Bible Codes
programme.desc: Does the Bible contain hidden messages encoded within certain passages of the Old Testament? Is the prophetic nature of these 'codes' proof the Bible's author is of supernatural or extraterrestrial origin?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Journey to the Center of the Earth
programme.desc: Richard interviews the expedition organizer who is planning on leading a team of scientists, filmmakers and tourists to the Arctic aboard a Russian nuclear ice-breaker in search of an entrance into the interior of our world.

programme.title: Mutant X: Kilohertz
programme.desc: En ny mutant blir kidnappet fra familien sin, og Mutant X satser på å gjenopprette ham og finne ut hva Eckharts interesse for ham er.

programme.title: Mutant X: Meaning of Death
programme.desc: Når en pest som bare rammer mutanter raser, blir Adam og Eckhart enige om å samarbeide for å finne en kur.

programme.title: Mutant X: Lit Fuse
programme.desc: Eckhart søker en mutant som kan absorbere energi, en som Brennan blir romantisk involvert med.

programme.title: Mutant X: In the Presence of Mine Enemies
programme.desc: Jesse blir forelsket i en datamaskinhacker, som Eckhart vil 'anskaffe' for å ødelegge de offentlige datanyhetskanalene mot nye mutanter ... og GSAs fordel.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Thank You Very Much
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel drar til Tyskland for å finne en tapt Elvis Presley-gitar.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Transformation
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel og Derek Lloyd drar til den peruanske jungelen for å lete etter Paracelsus-rullene som inneholder formelen for å gjøre bly til gull.

programme.title: CBS News Roundup
programme.desc: The headlines one needs to know overnight... plus, a roundup of MoneyWatch, health, consumer and up-to-the-minute technology news, the latest weather, and inspiring stories of kindness and hope.

programme.title: CBS News Roundup
programme.desc: The headlines one needs to know overnight... plus, a roundup of MoneyWatch, health, consumer and up-to-the-minute technology news, the latest weather, and inspiring stories of kindness and hope.

programme.title: CBS News Roundup
programme.desc: The headlines one needs to know overnight... plus, a roundup of MoneyWatch, health, consumer and up-to-the-minute technology news, the latest weather, and inspiring stories of kindness and hope.

programme.title: CBS News Roundup
programme.desc: The headlines one needs to know overnight... plus, a roundup of MoneyWatch, health, consumer and up-to-the-minute technology news, the latest weather, and inspiring stories of kindness and hope.

programme.title: CBS News Mornings
programme.desc: CBS News Mornings broadcasts on weekdays and offers viewers up-to-date news, comprehensive weather forecasts, and highlights from the world of sports.

programme.title: On the Case: The Killer Rang Twice
programme.desc: Linda Donahew, of Arlington Texas, was discovered stabbed to death by her sister one night in June. For nearly two decades the case remained unsolved, until detectives matched DNA from Linda's case with another case a few hundred miles away.

programme.title: On the Case: The Art of Murder
programme.desc: In order to solve the murder of a talented young art student, investigators must first unravel a bizarre web of jealousy and deceit.

programme.title: On the Case: Trapped by Lies
programme.desc: Before police can catch a depraved killer of a 15 year old girl, they must first unravel a puzzling series of lies.

programme.title: On the Case: Unmasking a Killer
programme.desc: A beautiful grad student is found murdered inside a yoga apparel store. On the surface it appeared she was the victim of a botched robbery, but remarkable police work revealed a far more sinister plot.

programme.title: On the Case: Campus Killer
programme.desc: When a young girl goes missing from her university campus, her mother is forced to lead an investigation for the truth. Can she find her precious daughter before it's too late?

programme.title: On the Case: River of Sadness
programme.desc: A heartbreaking mystery begins with the discovery of a young woman's body floating in Washington state's Yakima River.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Arnie Calls It
programme.desc: While training waterbomber captains for the upcoming fire-fighting season, Chief Pilot Arnie makes a surprising decision. AJ becomes a DC-4 captain and ponders whether to accept a promotion.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Under New Management
programme.desc: Joe hires outsider Duane Hicks to help Buffalo navigate the future and coach Mikey. Gord and Sean's DC-3 delivery mission to the High Arctic goes awry when blizzard conditions and a broken oil cooler force an emergency landing.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Dambusters
programme.desc: Buffalo gets into the stunt flying business when veteran pilot Arnie flies the DC-4 for the re- enactment scene of a famous WWII bombing raid.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Chuck Walks
programme.desc: Critical of the many stops and starts in the Electra program, and frustrated with the constant drama at Buffalo, Chuck quits. Joe clashes with the maintenance department when a series of delays puts the sale of an old Canso waterbomber in jeopardy.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Gear Up, Gear Down
programme.desc: Frustrated with her lack of flying and stuck in a rut as a courier driver, Audrey decides her time at Buffalo is over.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Big Boost
programme.desc: When a ferry breakdown causes a gasoline shortage in Yellowknife, new manager Duane begs Chuck to return and prepare the Electra for a fuel haul.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Wildflower: Model Winnie Harlow, Mom’s Time Out
programme.desc: Drew spotlights women in signature "Wildflower." Laura Sobiech and Director Justin Baldoni discuss her son Zach’s battle with cancer inspiring a number one song. In "Mom’s Time Out," Drew surprises one deserving mom with an all-expenses paid vacation!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Craft Week with Zooey Deschanel, Dumplings with Wilson Tang
programme.desc: Drew is sharing DIY crafts all week-long, kicking it off with actress Zooey Deschanel. Then, Drew learns how to make dumplings with Wilson Tang. Supermodel Karolina Kurkova joins Drew at the Drew’s News desk to discuss her line of sustainable masks.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: John Boyega, Drew's News, In A Minute with Bill Nye 60 Second Experiment
programme.desc: "The Woman King" star John Boyega stops by to chat and roller skate with Drew. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Plus, In A Minute Bill Nye shares his 60 second experiment.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Bill Nye, Pilar's Pantry Party, In A Minute Drew's News Podcast Sneak Peak
programme.desc: Drew and Bill Nye The Science Guy are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, Chef Pilar Valdes reveals five essential pantry items and turns them into a delicious dish.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Regina Hall, Drew's News, In a Minute Raffle

programme.title: 48 Hours: Friends for Life
programme.desc: A report about Robyn Davis and Carol "Sissy" Saltzman, best friends for twenty years, who were charged with murder after Robyn's husband, Brian Davis, was found shot to death alongside his car on an isolated road in St. Charles, Louisiana.

programme.title: Cops: Set Some Boundaries
programme.desc: A couple gets into a fight with their in-laws when they attempt to take their baby on a 3am drive. A man is attacked by his roommate after he gets 'too friendly' with a woman in the home.

programme.title: Cops: Invisible Intruders
programme.desc: A homeowner shoots at intruders only he can see. The driver of a stolen truck claims he's just trying to return the vehicle.. A argument about parenting styles turns ugly when a gun is pulled.

programme.title: Cops: Dance Fighting
programme.desc: A dispute inside a nightclub turns into a street fight. A man patrols his neighborhood 'Old West' style. A K-9 unit is called in to track a burglar on the run.

programme.title: Cops: Do Not Disturb
programme.desc: A prostitute tries to outrun the police during a foot chase. A man claims he can only meet women at motels since he lives with his mom.

programme.title: Cops: Tree Hugging
programme.desc: An ex-felon threatens to kill his spouse after she announces she want to divorce him. A driver has suspicious plants in her car. A woman crashes her friends truck into a pedestrian and a tree.

programme.title: Cops: Crawling to Vegas
programme.desc: A driver leads police on a slow speed chase towards Las Vegas. Three people are suspected of using contraband. A multi-neighbor dispute devolves into a fight involving guns and bats.

programme.title: Cops: First Do No Harm
programme.desc: A suicidal man tries to taunt police into shooting him. Undercover officers bust up an illegal operation at a pain management clinic. A woman claims she's just a bystander to a motorcycle hit and run.

programme.title: Cops: Safe Cracking
programme.desc: A man stages a sit-in in his car in an attempt to stop it from being towed. A homeowner denies that he's selling drugs despite the large amount of evidence found in his home.

programme.title: Cops: High Jump Fail
programme.desc: A family with kids is taken on a high speed car chase. An intoxicated suspect tries to jump a fence while protesting that he's not trying to run away.

programme.title: Cops: Bumming a Smoke
programme.desc: A runaway motorcycle tries to elude officers by driving on a rough road. An argument over a cigarette turns ugly. Kids throw rocks from an overpass at the wrong car.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Mysterious Disappearences in Paris - Christelle Leroy
programme.desc: On March 21th 1991, Pascale Escarfail, 19 years old, is discovered dead at her studio in the 14th arrondissement of Paris, she was raped then stabbed multiple times.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Killer Cop (Tavernier Case)
programme.desc: Firefighters in Barbizieux, Charente, are called to a fire in a large house in the village. They arrive to find the lifeless body of the owner, Claude Tavernier, 83, lying in a large pool of blood.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Fatal Student Night (Stéphane Kameugne Case)
programme.desc: On December 24, 2008, the body of Stéphane Kameugne was fished out from a canal in Châlons-en-Champagne. The young man had been missing for two weeks and no one had seen him since the evening of his graduation ceremony from his engineering school

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: A Deadly Date On the Internet (Ciampi case)
programme.desc: Marina Ciampi, 52, is found dead at her home in Marseille. The victim is naked on her bed, a plastic bag over her head. But no trace of a break-in is detected.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Death Trap On the Road (Schaaf Case)
programme.desc: A damaged bike belonging to Karine Schaaff, 16, is found abandoned by the side of a road in Moselle.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 604
programme.desc: En 33 år gammel mann blir funnet skutt og drept nær Sundsvall. Det viser seg å være en mann med mange fiender, og politiets liste består i begynnelsen av over femti personer med mulige motiver.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En ung mann blir funnet død på et jorde utenfor Enköping. Ved første øyekast ser det ut som om han har lagt seg ned for å hvile - men når politiet undersøker liket, oppdager de noe som antas å være et skuddsår.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 304
programme.desc: I august 2004 stormer to bevæpnede personer inn i Munch-museet på Tøyen. I kaoset som oppstår tar de med seg de to verdenskjente maleriene Skrik og Madonna. Hvem står bak tyveriet, og er bildene tapt for alltid?

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 706
programme.desc: I mai 2017 ble småbarnsfaren Filip Viking funnet skutt i Katrineholm. Vitner skynder seg bort til ham og i forbindelse med forsøkene på å redde Filips liv, klarer de å se en lang svartkledd mann løpe fra åstedet.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 405
programme.desc: To reindriftsutøvere fra Vest Finnmark havner i politiets søkelys etter å ha innrapportert flere hundre rovdyrskadde reinsdyr. Kan det virkelig være slik at de to har mishandlet dyrene sine for å motta erstatning?

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: I juli 2022 rystes Mölndal da en død mann blir funnet halvt avkledd, brennemerket og med en båndopptaker plassert på kroppen. Politiet mistenker at noe langt mer urovekkende enn et vanlig drap har funnet sted.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Profile in Silver/Button, Button
programme.desc: A time traveling researcher attending the assassination of John F. Kennedy impulsively changes history/An unhappy couple is given an unusual offer. Push a button on a box and someone they don't know will die, but they will get $200,000.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Need to Know/Red Snow
programme.desc: Edward investigates town madness, discovers individual secret/KGB agent uncovers Stalin's exiles alive, dead drained of blood in Siberia.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: King Nine Will Not Return
programme.desc: A pilot of a downed WW II bomber comes to in the African desert and desperately tries to find out what happened to the rest of his crew.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Man in the Bottle
programme.desc: A luckless couple stumbles upon fortune when a genie materializes from a bottle in their antique shop. The genie grants them four wishes but warns them, prophetically, to be careful what you wish for.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Nervous Man in a Four Dollar Room
programme.desc: Small time criminal Jackie Rhoades must face both his past and his conscience while waiting for his next assignment.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Thing About Machines
programme.desc: Bartlett Finchley's paranoia about the machines around proves true.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Take My Life... Please!/Devil's Alphabet/The Library
programme.desc: A comedian killed by his rival finds himself in a strange stage show; something's off/In Victorian England, Cambridge grads are bound by an oath even in death/A woman starts at an odd library.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The forts, weapons and technology of barbarians.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: From elaborate elite training facilities to GPS-guided air drops, to revolutionary high-tech tents and fire-retardant uniforms, episode explores the science and technology of building, operating and protecting a base in a warzone.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Barbecue evolved from old-fashioned cooking into modern multi-billion dollar industry; explore famous cook-offs, established restaurants like Arthur Bryant's Kansas City, post-WWII backyard phenomenon, Weber kettle grills, and spicy sauce varieties.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Benjamin Franklin, the oldest Founding Father, was the late 18th century's foremost scientist and greatest inventor; created Pennsylvania Stove, lightning rod, glass armonica for Mozart and Beethoven and anti-counterfeiting techniques.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Arguably the most influential book ever written, the Bible provides a glimpse into the origins of ancient technology and its use to withstand the elements, build great structures, wage war, and conserve precious water.

programme.title: Secret War: Double Agent Tricycle
programme.desc: Dusan Popov was almost certainly James Bond. Ian Fleming knew all the stories about him. Popov managed to persuade both the Germans and MI6 to keep him in the style of a millionaire businessman while performing a series of missions against the Nazis.

programme.title: Hitler Uncovering His Fatal Obsession: Time is Blood 1942-5
programme.desc: Episode 2 begins after the desperate German winter of 1941. Yet 1942 began badly for the Soviets, with more vicious Nazi campaigning seeing millions more Russians captured and starved.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: They are iconic weapons: the Tommy Gun, Uzi, and today’s MP5. Invented to break WWI stalemates, the submachine gun revolutionized warfare and culture. Host Wil Willis explores its evolution, firing the Thompson and BAR.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution: Liberation & Revenge
programme.desc: 1945 frigjør soldater fra den Røde Hæren Auschwitz-Birkenau. Når andre befrielsene finner sted i de påfølgende månedene, blir verden sjokkert.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Aftermath
programme.desc: In WWII's final months, Allies discover Nazi death camps, prompting a sweeping denazification of Germany post-war. Nuremberg trials convict top Nazis. Former Nazis are employed by the West in the Cold War struggle against the Soviet Union.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: iCarly: Datehjelpen
programme.desc: Carly trår til for å løse en krangel mellom Sam og Freddie. Snart kommer Freddie og Sam til Carly for å få hjelp med hver eneste krangel. Nå som hun har involvert seg, hvordan kan Carly trekke seg ut av det igjen?

programme.title: iCarly: Det holder
programme.desc: Mrs Benson oppdager Sam og Freddies forhold etter at Gibby - som nå er mål for Sams hevn - har lagt planer om å splitte dem. Kommer Carly til å slåss for Sam og Freddie, eller hjelpe Gibby med å få dem til å gå fra hverandre?

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg elsker deg
programme.desc: Carly ber Sam og Freddie om å prøve hverandres yndlingshobbier. I mens treffer Spencer på sin gamle barnevakt og ber henne ut på middag. Etter at de har falt inn i sine gamle roller igjen, kommer de fortsatt til å kunne være sammen?

programme.title: iCarly: iQ
programme.desc: Carly vil imponere en ny fyr ved å prøve å virke smartere enn hun er. Og gjengen prøver å finne et nytt sted å bo til T-Bo, etter at han har blitt kastet ut av Groovy Smoothie.

programme.title: iCarly: Møtet med førstedamen
programme.desc: Et føderalt bureau begynner å undersøke iCarly-gjengen etter at de hacker seg inn på et sikkerhetsnettverk for å holde nettfødselsdag for Carlys far. Gjestestjerne - Michelle Obama.

programme.title: iCarly: Billetten
programme.desc: Gjengen, minus Carly, tar med Sam til Canadian Fat Cake-fabrikken, men oppdager så at Sam ikke får komme tilbake inn i USA. I mens får Carly bekymringer i badekaret når hun gjør seg klar til daten sin.

programme.title: iCarly: Turen til Yakima
programme.desc: Etter å ha blitt disset i et intervju om iCarly, prøver Freddie å vise sin kreative side gjennom å webb-sende iCarly i 3D. Spencer ansetter en assistent som han ikke har råd til å betale.

programme.title: iCarly: Tabber
programme.desc: Christopher Cane, skuespilleren som spiller Rex on Victorious, venner tilbake som vert i et dyptgående intervju med stjernerne fra iCarly og viser deres supergøyale tabber og bortklipte scener. Gjestestjerne: Rex fra Victorious

programme.title: iCarly: Fortsatt like gal
programme.desc: Ettr å ha fått beskjed om at Nora Dershlit blir løslatt fra fengselet, ser iCarly-gjengen på hva de kan gjøre for å holde sin gamle kidnapper bak lås og slå. Imens oppdager Freddies mor den virkelige T-Bo.

programme.title: iCarly: iCarly møter One Direction
programme.desc: Carly får en smittsom sykdom og kommer til å smitte et medlem i bandet One Direction. I mens skal Spencer trene en liten jente som ikke kan fordra å morsjonere.
