programme.title: Cheers NO: A House Is Not a Home
programme.desc: Sam og Diane kjøper hus av et par som har bodd der i førti år.

programme.title: Cheers NO: I Do, Adieu
programme.desc: Mange store spørsmål dukker opp når bryllupsdagen til Sam og Diana nærmer seg.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Home Is the Sailor
programme.desc: Sam kommer tilbake til Cheers et halvt år etter at han solgte baren for å leve det glade liv ombord på en båt. Nå har båten sunket, og Sam er på jakt etter jobb.

programme.title: Cheers NO: I' on Sports
programme.desc: Sam prøver å skulke unna jobben for å vikariere som sportsreporter.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Little Carla, Happy at Last, Part 1
programme.desc: Carla og Eddie planlegger å gifte seg, men først må de takle både overtro, Eddies mor, Carlas barn og Rebeccas nerver.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Little Carla, Happy at Last, Part 2
programme.desc: Til Carlas store fortvilelse har Eddie avlyst bryllupet, og Sam må prøve å gjenforene de to overtroiske turtelduene.

programme.title: Cheers NO: The Crane Mutiny
programme.desc: Gjengen prøver å overbevise Frasier om at Rebecca er tiltrukket av ham.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Paint Your Office
programme.desc: Norm blir bedre kjent med Rebecca da han maler kontoret hennes i et forsøk på å nedbetale barregningen.

programme.title: Cheers NO: The Last Angry Mailman
programme.desc: En butikkjede vil gjerne kjøpe Cliffs familiehjem og bygge det om til et supermarked, men Cliff motsetter seg planene. Gjengen får vite at Rebeccas kallenavn på skolen var "Backseat Becky".

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: A great day / Bride of Butt-Head / Special delivery
programme.desc: The school closes and makes the best day / Butt-Head phones in a mail-order bride / Burger World launches a home delivery service

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Stewart is Missing / Yard Sale
programme.desc: Mrs. Stevenson shows up at Butt-head's house, desperate to enlist their help in finding Stewart. / Tom Anderson get Beavis and Butt-head to watch his yard sale, and the boys manage to sell everything when they take the sale inside.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Tainted Meat / Bad Dog
programme.desc: Beavis and his bacteria ridden "thingy" contaminate the food at Burger World. / Beavis and Butt-head adopt a vicious dog at a shelter and it trains them.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Crisis line / Career day
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head set out to support callers on a crisis line / Later they go out on work experience as security guards

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: A Very Special Episode / Dumbasses Anonymous
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head come to the aid of a wounded baby bird...almost. / Beavis and Butt-head show up at an AA meeting hoping to score some booze.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Nektet service / Balleskvis
programme.desc: Beavis prøver yogabukser og får dem ikke av. / Guttene oppdager at de har rett til å nekte service til kunder på Burger World.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: The Mystery of Morning Wood / U.S. History
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head try to stay awake all night, in an attempt to discover the secret behind morning wood. / For his oral report on an historical figure, Beavis recounts the valuable lessons he learned one night while eating at Burger World.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: En spirituell reise
programme.desc: Beavis ser ansiktet til Jesus i en nacho-chips. Det sender ham på en episk reise for å finne svar på det store spørsmålet - "Hvorfor får jeg aldri pult?"

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Nose Bleed / Vaya Con Cornholio
programme.desc: Butt-head tries some sadistic home remedies in an attempt to stop Beavis's nosebleed. / When Beavis turns into Cornholio in Burger World, Immigration Officials take him in as a possible illegal alien and try to make sense of his gibberish.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Give Blood / Beware of the Butt (aka Drive-In #1)
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head explore the career possibilities in selling blood. / While causing mischief at a drive-in movie theatre, Beavis & Butt-head experience a new phase of the moon.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Sick / For Better or Verse (aka Haiku)
programme.desc: Suffering from nasty colds, Beavis & Butt-head visit a doctor in hopes of glomming a prescription remedy. / Beavis & Butt-head's school assignment is to write a poem in the venerated Haiku format.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina Unplugged
programme.desc: Sabrina encounters animated Shaggy and Scooby Doo inside Leonard's computer while trying to destroy proof of her powers.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Witch Way Out
programme.desc: Sabrina meets a gallery owner (guest star Austin Peck) who already possesses a leprechaun (guest star Verne Troyer) and wants a witch to round out his collection.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Bada-Ping
programme.desc: Sabrina believes a musician (guest star Richard Voll) is being blackmailed by a gangster (guest star Garry Marshall); Avril Lavigne (guest starring as herself) performs. Emily Hart also guest stars.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: It's a Hot, Hot, Hot, Hot Christmas
programme.desc: The girls spend Christmas in Miami where Roxie runs into her ex-con mom.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Ping, Ping a Song
programme.desc: It’s fame versus friendship when the girls vie for a spot on a popular television talent show.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Lyin, the Witch, and the Wardrobe
programme.desc: Sabrina lands an interview with British pop star Daniel Bedingfield (guest starring as himself); Sabrina gets Morgan a gig as the wardrobe stylist for the photo shoot.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: In Sabrina We Trust
programme.desc: The only way Sabrina can reverse a spell is to tell Roxie the truth about being a witch, and Salem induces Morgan to pamper him.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina In Wonderland
programme.desc: Sabrina accidentally tumbles into Wonderland, where she meets the White Rabbit and the Queen of Hearts.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Present Perfect
programme.desc: The harder Sabrina tries to be perfect, the more mistakes she makes.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Cirque Du Sabrina
programme.desc: Sabrina's bedroom is transformed into a circus, complete with a Russian Ringmaster sent to help her balance her out-of-control social life.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Getting to Nose You
programme.desc: Sabrina prevents Morgan from falling down an elevator shaft and incurs the wrath of the Fates, and Sabrina doubts Aaron's sincerity when he proposes to her.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Engine Trouble
programme.desc: Elyse takes an auto mechanics class to prove women are competent.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Art Lover
programme.desc: Mallory feels threatened by an older woman who takes interest in Nick’s work.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Teacher's Pet
programme.desc: Alex lands an assistant teaching position and has to grade Ellen’s papers.

programme.title: Fem i familien: My Buddy
programme.desc: Steven has a hard time accepting that Jennifer is growing up.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Once in Love With Elyse
programme.desc: Elyse’s coworker tells her that he’s in love with her.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Paper Chase
programme.desc: Mallory’s poor grades jeopardize her high school graduation.

programme.title: Fem i familien: My Back Pages
programme.desc: Steven revives the left-wing political magazine he established in college.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Be True to Your Preschool
programme.desc: Alex objects to the teaching style at Andrew’s elite pre-school.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Mrs. Wrong: Part 1
programme.desc: Nick and Mallory plan to elope when the Keaton’s oppose to marriage.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Slap-Ass: In Recovery
programme.desc: En baseballspiller slåss med sin avhengighet av rumpeklapsing, en mafioso tar hevn og Steve Urkel driver en mann til vanvidd.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Concussion Quarterback
programme.desc: En fotballspiller med hjerneskade prøver å inspirere laget sitt, en mann anklager sin kone for å være utro med en hund og en restauranteier skremmer bort gjestene sine.

programme.title: Key & Peele: The Job Interview
programme.desc: Dommer Jessie har et nytt program, en mann venter på et jobbintervju, to damer sludrer, parkeringsvakter diskuterer Val Kilmer, en pensjonert mann fra hæren hører om et nytt prosjekt og en kvinne introduserer sin forlovede for foreldrene.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Gang Stand-Off
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer gangstere som er gale etter 'Twilight,' besøk i en verden der navn er promper, og rasistiske superhelter.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Meegan & Andre Break Up
programme.desc: To venner kommer i klammeri på en klubb, Meegan og André har en seriøs samtale, en rapper går fra et intervju, Conrad flyr business class og Keegan har en ny bart.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Country Music
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer Steve Jobs' efterfølger, Ice-T, som en uoppdragen valp og Rihanna og Chris Brown prøver igjen.

programme.title: Key & Peele: The Branding
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan utforsker opplevelsen som sort collegestudent og snylterne som suksess medfører. Andre sketsjer inkluderer et nabolags reaksjon på et mystisk vesen, når man kan - og ikke kan - si et kontroversielt ord.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Alien Imposters
programme.desc: Romvesener invaderer jorden, en familie forliker seg med en slektnings homobryllup og noen rasister gir uttrykk for noen overraskende meninger.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Boarding Group One
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer at Keegan ikke får lov å gå om bord i flyet sitt, en bølle som nekter å helle ut innholdet i spritflaska og en bokser som sviner til modstanderen sin.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Sexy Vampires
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en uhyggelig asiatisk spøkelsessamboer, kara ser på den lyse siden av tortur og Keegan opplever et hus fullt av sexy vampyrer.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Airplane Showdown
programme.desc: En flyvert må håndtere en passasjer som ikke vil ha på sikkerhetsbeltet, britiske oppdagelsesreisende diskuterer sine reiser, to par forsøker å unngå spoilere på en dobbeltdate og en bibelgruppe opplever en guddommelig intervensjon.

programme.title: Broad City: Just the Tips
programme.desc: Ilana går amok med pengene hun tjente på servitørjobben, og Abbis nye forhold gjør at det lyser av henne. På fest senere den kvelden, møter jentene på en gammel venn.

programme.title: Broad City: Mushrooms
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana ruser seg på sopp og opplever en hendelsesrik trip.

programme.title: Broad City: Abbi's Mom
programme.desc: Abbis mor kommer til byen på besøk, og Ilana navigerer Sushi Mambeaux' intense arbeidskultur samtidig som hun håndterer sin sesongavhengig depresjon.

programme.title: Broad City: Witches
programme.desc: Abbi føler seg gammel etter å ha funnet et grått hår; Ilana går til en sexterapeut.

programme.title: Broad City: Florida
programme.desc: Abbi, Ilana, Eliot og Bobbi drar til Florida for å rydde ut av Grandma Esthers leilighet.

programme.title: Broad City: House Sitting
programme.desc: Abbi, Ilana, Jaime og Lincoln passer huset til Strands. Ilana og Lincoln definerer forholdet deres, og Abbi går på en Bumble-date med en mann fra fortiden hennes.

programme.title: Broad City: Bed Bugs
programme.desc: En fancy ny veske gir Abbi tillit under arbeidsledigheten. Ilana og Jaimé må ta tak i et uunngåelig New York City-mareritt.

programme.title: Broad City: Friendiversary
programme.desc: Jentenes 'Friendiversary' utvikler seg i en farlig retning når de blir vitne til noe forferdelig.

programme.title: Broad City: Stories
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana farer fra toppen av Manhattan til bunnen for å feire Abbis 30-årsdag, og treffer på både gamle og nye venner på veien.

programme.title: Broad City: Shework and S**t Bucket
programme.desc: Ilana gir seg i kast med sin seneste mulighet til å tjene penger da hun en åpner et utendørs kontorlandskap for New Yorks røykere; Abbi konfronterer husverten sin da han nekter å modernisere sanitæranlegget hennes.

programme.title: RENO 911!: President Bush in Reno
programme.desc: Reno's finest take on traffic control for President George W. Bush's motorcade, and Jones and Garcia reenact the Civil War at a pizza parlor.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Accidental Marriage
programme.desc: Garcia shoots a Dungeons & Dragons player, and Junior accidentally gets married during a sting operation.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Milkshake Man's Death
programme.desc: Reno District Attorney Mike Powers investigates the Sheriff's Department.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Investigation Concluded
programme.desc: District Attorney Mike Powers concludes his investigation of the Sheriff's Department, while Terry the prostitute takes off in Reno's police helicopter.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Released from Prison
programme.desc: Members of the Reno Sheriff's Department start new lives after getting kicked off the force.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Revenge of Mike Powers
programme.desc: The deputies enjoy their new lives in the private sector, but a specter from their past continues to haunt them.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Cop School
programme.desc: Some promising new recruits intimidate the team with their skills, and Wiegel has trouble making magic with her incarcerated boyfriend.

programme.title: RENO 911!: SARS Outbreak
programme.desc: Dangle, Jones and Wiegel lose it in quarantine after exposure to SARS, while the rest of the sheriffs hang out with kids' show host Reading Ron.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Fastest Criminal in Reno
programme.desc: The deputies try to catch the infamous Fast Eddie McLintock.

programme.title: RENO 911!: The Prefect of Wanganui
programme.desc: Kimball and Dangle escort the Prefect of Wanganui, Reno's sister city, around town; Junior and Wiegel struggle to stand out at the high school job fair.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Oprah's Baby Daddy & Jury Duty
programme.desc: Dave gets Oprah pregnant and recalls being a member of the O.J. Simpson trial jury.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Kneehigh Park & Making da Band
programme.desc: P. Diddy gives unusual requests, and Snoop Dogg visits Kneehigh Park; appearances by Q-Tip and Wyclef Jean.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Mandela Boot Camp & The Time Haters
programme.desc: Dave reveals sketches that are too hot for television.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Wayne Brady & Tyrone Biggums's Fear Factor
programme.desc: Dave gives up his show to Wayne Brady, and Tyrone Biggums returns as a guest on "Fear Factor."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Lil Jon on Lil Jon & Black Bush
programme.desc: Dave considers how recent events would have played out if President Bush were black; special guests Jamie Foxx, Lil John, and music from Outkast's Big Boi.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: PopCopy & Clayton Bigsby
programme.desc: A blind white supremacist unleashes hate, and Dave unveils Nat King Cole's booty videos.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Tyrone Biggums at School & Wrap It Up Box
programme.desc: Crack addict Tyrone Biggums visits an elementary school.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Zapped & It's a Wonderful Chest
programme.desc: Dave screens his failed reality TV show and shares outtakes from "Roots."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Reparations & NY Boobs
programme.desc: Great New York boobs get awards, and Dave predicts reparations chaos.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Great Moments in Hookup History & Ask a Black Dude
programme.desc: With time running out, Martin Johnson has one last stab at glory: Ashley "Smashly" Evans.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Mad Real World & Ask a Gay Dude
programme.desc: Dave imagines a "Real World" season with an all-black cast and one super-white guy.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 730
programme.desc: I sesongfinalen kaster Daniel et blikk på året 2015, finner ut hva som skjer med menneskeblod ved 10 000 fot og kommer med ting for høytiden for hele familien.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Pixee Fox
programme.desc: På Tosh.0s sesongpremiere viser Daniel frem sine mest mannlige klær, intervjuer en plastdronning og stjeler vitser av en legendarisk komiker.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Fart Porn
programme.desc: Daniel oppfyller et ønske fra en kar som definitivt ikke er døende (men ganske syk), tjener på sin forkjærlighet for hunder og fine biler og deltar i Twittergørrkasting som en ekte kjendis.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Tree Fall Kid
programme.desc: Daniel hjelper en kar å ta hevn på Moder Natur, deler ut Oscar for rasisme og bruker kondom for første og siste gang - alt dette mens han har på seg en bjørnefell.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 804
programme.desc: Daniel spiser ute med en gourmet i formelt antrekk, får råd fra Internetts originale kraftpar og introduserer den sikreste prevensjonsmetoden siden "hoppe av"-metoden.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 'Men's Rights Lawyer'
programme.desc: Daniel hyrer juristen som er feministenes verste mareritt, blir kjent med landets mest gassfylte jente, og spriter opp tegngivingen for støtende ordbruk.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Mini Bike Jump
programme.desc: Daniel gir oppreisning til ei bikerdame som hoppet for nær solen (og ble brent), leker den eneste lek som gjør oss kvitt bigotteri og hat og viser det mest sexy siden noen viste brødene.

programme.title: Tosh.0: '7'
programme.desc: Daniel finner ut om en hard kropp har en myk side, beviser at andre kulturers bryllupstradisjoner er like fæle som amerikanske tradisjoner og avslører hvorfor han er den perfekte sengepartneren i nødssituasjoner.

programme.title: Tosh.0: '8'
programme.desc: Daniel tar et langt skritt tilbake til da han brukte rød og svart tømmerhoggerjakke (med matchende lue) og introduserer en ny spesialstyrkeingeniør-kandidat til det republikanske partiet.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 'Catcaller'
programme.desc: Daniel tar igjen mot gatesjikane og frigjør toalettene fra sexistiske kjønnsnormers tyrrani.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline discovers that she’s been receiving free cable, her honesty with the cable company gets her into deep trouble with her not-so-truthful neighbors.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Annie is visited by her old singing teacher, Miss McGowan, Caroline helps Annie pretend to still have her “Cats” role, an act that may have a surprise ending.

programme.title: Caroline in the City

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Discreetly planning to ease Caroline’s homesick holiday blues, Richard (Malcolm Gets) goes to great lengths to get a gift for Caroline that inspires suspicion in Julia (Sofia Milos) and sleuthing from Caroline and Annie.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Informed by Annie (Amy Pietz) of Caroline’s (LeaThompson) unspoken love for him, Richard (Malcolm Gets) confronts Caroline, who tells him that it’s a thing of the past.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline (Lea Thompson) is tapped as a celebrity guest star for a quiz show, her jitters prompt Richard (Malcolm Gets) to help her study, much to Julia’s (Sofia Milos) chagrin.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) tries to convince an insecure Del(Eric Lutes) that he has the potential to be a great parent after Del is shocked to discover that he is the father of a 10-year old girl.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Julia (Sofia Milos) tells Caroline (Lea Thompson) that it’s not easy being on the outside of her close working relationship with Richard (Malcolm Gets), Caroline quickly, and mysteriously, learns what it’s like to walk a mile in Julia’s shoes.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: As Caroline (Lea Thompson) struggles with commitment issues over Trevor, Richard(Malcolm Gets) inadvertently causes a rift between Caroline and her new beau.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline (Lea Thompson) is insulted by a local cabbie, Adamo, she takes her case to higher powers at the travel commission. Meanwhile, Richard, frustrated by a “painter’s block,” becomes obsessed with computers when he joins a cyber cafe.
